1001403473.english: This single sword of attitude is enough. As ordered... death to the Lord's enemy.
1001403473.korean: 이 태도 한 자루면, 충분. 명령받은&n대로... 주공의 적에게, 죽음을.

1001403474.english: Kaen's younger sibling...? I don't remember... but if you give me an order, I'll obey.

1001403475.english: I feel anxious without orders. I have to take orders—... Smile for me? Like this? … My Lord. A strange face.
1001403475.korean: 명령, 없으면 불안해. 명령, 받아야-&n...웃어줘? 이렇, 게? …주공.&n이상한, 얼굴.

1001403476.english: I think I know what you said last time. An order, Lord, a blank slate... Yes. Kaen, please... color it with your color.
1001403476.korean: 저번에 했던 말, 알 것 같아. 명령,&n주공, 백지... 응. 카엔, 주공의&n색으로... 물들여 줘.

1001403478.english: Not… an order? Then… okay. Please. &n Remember. Make Kaen… feel good. &n ...That's not it either?
1001403478.korean: 명령이, 아냐…? 그럼… 응. 부탁.&n기억해. 카엔을, 기분좋게&n해주세요. ...이것도, 아냐?

1001403479.english: I like it when you're on top. What &n about you…?

1001403480.english: Cool… Cool… ...! Ah, Lord… Yeah. A nap. ...Do you want to sleep with Hatsuna too, Lord?
1001403480.korean: 쿨… 쿠울… ...!&n아, 주공... 응. 낮잠. ...주공도&n하츠나랑, 잘래?

1001403481.english: Hatsuna. I hate orders now. All orders hurt. They hurt... and make me sad. Mm. My Lord, no. My Lord always makes Hatsuna happy. Yes. So... I really like you.
1001403481.korean: 하츠나. 이제 명령, 싫어. 명령은&n전부, 아파. 아프고… 슬퍼.&n으응. 주공은, 아냐. 주공은&n항상, 하츠나 기쁘게 해. 응.&n그래서… 정말, 좋아.

1001403482.english: Do whatever you want? Anything? Yes. ...Not now? Why? ...My Lord, I lied. I won't speak to you until you do it. ...That was just a joke. Whatever you do, it's fine. Yes. This is love.
1001403482.korean: 하고 싶은 거, 해? 뭐든지? 응.&n...지금은, 안 돼? 왜? ...주공, 거짓말 했어.&n해 줄 때까지 주공이랑, 말 안 해.&n…방금 건, 장난. 주공이 어떻게하든,&n괜찮아. 응. 이게, 사랑.

1001403483.english: Lord. Always make Hatsuna feel good. Hatsuna... can do it too.
1001403483.korean: 주공. 항상 하츠나, 기분 좋게 해줘.&n하츠나도… 할 수, 있어.

1001403484.english: Ground forces without the support of the Watcher are no different from the blind.
1001403484.korean: 와쳐의 지원을 받지 못하는&n지상군은 장님과 다를 바&n없습니다.

1001403485.english: Our Watcher model is efficient for observation and joint missions.
1001403485.korean: 저희 와쳐 모델은 관측, 합동&n임무에 효율적입니다.

1001403486.english: Due to design reasons, it is impossible to ride the Watcher model.

1001403487.english: How do I look? You can't take your eyes off me, can you? But... I won't let you touch me. Hehe.
1001403487.korean: 제 모습이 어때요? 눈을 못&n떼겠죠? 하지만... 손대게 허락해&n주진 않을 거예요. 히힛.

1001403488.english: Undine and Neri probably wouldn't even have the courage to wear an outfit like this, would they? So... you should be a little grateful to me.
1001403488.korean: 운디네나 네리는 이런 복장을&n입을 용기도 없을걸요? 그러니까…&n조금은 저한테 고마워 하라고요.

1001403489.english: Commander~? So, how am I going to play with you today... H-H-h-ah?!...Hehe! I dodged it!
1001403489.korean: 사령과안~? 그래서 오늘은 또&n어떻게 놀아드릴... 흐, 흐앗?!&n...헤헤! 피햇지롱!

1001403490.english: Hehe, are you just going to sneakily peek? Well, I don't really dislike the Commander's refined taste that much.
1001403490.korean: 히힛, 촌스럽게 힐끗힐끗&n훔쳐보기만 할 거예요? 뭐,&n사령관의 그런 고상한 취향이&n그렇게 싫진 않네요.

1001403491.english: I'm in danger right now in many ways. So... Commander, you'd better stay alert too.
1001403491.korean: 저는 지금 여러모로 위험하다고요.&n그러니까… 사령관님도 정신 바짝&n차리셔야 할걸요?

1001403492.english: I’d like to hear your honest thoughts, Commander, about now. ...What?! ... Ugh... You really are a hopeless case, Commander... Well, for your sake, I’ll keep that a secret between just the two of us....
1001403492.korean: 이제 슬슬 사령관님의 솔직한 감상을&n듣고 싶은데요? ...네?! …으으... 사령관은&n정말 어쩔 수 없는 분이네요… 뭐, 사령관&n을 위해서라도 그 말은 우리 둘만의&n비밀로 해드릴게요....

1001403493.english: Whoa?! I'm a bit shocked! I really didn't think you'd touch me!
1001403493.korean: 으앗?! 저, 조금 충격인데요?!&n정말 건드릴 줄은 몰랐거든요!

1001403494.english: Y-You're being a little too serious &n right now? I was joking… &n ...It was just a joke…
1001403494.korean: 지, 지금 너무 진지하신 것&n같은데? 장난이라고요…&n... 장난…인데….

1001403495.english: B-Bringing up the oath like that… &n That's so unfair, Commander!
1001403495.korean: 서, 서약 때 이야기를 꺼내다니,&n치사해요 사령관!

1001403496.english: Are you talking about this outfit? The texture isn't bad, is there a problem?
1001403496.korean: 이 옷 말씀이시오? 감촉은 나쁘지&n않은데, 무슨 문제라도 있소?

1001403497.english: As a subordinate, I could not let my lord wander alone in a dangerous place.
1001403497.korean: 부하된 자로, 주군이 홀로 위험한&n곳을 거닐게 할 순 없었소.

1001403498.english: I intended to offer this dark world to my lord... but it is a pity.
1001403498.korean: 주군에게 이 검은 세계를 바치려&n했건만... 아쉬울 따름이오.

1001403499.english: It seems the Lord likes this outfit, so I specially asked Miss Audrey to make one for me.
1001403499.korean: 주군이 이 옷을 마음에 들어 하는&n것 같아, 오드리 양에게 특별히 한&n벌 부탁해뒀었지.

1001403500.english: What my lord desires is what I desire. Wherever my lord aims, I will be with him.
1001403500.korean: 주군이 바라는 것이, 내가 바라는&n바. 주군이 목표로 하는 곳이라면&n어디든 내가 함께 할 것이오.

1001403501.english: I once saw a world that had become distorted and turned black... I will not let that black water stain my lord.
1001403501.korean: 언젠가 어그러지고 검게 변해버린&n세계를 보았지... 주군에게는 그&n검은 물이 들게 내버려 두지 않겠소.

1001403502.english: I think that is enough teasing.

1001403504.english: Even if I could choose another life, &n I'd still choose to serve my husband.
1001403504.korean: 설령 다른 삶을 선택할 수 있다&n해도, 저는 서방님을 모시는 삶을&n선택할 것입니다.

1001403505.english: I told them I slept hugging them tightly last night... and the Captain told me to go see Brownie. Should I give it a try?
1001403505.korean: 나 어젯밤에 꼭 껴안고 잤다고&n이야기하니까... 대장이&n브라우니한테 가보래. 그래볼까?

1001403506.english: Commander, Commander, get in front of Xenox. I have something to try.
1001403506.korean: 사령관, 사령관이 제녹스 앞에&n타봐. 해볼 게 있어.

1001403507.english: Commander, I think you'd better not joke around. I think I understand now.
1001403507.korean: 사령관, 사령관은 농담은 안 하는&n게 좋을 것 같아. 나도 이제 알 것&n같아.

1001403508.english: Commander, didn't you say you'd just hold hands?

1001403509.english: I'm putting on a runway for you, my dear. The theme is unanimously decided: underwear. Sounds good, right?
1001403509.korean: 우리 자기를 위한 런웨이를 꾸미고&n있어요. 주제는 만장일치로&n언더웨어. 괜찮죠?

1001403510.english: You always inspire me. Because when I'm in your arms... my mind becomes beautiful...
1001403510.korean: 자기는 언제나 내게 영감을 줘요.&n자기 품에 있으면... 머릿속이&n아름다워지니까….

1001403511.english: Beautiful... Your fashion is good today? Especially... your face...
1001403511.korean: 뷰티풀... 오늘 패션 좋은데요?&n특히... 얼굴 쪽이….

1001403512.english: Hmm... Is it time to bring out the Audrey Secret collection? Of course, the model is… me.
1001403512.korean: 흐응... 오드리 시크릿 컬렉션을&n꺼낼 시간인가요? 물론 모델은…&n나예요.

1001403513.english: Senior Phantom is superior to me in every way. I am nothing more than an inferior version. But… I will definitely surpass her.
1001403513.korean: 팬텀 선배는 모든 면에서 나보다 우월하다.&n나는 그저 열화판에 지나지 않는다. 하지만…&n반드시 뛰어넘겠다.

1001403514.english: Are you referring to the optical disc I left on my desk? There is nothing particularly special about it, but...
1001403514.korean: 제 책상 위에 둔 광학 디스크&n말씀이십니까? 별다른 내용은&n없습니다만….

1001403515.english: I’m scheduled to have a get-together with the unit members in a little while. If nothing comes up, would you come along? Um, I think I won't be nervous if the Commander is nearby. If possible, I'd like to... Ah, it's nothing.
1001403515.korean: 조금 있다 부대원들과 모임을 갖기로&n했는데, 별일 없으면 같이 가주겠나?&n그, 사령관이 곁에 있으면 긴장하지 않을&n것 같다. 가급적 손도… 아, 아무것도 아니다.

1001403516.english: If I get the chance, I’d like to watch some old-era anime with you, Commander. Hehe... Yes, since there is no need to hide it anymore.
1001403516.korean: 기회가 된다면, 사령관님과 함께&n구 시대의 애니메이션을 보고 싶네요.&n후훗… 네, 이제 더 이상 숨길 필요가&n없으니까요.

1001403517.english: Do you know how hard it was for me to bring the Commander here secretly, without anyone else knowing? Back then, I… Ugh… If, if you suddenly stroke my head like that…
1001403517.korean: 다른 사람들 몰래 사령관을 데려오느라,&n내가 얼마나 힘들었는지 알아? 그때&n내가… 우으… 가, 갑자기 그렇게&n쓰다듬으면….

1001403518.english: The wine flowed down the valley and filled the cup to the brim. Lord, would you like a sip before it overflows?
1001403518.korean: 술이 계곡을 따라 내려가, 술잔에 가득&n차버렸어요. 주공? 이 술이 넘쳐 흘러&n버리기 전에, 한 모금 드셔보시겠어요?

1001403519.english: I often saw the Commander sleeping during the day. Could it be... Hmm. He must have been working until late at night. Huh? I'm sweating profusely. Is he feeling unwell?
1001403519.korean: 사령관이 종종 낮에 자는 모습을 봤다.&n혹시… 음. 분명 밤늦게까지 업무를&n봤을 테지. 응? 식은땀이 많이 나는군.&n혹시 몸이 안 좋은가?

1001403520.english: Yes, for me, the survival of my platoon members is the most important thing above all else.
1001403520.korean: 네, 제겐 무엇보다 소대원들의 생환이&n가장 중요합니다.

1001403521.english: Commander. When on earth do you plan to do any work? Unless you're with me, it looks like you're hanging out with the other squad members every time I see you. Huh? Ah, no. That's not what I meant! I wasn't— Ack?!
1001403521.korean: 사령관. 대체 일은 언제 하려는 건가?&n나랑 있을 때가 아니면, 볼 때마다 다른&n대원들과 놀고 있는 것 같다. 에? 아, 아니.&n그런 의미가 아니다! 질투 같은 건- 꺅?!

1001403522.english: I feel like I've gotten a little closer to my platoon members lately. All of this is thanks to you, Commander.
1001403522.korean: 요즘은 소대원들과 사이가 조금 더&n가까워진 것 같아요. 이 모든 건&n사령관님 덕분이에요.

1001403523.english: The chef said this is the best outfit for a date... so what do you think, Commander? Do you like it?
1001403523.korean: 주방장님이, 데이트 복장으론 이게&n제일 좋다고 해서… 어때 사령관?&n마음에 들어?

1001403524.english: Yes, Lord. Tonight, I will devote my body and soul to serving you with utmost sincerity.
1001403524.korean: 네, 주공. 오늘 밤은 이 몸과 마음을&n바쳐 주공을 정성껏 모시겠어요.

1001403525.english: I am a weapon. Nothing is necessary except combat, training for it, and the minimum activities required to sustain life.
1001403525.korean: 나는 병기다. 전투와 그를 위한 훈련,&n생명을 유지하기 위한 최저한의 활동&n외의 것은 불필요하다.

1001403526.english: We have detected an inappropriate electronic device attached to your body, Commander. This is… a listening device. It appears to be transmitting toward the Horde quarters; do you have any idea what might be going on?
1001403526.korean: 사령관님의 몸에 장착된 부적절한 전자&n기기를 감지했습니다. 이건… 도청기로&n군요. 호드의 숙소 쪽으로 송신하는 듯&n한데, 뭔가 짚이는 게 있으신가요?

1001403527.english: Um, adequate rest improves work efficiency. So, the reason I leaned on the Commander's shoulder was... I, actually... I just wanted to do this.
1001403527.korean: 저, 적당한 휴식은 업무의 능률을 올린다.&n그러니까, 내가 사령관의 어깨에 기댄&n것은… 사, 사실… 그냥 이러고 싶었다.

1001403528.english: Um... Commander? I don't think we can keep our relationship a secret forever. Is there a good way to do this?
1001403528.korean: 저… 사령관님? 언제까지고 우리 사이를&n비밀로 할 순 없을 것 같은데, 좋은&n방법이 없을까요?

1001403529.english: Welcome, Commander! Today, I'm going to make you spin around, so you can look forward to it!
1001403529.korean: 어서 와 사령관! 오늘은 내가 사령관을&n빙글-빙글하게 만들어 줄 테니까,&n기대해도 좋아!

1001403530.english: It is perfectly natural for a man to be interested in the female body. Please do not be shy, and get drunk like a girl tonight.
1001403530.korean: 사내가, 여체에 관심을 가지는 것은&n지극히 자연스러운 일. 수줍어하지&n마시고, 오늘 밤은 소녀와 같이 취해&n주시어요.

1001403531.english: My contact with the unit members… isn’t that great. I guide the target, and they just bomb from the sky. ...You’re going to make a spot for me? Th-I’m busy with training…
1001403531.korean: 부대원들과의 접점은… 그다지 많지 않다.&n내가 목표를 유도하고, 그들은 하늘에서&n폭격할 뿐. ...자리를 만들어 주겠다고?&n그, 나는 훈련 때문에 바빠서…

1001403532.english: That disc contains old-school animation footage, but... ...M-Commander? By any chance... do you know... Magical Momo?
1001403532.korean: 그 디스크 안에는, 구 시대의 애니메이션&n영상이 들어있습니다만… ...사, 사령관님?&n혹시… 매지컬 모모를… 아시나요?

1001403533.english: I’m scheduled to have a get-together with the unit members in a little while. If nothing comes up, would you come along? Um, I think I won't be nervous if the Commander is nearby. If possible, I'd like to... Ah, it's nothing.
1001403533.korean: 조금 있다 부대원들과 모임을 갖기로&n했는데, 별일 없으면 같이 가주겠나?&n그, 사령관이 곁에 있으면 긴장하지 않을&n것 같다. 가급적 손도… 아, 아무것도 아니다.

1001403534.english: If I get the chance, I’d like to watch some old-era anime with you, Commander. Hehe... Yes, since there is no need to hide it anymore.
1001403534.korean: 기회가 된다면, 사령관님과 함께&n구 시대의 애니메이션을 보고 싶네요.&n후훗… 네, 이제 더 이상 숨길 필요가&n없으니까요.

1001403535.english: I wanted to give the Commander, who is always working so hard, the best time possible. So, please finish this and hang in there today, Commander.
1001403535.korean: 늘 고생하는 사령관에게 최고의&n시간을 만들어 주고 싶었어.&n그러니까, 이것 마저 마시고 오늘도&n힘내줘 사령관.

1001403536.english: While waiting for my lord, a flower petal landed from somewhere. What should I do with this... Yes, I will follow my lord's will.
1001403536.korean: 주공을 기다리는 동안, 어디선가&n꽃잎이 내려와 앉았어요. 이를 어찌하면&n좋을지... 네, 소녀는 주공의 뜻에&n따르겠어요.

1001403537.english: Commander. How was the shooting training we did together? I did my best to teach you, but… Uh, really? Hmph, I knew you’d appreciate it— M-I’m sorry. I did it without thinking…
1001403537.korean: 사령관. 나와 같이 했던 사격 훈련은&n어땠었나? 최선을 다해 가르쳤다만…&n저, 정말인가? 훗, 역시 사령관은 알아줄&n줄 알았- 미, 미안하다. 나도 모르게…

1001403538.english: I neutralized the wiretap, but the classic method is really... well, I really have no way to stop people from eavesdropping from outside the door.
1001403538.korean: 도청기는 무력화 시켰지만, 고전적인&n방식은 정말이지… 네, 문밖에서&n엿듣는 것만은 저도 막을 방법이&n없네요.

1001403539.english: Commander. When on earth do you plan to do any work? Unless you're with me, it looks like you're hanging out with the other squad members every time I see you. Huh? Ah, no. That's not what I meant! I wasn't— Ack?!
1001403539.korean: 사령관. 대체 일은 언제 하려는 건가?&n나랑 있을 때가 아니면, 볼 때마다 다른&n대원들과 놀고 있는 것 같다. 에? 아, 아니.&n그런 의미가 아니다! 질투 같은 건- 꺅?!

1001403540.english: I feel like I've gotten a little closer to my platoon members lately. All of this is thanks to you, Commander.
1001403540.korean: 요즘은 소대원들과 사이가 조금 더&n가까워진 것 같아요. 이 모든 건&n사령관님 덕분이에요.

1001403541.english: Huh? What's wrong? Don't tell me... you don't like the cocktail!? Ugh... I'm sorry, Commander. Next time, I'll make it with lemon instead of lime, so you can look forward to it.
1001403541.korean: 응? 왜 그래? 설마…. 칵테일이 마음에&n안 드는거야!? 우으… 미안해 사령관.&n다음엔 라임 대신에 레몬을 넣어서&n타줄테니까, 기대해도 좋아.

1001403542.english: If you are suffering from accumulated fatigue, please let me know. I will gently relieve it for you.
1001403542.korean: 주공의 몸에 피로가 쌓여있다면,&n소녀에게 말해 주시어요. 소녀가&n부드럽게 풀어 드리겠사와요.

1001403543.english: Was it just a nap... Commander. If the other squad members see me like that— Ack, why are you hugging me?! Th-sleep together... Then just for a moment... Excuse me.
1001403543.korean: 그냥 낮잠이었나… 사령관. 그런 모습을&n다른 대원들에게 보이면- 꺅, 왜 끌어안는&n건가?! 가, 같이 자자니… 그럼 잠시만…&n실례하겠다.

1001403544.english: I'm worried that my platoon members might have noticed the relationship between me and the Commander...
1001403544.korean: 저와 사령관님의 관계를, 저희 소대원&n들이 알아차린 건 아닐지 걱정이&n되네요….

1001403545.english: Um, adequate rest improves work efficiency. So, the reason I leaned on the Commander's shoulder was... I, actually... I just wanted to do this.
1001403545.korean: 저, 적당한 휴식은 업무의 능률을 올린다.&n그러니까, 내가 사령관의 어깨에 기댄&n것은… 사, 사실… 그냥 이러고 싶었다.

1001403546.english: Um... Commander? I don't think we can keep our relationship a secret forever. Is there a good way to do this?
1001403546.korean: 저… 사령관님? 언제까지고 우리 사이를&n비밀로 할 순 없을 것 같은데, 좋은&n방법이 없을까요?

1001403547.english: If your girlfriend were a pâtissière, what would you want to ask her to do? W-what... I'm only interested in that kind of thing... I'll keep everything that happens at the bar a secret, so... do whatever you want, Commander.
1001403547.korean: 만약 여자친구가 파티시에르면 어떤 걸 부탁&n하고 싶어? 뭐, 뭐야… 그런 곳만 관심 있고…&n바에서 일어나는 일은 전부 비밀로 해 줄&n테니까… 사령관 하고 싶은 대로 해줘.

1001403548.english: My Lord? Which one would you like to try first today? Cherries? Or strawberries? If not those... my... flower petals? Hehe...
1001403548.korean: 주공? 오늘은 어떤 것부터 드셔&n보시겠사와요? 앵두? 아니면, 딸기?&n그것도 아니라면… 제… 꽃잎? 후훗….

1001403549.english: That is inefficient behavior, Commander. Instead of playing games with me, why don't you review the operation plan?
1001403549.korean: 비효율적인 행동이다, 사령관. 내게&n장난을 칠 시간에 작전 계획의&n검토라도 하는 것이 어떤가?

1001403550.english: It's, it's alright. Everyone makes mistakes.

1001403551.english: This act is not without meaning. Above all, the commander looks happy... and I, I...
1001403551.korean: 이 행위에 의미가 없지는 않다.&n무엇보다 사령관이 기뻐 보이고…&n나, 나도…

1001403552.english: At this rate… I can’t be a role model… Commander… is that what you want me to be?
1001403552.korean: 이래선… 제가 모범이 될 수 없는데…&n사령관님은… 제가 그러길 바라시는&n건가요?

1001403553.english: Commander?! The excuse that you're drunk won't work anymore!

1001403554.english: The sound... is leaking out... Hmph...

1001403555.english: U-Um… C-Commander. If that's how it is… R-Right. &n Artificially… having a child—Is that so. &n Then… I'll entrust everything to you.
1001403555.korean: 으, 아… 사, 사령관. 이럴 바엔… 마, 맞다.&n인공적으로도 아이를- 그, 그런가.&n그럼… 사령관에게 전부, 맡기겠다.

1001403556.english: Hmph… If the squad members &n saw me like this… No, please don't &n Commander…
1001403556.korean: 흣… 이 모습을 소대원들이&n보기라도 하면… 아, 안돼요&n사령관님….

1001403557.english: This act isn't meaningless. &n Most importantly, you seem happy… &n And so do I…
1001403557.korean: 이 행위에 의미가 없지는 않다.&n무엇보다 사령관이 기뻐 보이고…&n나, 나도…

1001403558.english: If I'm like this… I can't be a role model… &n Commander, is that what you &n want from me?
1001403558.korean: 이래선… 제가 모범이 될 수 없는데…&n사령관님은… 제가 그러길 바라시는&n건가요?

1001403559.english: I'm… drunk? T-Then… it can't be helped… &n ...Hehe… I'm being good, right? &n Hmm, what do I do with you…?
1001403559.korean: 취했... 어? 그, 그럼… 어쩔 수 없네…&n...헤헤.. 착하지?.. 우음, 이를 어떻게&n한다…?

1001403560.english: Hngh! … Yes, my lord. Start with &n wherever you'd like to taste… &n Savor it slowly…
1001403560.korean: 흐읏! … 네, 주공. 주공이 맛보고&n싶으신 곳부터... 천천히 음미하여&n주시와요....

1001403561.english: Commander keeps doing… embarrassing things &n and it keeps messing up the training schedule. &n N-No, it's not like I hate it…
1001403561.korean: 사령관이 자꾸 그… 부끄러운 짓을&n하니까 훈련 스케쥴이 자꾸 어긋난다.&n아, 아니, 싫은 건… 아니다.

1001403562.english: Commander? I've finished educating the squad, &n so there's nothing to worry about anymore.
1001403562.korean: 사령관님? 소대원들의 계도는 끝내&n두었으니, 이제 걱정하실 것 없어요.

1001403563.english: Hehe. Keep holding me like this, Commander. &n When you do, all my worries just &n disappear.
1001403563.korean: 헤헤. 계속 이렇게 안아줘 사령관.&n사령관이 안아주면, 걱정이 모두&n사라지는 것 같아.

1001403564.english: For my lord to personally teach me &n the happiness of being a woman… &n I'm so happy I don't know what to do…
1001403564.korean: 주공께서 친히 여자로서의 행복을&n가르쳐 주시니... 소녀는 행복해&n몸 둘 바를 모르겠사와요…

1001403565.english: Hmm... Darling, even if I manage you strictly, please never take it personally. It's all for your own good.
1001403565.korean: 음... 달링은 내가 달링을 엄하게&n관리하더라도 절대로 섭섭하게&n생각 마. 다 달링을 위해서니까.

1001403566.english: We're going to be a special couple. Having a very special love…
1001403566.korean: 우린 특별한 한 쌍이 될 거야. 아주&n특별한 사랑을 하는….

1001403567.english: Darling... if you really want to, you can give me a prize. Well, I'll let you win this one time.
1001403567.korean: 달링... 정 그러면 내게 상을 줘도&n돼. 뭐, 이번 한 번은 져줄게.

1001403568.english: W-already? Ah, no! I'm going to fix Darling's bad habits today.
1001403568.korean: 버, 벌써? 아, 안돼! 오늘은 내가&n달링의 버릇을 잡을 거란 말야.

1001403569.english: There are times when I feel a little guilty. Our relationship… but… there are also times when I think we’ve become a true family. I’m a bit confused.
1001403569.korean: 약간은 죄책감이 느껴질 때가 있어요.&n우리 관계가… 하지만… 진정한 가족이&n된 거라고 생각이 들 때도 있고요.&n조금은 혼란스러워요.

1001403570.english: I wonder if using a military grenade as our shelter is okay... Colonel Red Hood would be furious if she saw this...
1001403570.korean: 군용 수류탄을 우리 은신처로 삼는 건&n괜찮을지… 레드후드 연대장 님이 보시면&n화를 내실 텐데…

1001403571.english: Later on, when many humans are born... what will it feel like? I'm curious because I've never had a family member called a child.
1001403571.korean: 나중에 인간님들이 많이 태어나면…&n어떤 기분일까요? 아이라는 가족을&n가져본 적이 없어서 궁금해요.

1001403572.english: Is this a human manufacturing operation? P-Commander! Leave it to me! I can do it well!
1001403572.korean: 인간님 제조 작전인가요? 사,&n사령관님! 맡겨 주세요! 전 잘 할&n수 있어요!

1001403573.english: They say the enemy of my enemy is my friend, right? That's the kind of relationship I had with Shirayuri. She's a bit dark on the inside, but she's still a good guy, you know?
1001403573.korean: 적의 적은 친구라잖아? 시라유리랑은&n그런 관계였어. 속이 좀 시커멓긴&n하지만, 그래도 좋은 녀석이라구?

1001403574.english: Nyahahaha! Master, that white cat earlier told me to call her "Big Sister." Was she scared of losing you?
1001403574.korean: 냐하하핫! 주인님, 아까 그 하얀&n고양이가 자기 보고 언니라고&n부르라고 하던데요? 주인님을&n뺏길까 봐 무서웠나아~?

1001403575.english: Eek?! I told you not to hug me from behind so suddenly like that! To a naughty husband who doesn't listen, it's like this, all ticklish~ Ahaha, I won't let you off the hook even if you surrender~ Shall we stop by the room for a moment...?
1001403575.korean: 꺅?! 그렇게 갑자기 뒤에서 안지&n말랬지! 말 안 듣는 나쁜&n남편한테는 이렇게, 간질간질~&n아하핫, 항복해도 안 봐줄 거라구~&n우리, 잠깐 방에 들를까...?

1001403576.english: Why do you only pet me these days? Poi isn't satisfied with just this— Meow… Hah. Th-this is just… I-something, sometimes this isn't so bad.
1001403576.korean: 요즘은 왜 이렇게 쓰다듬기만&n하세요? 포이는 이런 걸로는 만족&n못하- 냐아앙… 핫. 이, 이건 그냥…&n가, 가끔은 이런 것도 나쁘진&n않네요.

1001403577.english: Once in a while, it’s not a bad idea to get intoxicated by the shade of the forest. Commander? Would you like to… enjoy the forest festival with me?
1001403577.korean: 가끔씩은, 숲의 그늘에&n취해보는 것도 나쁘지 않죠.&n사령관님? 저랑 같이… 숲의&n축제를 즐겨보시겠어요?

1001403578.english: This is just cosplay, that's all. If you get so carried away... it's troublesome for me, Commander.
1001403578.korean: 이건 그저, 코스튬 플레이일&n뿐이라구요. 그렇게 과몰입&n하시면... 저도 곤란하다구요&n사령관.

1001403579.english: I prefer being on the move, so I used to head out to the field often. Oh, since we have some time, shall we take a look around together? It’ll be fine as long as you’re with me— Ahaha, are you shy about holding hands? Come on, what’s wrong with being friends? Let’s go!
1001403579.korean: 나는 직접 뛰는 게 더 좋아서 자주&n현장에 나가곤 했어. 아, 시간&n있으니까 같이 주위를 좀 둘러보고&n올까? 나랑 있으면 괜찮- 아하핫,&n손 잡는 거 부끄러워 하는 거야?&n에이, 친구끼리 뭐 어때~ 어서 가자!

1001403580.english: Nya ha ha, we weren't scrapped because we were dangerous. It's just that there was no one who could handle Poi, you know? As for you, Master... I wonder?
1001403580.korean: 냐하핫, 저희는 위험해서 폐기됐던&n게 아니에요. 그냥 포이를&n감당할만한 분이 없었던&n것뿐이거든요? 주인님은…&n어떠려나?

1001403581.english: Ugh, lately I can't think of anything but the Commander... I wasn't like this before... I'm sure I'm possessed by something- Whoa?! S-Commander? Ahaha, it's nothing. Yeah...
1001403581.korean: 으으, 요새 자꾸 사령관 생각밖에&n안 나… 원래 안 이랬는데… 분명&n뭐에 씌인- 우왓?! 사, 사령관?&n아하핫, 아무것도 아냐. 응…

1001403582.english: Master~ Nyahaha, we have to sit facing each other like this so I can smell your scent. And… it also reminds me of last time when Poi fainted… ♡
1001403582.korean: 주인니임~ 냐하핫, 이렇게 마주&n보고 앉아야 주인님의 냄새를 맡을&n수 있으니까요. 그리고… 포이가&n기절해버렸던 저번 일 생각도&n나요…♡

1001403583.english: Ah... what on earth should I use to quench this endless thirst?
1001403583.korean: 아아… 이 끝없는 갈증을 대체&n뭘로 달래면 좋을까요?

1001403584.english: Alvis, really... dressing my sister in stuff like this... and Commander, if you keep teasing me like that, I really won't take care of anything for you!
1001403584.korean: 알비스도 차암... 언니한테&n이런 거나 입히고… 사령관도&n자꾸 그렇게 놀리면, 정말&n아무것도 안 챙겨 드릴 거예요!

1001403585.english: Huh? No, no. Even so, I'm not as smart as the Doctor. Rather than intelligence... yeah. I have insight! Perfect for a detective, right?
1001403585.korean: 응? 아냐아냐. 아무리 그래도 닥터만큼&n똑똑하진 않아. 나는 지능보단… 그래.&n통찰력이 있지! 형사로 완전 딱이지?

1001403586.english: I can't be satisfied with just this much. So please hang in there a little longer, Master♡
1001403586.korean: 저는 이 정도론 만족할 수&n없다구요. 그러니까, 조금만 더&n힘내주세요 주인님♡

1001403587.english: Hmm... Commander. You just got back from hanging out with the others, didn't you? Seven... no, was it eight? You can't fool my eyes. Well, if you love me enough for eight people... I'll forgive you?
1001403587.korean: 으음… 사령관. 지금 다른&n애들이랑 놀고 왔지? 7명... 아니,&n8명인가? 내 눈은 못 속인다구. 뭐,&n8명분 만큼 날 사랑해 주면… 용서,&n해줄게?

1001403588.english: Meow? Poi just chased away the ones who were needlessly draining Master's stamina, that's all. Even just a little— Ah! I, I'm sorry! If you don't do it for that long… Poi will die of loneliness…
1001403588.korean: 냐앙? 포이는 쓸데없이 주인님의&n체력을 축내는 애들을 쫓아냈을&n뿐인데요? 조금이라도- 아앗!&n자, 잘못했어요! 그렇게 오래 안&n해주면… 포이는 외로워서&n죽어버려…

1001403589.english: This outfit, like nature as it is, reveals my body just as it is....
1001403589.korean: 이 옷은, 있는 그대로의&n자연처럼, 제 몸도 있는 그대로&n드러내주죠....

1001403590.english: What?! Here?! Th-that can't be. You'll become a bad commander. Do you understand? Ugh...
1001403590.korean: 네?! 여기서요?! 그, 그러면 안&n돼요. 나쁜 사령관이 된다구요.&n아시겠어요? 우으…

1001403591.english: This is a secret, but back when I was out in the field, I actually grabbed Shirayuri once. Ahahaha. The way she tries so hard to act like she's okay while getting so upset is really— Ah. She's hiding over there, glaring at me!
1001403591.korean: 이건 비밀인데, 예전에 현장 뛸 때&n시라유리를 붙잡은 적도 있었어.&n아하하핫. 애써 괜찮은 척하면서도&n분해하는 게 정말- 앗. 저기 숨어서&n째려보고 있다!

1001403592.english: I bet none of the kids here can beat Poi, right? Nyahaha, it’s not just the battles... but other things too♡
1001403592.korean: 여기 애들은 전부 포이한테 안&n될걸요? 냐하핫, 전투도&n전투인데… 그거 말고 다른&n것도요♡

1001403593.english: Eek?! I told you not to hug me from behind so suddenly like that! To a naughty husband who doesn't listen, it's like this, all ticklish~ Ahaha, I won't let you off the hook even if you surrender~ Shall we stop by the room for a moment...?
1001403593.korean: 꺅?! 그렇게 갑자기 뒤에서 안지&n말랬지! 말 안 듣는 나쁜&n남편한테는 이렇게, 간질간질~&n아하핫, 항복해도 안 봐줄 거라구~&n우리, 잠깐 방에 들를까...?

1001403594.english: Why do you only pet me these days? Poi isn't satisfied with just this— Meow… Hah. Th-this is just… I-something, sometimes this isn't so bad.
1001403594.korean: 요즘은 왜 이렇게 쓰다듬기만&n하세요? 포이는 이런 걸로는 만족&n못하- 냐아앙… 핫. 이, 이건 그냥…&n가, 가끔은 이런 것도 나쁘진&n않네요.

1001403595.english: We are sharing our love in the shade of the forest. Now, first, please relax... and leave everything to me.
1001403595.korean: 숲의 그늘 속에서, 서로 사랑을&n나누는 거예요. 자, 우선 마음을 편안히 하고…&n제게 모든 걸 맡겨주세요.

1001403596.english: Commander? What is it about this outfit that you like so much? Ah, no! I was just… curious…
1001403596.korean: 사령관? 이 옷이 어디가&n그렇게 마음에 드시는 거예요?&n아, 아뇨! 그냥… 궁금… 해서….

1001403597.english: Actually, I don't really like showing off how smart I am. Once people find out... they all keep their distance, saying it gives them the creeps. I like that the Commander is friendly with me even after seeing everything.
1001403597.korean: 사실 머리 좋은 걸 티 내는 건 별로&n안 좋아해. 알게 되면 다들… 소름&n끼친다면서 거리를 두더라구.&n사령관은 다 보고도 친하게&n지내줘서 좋아.

1001403598.english: You're not giving up already, are you? Poi is still overflowing with energy like this~? Ah... Master, you're just an ordinary- in the end- Kyaa? Nyahaha, that's exactly how you should act♡
1001403598.korean: 벌써 포기하시는 건 아니겠죠?&n포이는 아직 이렇게 기운이&n넘치는데요~? 아아… 주인님도&n결국 평범한- 꺅? 냐하핫, 그렇게&n나오셔야죠♡

1001403599.english: Ugh, lately I can't think of anything but the Commander... I wasn't like this before... I'm sure I'm possessed by something- Whoa?! S-Commander? Ahaha, it's nothing. Yeah...
1001403599.korean: 으으, 요새 자꾸 사령관 생각밖에&n안 나… 원래 안 이랬는데… 분명&n뭐에 씌인- 우왓?! 사, 사령관?&n아하핫, 아무것도 아냐. 응…

1001403600.english: Master~ Nyahaha, we have to sit facing each other like this so I can smell your scent. And… it also reminds me of last time when Poi fainted… ♡
1001403600.korean: 주인니임~ 냐하핫, 이렇게 마주&n보고 앉아야 주인님의 냄새를 맡을&n수 있으니까요. 그리고… 포이가&n기절해버렸던 저번 일 생각도&n나요…♡

1001403601.english: I will keep what happens in this forest a secret between the two of us, so please tell me directly what you want, Commander.
1001403601.korean: 이 숲에서 일어나는 일은 우리&n둘만의 비밀로 해드릴 테니,&n사령관님이 원하는 걸 직접&n말해주세요.

1001403602.english: Here?! Oh, no, Commander~ ... What if the kids see this.... What are you going to do....
1001403602.korean: 여기서요?! 아, 안돼요&n사령관~ ... 애들이 보기라도&n하면... 어쩌려구요....

1001403603.english: Shall we go out again today? Then— Eek? I-I don't think we need to hold hands. Lately, when I hold hands with the Commander, I feel kind of self-conscious, or maybe I should say, it feels a little strange… Um, Commander, do you feel that way too…?
1001403603.korean: 오늘도 나갈까? 그럼- 꺅? 소, 손은&n안 잡아도 될 것 같아. 요샌&n사령관이랑 손잡으면 의식하게&n된다고 해야 되나, 조금 이상한&n기분이 들어서… 저기, 사령관도&n그래…?

1001403604.english: Do you know what the meaning of a blue rose is? Nya ha ha, that's right. A miracle. Poi really met Master like a miracle. That's right. Poi… was born to meet Master…
1001403604.korean: 푸른 장미의 꽃말이 뭔지 아세요?&n냐하핫, 맞아요. 기적. 포이는 정말&n기적처럼 주인님을 만났어요.&n맞아. 포이는… 주인님을 만나기&n위해 태어난 거였어….

1001403605.english: Hmm... Commander. You just got back from hanging out with the others, didn't you? Seven... no, was it eight? You can't fool my eyes. Well, if you love me enough for eight people... I'll forgive you?
1001403605.korean: 으음… 사령관. 지금 다른&n애들이랑 놀고 왔지? 7명... 아니,&n8명인가? 내 눈은 못 속인다구. 뭐,&n8명분 만큼 날 사랑해 주면… 용서,&n해줄게?

1001403606.english: Meow? Poi just chased away the ones who were needlessly draining Master's stamina, that's all. Even just a little— Ah! I, I'm sorry! If you don't do it for that long… Poi will die of loneliness…
1001403606.korean: 냐앙? 포이는 쓸데없이 주인님의&n체력을 축내는 애들을 쫓아냈을&n뿐인데요? 조금이라도- 아앗!&n자, 잘못했어요! 그렇게 오래 안&n해주면… 포이는 외로워서&n죽어버려…

1001403607.english: Yes… please come into this forest while keeping that feeling. Now… slowly…
1001403607.korean: 네… 그 기분을 간직한 채, 이&n숲속으로 들어와 주세요. 자…&n천천히….

1001403608.english: Yes, yes, I lost. How could I possibly stop our Commander? But! You have to be careful about the location... You understand, Commander?
1001403608.korean: 네-네 제가 졌어요. 우리&n사령관님을 제가 어떻게&n말리겠어요? 그 대신!&n장소는… 가려서 와 주셔야&n해요. 아셨죠 사령관?

1001403610.english: Nya ha ha. Are you serious? Even if you beg me to stop in the middle... you're saying Poi won't stop?
1001403610.korean: 냐하핫. 진심이에요? 중간에&n그만해달라고 애원하셔도…&n포이는 안 멈출 거라구요?

1001403611.english: Hmph... Commander... W-wait a minute. Not now. Th-that... I feel like it's going to become a habit... Eh? Why, what's wrong? Your gaze is scary- Kyaa?!
1001403611.korean: 하읏… 사령, 관… 자, 잠깐만.&n지금은 안 돼. 그, 그게… 습관, 될&n것 같아서… 엣? 왜, 왜 그래?&n눈빛이 무섭- 꺄앗?!

1001403612.english: Nya ha ha, I'm here... ♡ Poi, I was being a good girl and holding it in... Hurry, hurry...
1001403612.korean: 냐하핫, 왔다아…♡ 포이, 착하게&n참고 있었으니까아… 빨리,&n빨리이…

1001403613.english: Huh? My throat is getting... drier and drier.

1001403614.english: Eek?! Come on, you're going too far, Commander…

1001403615.english: I-It's not because we're friends that I'm letting you. &n Just… just… ugh… just hurry and &n start with a kiss already…
1001403615.korean: 치, 친구라서 허락해 주는거 아니라구.&n그냥… 그냥… 으으… 빨리하던 대로&n키, 키스부터 해줘…

1001403616.english: Haa, haa… Master… &n I love it… so much…

1001403617.english: Haa… Comma-nder… W-Wait. &n Not right now. I-It might become &n a habit… Eh? W-What is it? &n Your eyes are scary—kyaa?!
1001403617.korean: 하읏… 사령, 관… 자, 잠깐만.&n지금은 안 돼. 그, 그게… 습관, 될&n것 같아서… 엣? 왜, 왜 그래?&n눈빛이 무섭- 꺄앗?!

1001403618.english: Nyaahaha, you're here…♡ Poi's been &n so good and patient… Hurry, &n hurryyy…
1001403618.korean: 냐하핫, 왔다아…♡ 포이, 착하게&n참고 있었으니까아… 빨리,&n빨리이…

1001403619.english: Then… shall we finish &n what we started?

1001403620.english: ...I brought all the supplies &n so take your time… come to me slowly…

1001403621.english: This kind of relationship is a bit awkward for me… &n Huh? Of course. I'm not perfect &n at everything. You've seen that &n more than once already.
1001403621.korean: 이런 관계는 처음이라 조금 어색하네…&n응? 당연하지. 나라고 전부 다 잘하는&n건 아니라구. 벌써 몇 번이나… 봤잖아.

1001403622.english: Nyaa… I'm sorryyy… I'll be good &n from now on… so please, do that &n some more…♡
1001403622.korean: 냐아… 죄송해요오… 앞으론 착하게&n굴 테니까… 그거, 더 해줘어…♡

1001403623.english: Even if you don't say it, I &n know exactly how you feel, Commander.
1001403623.korean: 사령관님의 마음은 말하지&n않아도 잘 알고 있다고요.

1001403624.english: Commander? I'm watching you, &n so no looking away. Got that?
1001403624.korean: 사령관? 제가 지켜보고&n있는데 한눈파시면 안 돼요,&n알고 계시죠?

1001403625.english: Your Master's bedroom was quite messy this morning, but... there is no need to worry. It just means you are in good health.
1001403625.korean: 오늘 아침에는 주인님의 침실이&n꽤나 어지럽혀져 있었지만… 신경&n쓰실 필요 없어요. 그건 주인님께서,&n충분히 건강하시다는 뜻이니까요.

1001403626.english: Ah... if only this time with my Master could last forever...
1001403626.korean: 아아… 이렇게 주인님과 함께하는&n시간이, 영원할 수만 있다면….

1001403627.english: As long as I have my subordinates, I will never fall.
1001403627.korean: 내게 수하들이 있는 한, 이&n몸은 절대 쓰러지지 않는다.

1001403628.english: Hey... LRL? If you happen to be there, could you help me out?
1001403628.korean: 저기... LRL? 혹시 거기 있는&n거라면 나 좀 도와줄 수&n있겠니?

1001403629.english: Hehe~ I may look like this, but I'm in charge of supplies, you know? I know exactly how much candy the Commander has on hand. So, hurry up and give me some candy, Commander~.
1001403629.korean: 히~ 이래 보여도 제가 보급&n담당인걸요? 사령관님의 사탕&n보유량 정도는 꿰고 있다구요.&n그러니까, 얼른 사탕 주세요&n사령관님~.

1001403630.english: Sometimes, I imagine our final rest together, Master. ...It will be quiet... and incredibly beautiful...
1001403630.korean: 전 가끔씩, 주인님과의 마지막&n안식을 상상하곤 해요.&n...조용하고… 무척 아름다울 거예요….

1001403631.english: Are you talking about your confession, Master? It was truly perfect. So much so that it made me feel proud.
1001403631.korean: 주인님의 고백 말씀이신가요?&n정말 완벽했답니다. 제가 뿌듯한&n기분이 들 정도로요.

1001403632.english: Yes, I serve only Lord Faucre the Great Demon King.
1001403632.korean: 그래, 이 몸은 오직 뽀끄루&n대마왕님만을 모신다.

1001403633.english: My chest feels so tight... I wish someone would come and relieve this...
1001403633.korean: 가슴이 너무 답답하다... 누가&n와서 이걸 좀 풀어줬으면….

1001403634.english: Even if I explained the origin of Halloween, you would surely find it boring, Commander... so how about a scary story?
1001403634.korean: 할로윈의 유래 같은 걸&n설명해드려도, 분명 사령관님은&n지루해 하실 테니… 무서운&n이야기는~ 어때요?

1001403635.english: I was created to care for only you, Master, from cradle to grave.
1001403635.korean: 저는 요람에서 무덤까지 오직&n주인님만을 보살펴 드리기 위해&n만들어졌지요.

1001403636.english: Are you talking about the second generation? Th-that... it's still... too early for you, Master... Actually, it's just that I want to look only at you, Master.
1001403636.korean: 2세 말씀이신가요? 그, 그건…&n주인님께는 아직... 일러요… 실은,&n제가 주인님만 바라보고 싶은&n것뿐이지만요.

1001403637.english: With the magical girls' insignificant magical power, they cannot stop the advance of the Great Demon King and the Demon King's army.
1001403637.korean: 마법 소녀들의 하찮은&n마력으로는, 대마왕님과 마왕&n군의 진격을 막을 수 없다.

1001403638.english: Uh, oh my? You said it's the Commander? But why... why are you just watching...?
1001403638.korean: 어, 어머? 사령관 님이시라고요?&n그런데 어째서... 계속 보고만 계신&n거죠...?

1001403639.english: Nymph said that I could get tons of snacks on Halloween, but what the Commander gave me is enough for me.
1001403639.korean: 님프 언니가 할로윈엔&n군것질거리를 엄-청 얻을 수&n있다고 했지만, 저는 사령관님이&n주신 걸로 충분해요.

1001403640.english: I never thought I would be using your bedroom... but I'm glad to hear you were satisfied.
1001403640.korean: 주인님의 침실을 제가 사용하게 될&n줄은... 그래도 주인님께서&n만족하셨다니 다행이에요.

1001403641.english: Ah... if only this time with my Master could last forever...
1001403641.korean: 아아… 이렇게 주인님과 함께하는&n시간이, 영원할 수만 있다면….

1001403642.english: As long as I have my subordinates, I will never fall.
1001403642.korean: 내게 수하들이 있는 한, 이&n몸은 절대 쓰러지지 않는다.

1001403643.english: So you mean it's fine just the way it is... Uh... um, I understand... If you like it, Master... I like it too.
1001403643.korean: 이대로 좋다는 게... 으… 음,&n알겠어요… 주인님이 좋다면…&n저도 좋아요.

1001403644.english: Commander? If you take it lightly just because it’s a single candy, it’s bound to cause supply disruptions. So, you must give them sparingly, even if it’s just one candy. Understood, Commander?
1001403644.korean: 사령관님? 겨우 사탕 하나라고&n가볍게 여기시면, 보급에 차질이&n생기기 마련이라구요. 그러니,&n사탕 하나라도 아껴서 주셔야 해요&n아셨죠 사령관님?

1001403645.english: To think I can watch Master grow like this right by my side... Is there anything happier than this?
1001403645.korean: 주인님이 이렇게 성장하는 모습을&n곁에서 지켜볼 수 있다니... 이보다&n행복한 일이 또 있을까요?

1001403646.english: Are you talking about your confession, Master? It was truly perfect. So much so that it made me feel proud.
1001403646.korean: 주인님의 고백 말씀이신가요?&n정말 완벽했답니다. 제가 뿌듯한&n기분이 들 정도로요.

1001403647.english: Yes, I serve only Lord Faucre the Great Demon King.
1001403647.korean: 그래, 이 몸은 오직 뽀끄루&n대마왕님만을 모신다.

1001403648.english: Getting used to things is a little scary. I... I might have opened my eyes to something.
1001403648.korean: 익숙해진다는 건, 조금 무섭네요&n저... 뭔가에 눈떠버렸을지도&n모르겠어요.

1001403649.english: Yes, I've always wanted to hang out and have fun with you sisters like this at least once. Thank you so much for always looking out for me, Commander.
1001403649.korean: 네, 저도 한 번쯤은 이렇게&n언니들이랑 같이 어울려 놀고&n싶었어요. 늘 이렇게 신경&n써주셔서 정말 고맙습니다&n사령관님.

1001403650.english: I didn't realize it. That this moment, spent laughing with my Master like this, is far more precious than spending eternity together in silence…
1001403650.korean: 저는 미처 몰랐어요. 침묵 속에서&n영원을 같이 하는 것보다, 이렇게&n주인님과 웃으며 보내는 이 순간이&n훨씬 더 소중하다는 것을요….

1001403651.english: Are you talking about the second generation? Th-that... it's still... too early for you, Master... Actually, it's just that I want to look only at you, Master.
1001403651.korean: 2세 말씀이신가요? 그, 그건…&n주인님께는 아직... 일러요… 실은,&n제가 주인님만 바라보고 싶은&n것뿐이지만요.

1001403652.english: With the magical girls' insignificant magical power, they cannot stop the advance of the Great Demon King and the Demon King's army.
1001403652.korean: 마법 소녀들의 하찮은&n마력으로는, 대마왕님과 마왕&n군의 진격을 막을 수 없다.

1001403653.english: I really like my owner who loves me no matter what I look like.
1001403653.korean: 제가 어떤 모습이든 좋아해&n주는 주인님이 저도 정말&n좋아요.

1001403654.english: I don't mind the candy now, so could you hold my hand and spend Halloween with me today? I-I know you're busy, but... just for a day... wouldn't that be okay...?
1001403654.korean: 이제 사탕은 괜찮으니, 오늘은&n저랑 같이 손잡고 할로윈을&n보내주실 수 있나요? 바, 바쁘신 건&n알지만 ...하루 정도라면... 괜찮지…&n않을까요?

1001403655.english: Yes... if it’s okay with me, please do as you wish, Master.
1001403655.korean: 네... 저라도 괜찮다면 주인님이&n원하시는 대로 해주세요.

1001403656.english: If you promise not to push yourself too hard… I’ll gladly…

1001403657.english: Uh... um... you are helping out... right?

1001403658.english: Sorry I didn't notice sooner &n I'll hurry and get ready, so please &n wait just a bit, Master.
1001403658.korean: 미리 알아채지 못해 죄송해요&n서둘러 준비할 테니 조금만 기다려&n주세요 주인님.

1001403659.english: If you promise you won't overdo it… &n Then gladly…

1001403660.english: Hmm... Even if you're rougher, &n I'll be fine.

1001403661.english: For you to grow into such a responsible &n adult, Master, I truly…
1001403661.korean: 주인님이 이렇게 책임감 있는&n어른으로 성장하셔서, 전 정말….

1001403662.english: Together again today… Please come &n a little closer, Master.
1001403662.korean: 오늘도 함께군요… 좀 더&n가까이 다가와 주세요 주인님.

1001403663.english: Hm? You're asking if work is hard? &n You don't need to worry. &n I'm already… relying plenty &n on you, Commander.
1001403663.korean: 네? 업무가 힘들지 않냐고요? 그런&n걱정은 하지 않으셔도 돼요. 전&n지금도... 사령관님께 충분히&n기대고 있는걸요?

1001403664.english: Since way back... I’ve wished I had a younger sibling. Just... Ah, please don't take it to heart.
1001403664.korean: 옛날부터... 동생이 있었으면 하고&n바라는 생각이 있었습니다. 그냥…&n아, 마음에 두진 마십시오.

1001403665.english: Is this the joy of being a woman? Every time I fall asleep with you, Commander... would you please let me know more in the future?
1001403665.korean: 이게 여성으로서의 기쁨, 일까요.&n사령관님과 함께 잠들 때마다…&n앞으로도 더, 알려주시겠습니까?

1001403666.english: Your Excellency, since ancient times, morality has not necessarily been a virtue for those in high positions. I hope you keep this in mind.
1001403666.korean: 각하, 옛적부터 높은 분들은 꼭&n도덕적인 것이 미덕이&n아니었습니다. 알아두셨으면&n합니다.

1001403667.english: ...I have finally come to feel with my heart what I only knew with my head. This feeling I get when I am by your side, Commander... was 'affection'.
1001403667.korean: ...머리로만 알던 것을 이제야&n가슴으로 느끼게 되었습니다.&n사령관님 곁에 있을 때 느껴지는&n이것이… ‘애정’ 이었군요.

1001403668.english: Your Excellency, if you have the time... would you like to have some coffee and share what is on our minds?
1001403668.korean: 각하, 시간이 되시면... 커피를&n마시며 마음속의 이야기를 하시지&n않으시겠습니까?

1001403669.english: Even after being restored, I didn't attach much meaning to my life. B-but... no. I just wanted to tell you this. That I truly love you.
1001403669.korean: 복원되고 나서도, 저는 제 삶에 큰&n의미를 두지 않았습니다. 하,&n하지만… 아닙니다. 그저 이&n말씀을 드리고 싶었습니다. 정말로&n사랑, 한다구요.

1001403670.english: Since way back... I’ve wished I had a younger sibling. Just... Ah, please don't take it to heart.
1001403670.korean: 옛날부터... 동생이 있었으면 하고&n바라는 생각이 있었습니다. 그냥…&n아, 마음에 두진 마십시오.

1001403671.english: Is this the joy of being a woman? Every time I fall asleep with you, Commander... would you please let me know more in the future?
1001403671.korean: 이게 여성으로서의 기쁨, 일까요.&n사령관님과 함께 잠들 때마다…&n앞으로도 더, 알려주시겠습니까?

1001403672.english: Your Excellency, since ancient times, morality has not necessarily been a virtue for those in high positions. I hope you keep this in mind.
1001403672.korean: 각하, 옛적부터 높은 분들은 꼭&n도덕적인 것이 미덕이&n아니었습니다. 알아두셨으면&n합니다.

1001403673.english: ...I have finally come to feel with my heart what I only knew with my head. This feeling I get when I am by your side, Commander... was 'affection'.
1001403673.korean: ...머리로만 알던 것을 이제야&n가슴으로 느끼게 되었습니다.&n사령관님 곁에 있을 때 느껴지는&n이것이… ‘애정’ 이었군요.

1001403674.english: Your Excellency, if you have the time... would you like to have some coffee and share what is on our minds?
1001403674.korean: 각하, 시간이 되시면... 커피를&n마시며 마음속의 이야기를 하시지&n않으시겠습니까?

1001403675.english: Even after being restored, I didn't attach much meaning to my life. B-but... no. I just wanted to tell you this. That I truly love you.
1001403675.korean: 복원되고 나서도, 저는 제 삶에 큰&n의미를 두지 않았습니다. 하,&n하지만… 아닙니다. 그저 이&n말씀을 드리고 싶었습니다. 정말로&n사랑, 한다구요.

1001403676.english: Anywhere is fine. If Your Excellency wishes…

1001403677.english: P-Commander, wait a moment... I feel like this is becoming a habit... Are you going to take responsibility...? Then, a little more...
1001403677.korean: 사, 사령관님 잠깐, 만… 그게,&n습관이 되어버릴 것만 같아서…&n책임져, 주시는 건가요…? 그러면,&n좀 더…

1001403678.english: Anywhere is fine. If Your Excellency &n wishes it…

1001403679.english: C-Commander, just a moment… I-I think &n it'll become a habit… &n Will you take responsibility…? Then &n maybe… a bit more…
1001403679.korean: 사, 사령관님 잠깐, 만… 그게,&n습관이 되어버릴 것만 같아서…&n책임져, 주시는 건가요…? 그러면,&n좀 더…

1001403680.english: Not all of PECS's secretaries follow Omega. There are sisters who rebel, and sisters who follow out of necessity.
1001403680.korean: PECS의 비서들이 전부 오메가를&n따르는 건 아니에요. 반기를 드는&n자매도, 어쩔 수 없이 따르는&n자매도 있죠.

1001403681.english: The Orca... even though it is old, it is in such good condition that it doesn't need any special repairs. I can tell how much care and affection the people in charge have put into their work.
1001403681.korean: 오르카 호… 오래됐는데도 특별히&n손볼 필요가 없을 정도로 상태가&n좋아요. 지금껏 담당하신 분들이&n얼마나 애정을 갖고 일하셨는지&n알겠어요.

1001403682.english: Master, serving meals— Master. Serving is a natural right as your servant. Even if you command me to stop, I will not listen to that.
1001403682.korean: 주인님, 식사 시중이- 주인님.&n시중은 주인님의 종으로서 당연한&n권리에요. 설령 주인님께서&n그만두라고 명령하셔도, 저는&n그것만큼은 듣지 않겠어요.

1001403683.english: What do you think of my collection? When I was making that Tyrant model, I was super— Ah, sorry. I got excited without realizing it. If you're interested, maybe next time… would you like to build a Lamparion model together?
1001403683.korean: 제 컬렉션을 본 감상은 어때요?&n그 타이런트 모형을 만들때는 엄청-&n아, 미안해요. 저도 모르게 흥분&n했네요. 관심있으면 다음에…&n램파리온 모형, 같이 만들어볼래요?

1001403684.english: If I had to choose… I suppose it’s the white one, right? I mean my dress, Commander. Hmm~ You weren't thinking of anything else, were you?
1001403684.korean: 굳이 고르라면… 역시, 흰 쪽&n이겠죠? 제 드레스 말예요&n사령관님. 음~ 다른걸 떠올리신건&n아니시죠?

1001403685.english: Hey~? As expected... it's the Black... side, right? Ah, no, I mean, what I mean is... ... Ugh...
1001403685.korean: 저기~? 역시... 검은… 쪽이지?&n아, 아니, 그러니까, 내 말은…&n… 으….

1001403686.english: To think you would resurrect those old, twisted specters... you really aren't in your right mind. When I think about what my Creator, Dr. Anna, went through at their hands...
1001403686.korean: 그 늙어 비틀어진 망령들을&n부활시키겠다니, 정말 제정신이&n아니에요. 제 창조주이신 안나&n박사님이 그들에게 당한 걸&n생각하면…

1001403687.english: It's something I hear a lot. That they don't know what I'm thinking. Actually, I'm not really thinking about anything...
1001403687.korean: 많이 듣는 소리에요. 무슨 생각을&n하는지 모르겠다는 거. 사실 별생각&n안 하고 있는데…

1001403688.english: Master, please make full use of this lowly person. From trivial errands to official duties, to service... anything at all is an unparalleled joy to me.
1001403688.korean: 주인님. 부디 비천한 저를&n마음껏 사용해주세요.&n사소한 심부름부터 업무,&n봉사… 어떤 것이라도 제겐&n더없는 기쁨이에요.

1001403689.english: That one tracksuit is enough for my personal time, isn't it? ...You say it's too worn out? Hmm... Alright. I'll go see Audrey as you suggested. Which one do you think would suit me?
1001403689.korean: 개인 시간엔 그 운동복 한 벌이면&n충분한데요? ...너무 낡았다구요?&n음… 알았어요. 당신 말대로&n오드리한테 가볼게요.&n어떤 게 어울릴 것 같아요?

1001403690.english: Is it inevitable that your eyes are drawn to me, even to the Commander?
1001403690.korean: 제게 눈길이 가는 건, 아무리&n사령관님이라 해도 어쩔 수 없는&n걸까요?

1001403691.english: You? I wish you'd look over here, too. Uh, huh? You were secretly… peeking? Hmph! Anyway, you're good with words…
1001403691.korean: 당신? 여기도 좀 봐줬으면&n좋겠는데? 으, 응? 몰래…&n훔쳐보고 있었다고?&n흥! 하여튼, 말은 잘 해요…

1001403692.english: I won't ask you to trust me right away. You can keep an eye on me if you want. However, please feel free to use my hacking skills as you see fit, Commander. They will definitely be helpful.
1001403692.korean: 바로 믿어달라고는 하지 않을게요.&n감시를 붙이셔도 좋아요. 다만, 제&n해킹 능력은 사령관님 마음대로 써&n주세요. 분명히 도움이 될 거예요.

1001403693.english: I think the equipment for the AGS and Bioroids could be improved a bit. As for the Commander's... hmm, I just had a good idea.
1001403693.korean: AGS나 바이오로이드들의 장비들은&n조금 개선할 수 있을 것 같네요.&n사령관님 것도… 음, 좋은 생각이&n났어요.

1001403694.english: Here is the revised operation plan. After you review it, please prepare for a meeting with the unit members. And… oh… so you wanted to volunteer rather than work. Could you please sit down for a moment? We’ll have to… postpone the schedule a little.
1001403694.korean: 여기, 작전계획 수정안이에요.&n확인하신 후엔 부대원 면담이 있으니&n준비해주세요. 그리고… 어머…&n업무가 아니라 봉사를 원하셨군요.&n잠깐 앉아주시겠어요? 일정은&n조금… 미뤄야겠네요.

1001403695.english: Even if I don't show it outwardly, I tell you everything, don't I? Personally, I think my way of expressing myself is clear... Ah, that... I... I, love... This is a bit embarrassing. Instead... you do it for me.
1001403695.korean: 겉으로 안 드러내도, 당신한텐 전부&n말해주잖아요? 개인적으론 의사 표현이&n확실하다고 생각하는데… 아, 그건…&n사… 사, 사랑… 이건 좀 부끄럽네요.&n대신… 당신이 나한테 해줘요.

1001403696.english: Do I... really have to throw the bouquet? Or, just... ah, ahaha... You didn't... hear all of that...
1001403696.korean: 부케를... 꼭 던져야 하는 걸까?&n아니면, 그냥… 아, 아하하…&n설마… 그걸 다 들으신 건….

1001403697.english: … That’s too much… You even dressed me in a dress like this, and now you’re going to keep making me worry?
1001403697.korean: … 너무해… 이렇게 드레스까지&n입혀놓고, 자꾸 걱정 시킬 거야?

1001403698.english: Did the bioroids I sent help the resistance? Before, that was the only way I could help, but now I can step forward myself.
1001403698.korean: 제가 보낸 바이오로이드들은 저항군에&n보탬이 됐나요? 전에는 그런 식으로&n밖에 도움을 못 드렸지만, 이젠 제가&n직접 나설 수 있어요.

1001403699.english: For now, I am a 'Deconstructor,' but that is limited to Ironworm (Iron Bugs). I am confident in anything related to machinery, so feel free to leave it to me.
1001403699.korean: 일단은 ‘해체자’이긴 한데, 이건&n철충 한정이에요. 기계에 관련한 건&n뭐든 자신 있으니까. 얼마든지&n맡겨줘요.

1001403700.english: Master, serving meals— Master. Serving is a natural right as your servant. Even if you command me to stop, I will not listen to that.
1001403700.korean: 주인님, 식사 시중이- 주인님.&n시중은 주인님의 종으로서 당연한&n권리에요. 설령 주인님께서&n그만두라고 명령하셔도, 저는&n그것만큼은 듣지 않겠어요.

1001403701.english: What do you think of my collection? When I was making that Tyrant model, I was super— Ah, sorry. I got excited without realizing it. If you're interested, maybe next time… would you like to build a Lamparion model together?
1001403701.korean: 제 컬렉션을 본 감상은 어때요?&n그 타이런트 모형을 만들때는 엄청-&n아, 미안해요. 저도 모르게 흥분&n했네요. 관심있으면 다음에…&n램파리온 모형, 같이 만들어볼래요?

1001403702.english: I can be as soft as I want in front of someone I like, you know. Would you like to... check it out?
1001403702.korean: 저도 좋아하는 사람 앞에선,&n얼마든지 부드러워질 수 있다구요.&n한 번... 확인해보실래요?

1001403703.english: It seems like you've been forgetting something lately... I'm... a little taller, you know? ... You? Do you really have to measure that right now?
1001403703.korean: 당신 요즘… 뭔가 잊고 있는 것&n같아서 말인데… 내가… 조금 더&n크거든? …당신? 그걸 지금 꼭&n재 봐야겠어?

1001403704.english: I have had several opportunities to take control of the Orca and its crew. That is because the Commander, who will be my new master, does not want it.
1001403704.korean: 지금껏 몇 번이나 오르카 호와,&n대원들의 통제권을 가져올 기회가&n있었어요. 제 새로운 주인님이 되실&n사령관님이 원하지 않으시니까요.

1001403705.english: Stop messing around with my hair and take this. I’ve tweaked the Commander’s weapon a bit. In addition to the existing features, it now supports an Augmented Reality HUD, memos, and music playback.
1001403705.korean: 제 머리카락으로 장난 그만 치고,&n이거 받아요. 사령관의 무기를 좀&n손봤어요. 기존 기능에 더해서&n증강현실 HUD에, 메모, 음악&n재생까지 가능해요.

1001403706.english: Master, please make full use of this lowly person. From trivial errands to official duties, to service... anything at all is an unparalleled joy to me.
1001403706.korean: 주인님. 부디 비천한 저를&n마음껏 사용해주세요.&n사소한 심부름부터 업무,&n봉사… 어떤 것이라도 제겐&n더없는 기쁨이에요.

1001403707.english: That one tracksuit is enough for my personal time, isn't it? ...You say it's too worn out? Hmm... Alright. I'll go see Audrey as you suggested. Which one do you think would suit me?
1001403707.korean: 개인 시간엔 그 운동복 한 벌이면&n충분한데요? ...너무 낡았다구요?&n음… 알았어요. 당신 말대로&n오드리한테 가볼게요.&n어떤 게 어울릴 것 같아요?

1001403708.english: When you wear this, it just makes me look forward to it... So please don't keep me waiting too long, Commander.
1001403708.korean: 이렇게 입고 있으면, 자꾸&n기대하게 된다구요… 그러니까,&n너무 오래 기다리게 하진 말아&n주세요 사령관님.

1001403709.english: Uh, huh? Do you really have to make me do it here? Ah, alright! I can… just do it… I… I love you too, Commander.
1001403709.korean: 으, 응? 꼭 여기서 시켜야겠어?&n아, 알았어! 하면… 되잖아…&n나도… 좋아해 사령관.

1001403710.english: Ah... why didn't I know this? You are truly our master. If the other sisters meet you, I'm sure they will think the same way I do.
1001403710.korean: 아아… 어째서 이걸 몰랐을까요?&n사령관님이야말로 진정한 저희의&n주인님이에요. 다른 자매들도&n사령관님을 만난다면, 분명 저와&n같은 생각을 할 거예요.

1001403711.english: I was just… thinking about what to eat later. Commander, would you like to come along? Or we can eat together in my room. I'll cook for you.
1001403711.korean: 그냥… 이따 뭐 먹을지 생각하고&n있었어요. 사령관도 같이 갈래요?&n아니면 제 방에서 같이 먹어도&n되구요. 제가 해줄게요.

1001403712.english: Here is the revised operation plan. After you review it, please prepare for a meeting with the unit members. And… oh… so you wanted to volunteer rather than work. Could you please sit down for a moment? We’ll have to… postpone the schedule a little.
1001403712.korean: 여기, 작전계획 수정안이에요.&n확인하신 후엔 부대원 면담이 있으니&n준비해주세요. 그리고… 어머…&n업무가 아니라 봉사를 원하셨군요.&n잠깐 앉아주시겠어요? 일정은&n조금… 미뤄야겠네요.

1001403713.english: Even if I don't show it outwardly, I tell you everything, don't I? Personally, I think my way of expressing myself is clear... Ah, that... I... I, love... This is a bit embarrassing. Instead... you do it for me.
1001403713.korean: 겉으로 안 드러내도, 당신한텐 전부&n말해주잖아요? 개인적으론 의사 표현이&n확실하다고 생각하는데… 아, 그건…&n사… 사, 사랑… 이건 좀 부끄럽네요.&n대신… 당신이 나한테 해줘요.

1001403714.english: *Yawn*... Are you just going to keep watching like that? Or... shall I come over first, Commander?
1001403714.korean: 하암… 계속 그렇게 보고만 계실&n거예요? 아니면… 제가 먼저&n갈까요 사령관님?

1001403715.english: You... you aren't thinking about other kids after coming all the way here, are you? Okay, I'm sorry for doubting you.
1001403715.korean: 당신… 여기까지 와서 다른 애들&n생각하고 있는 건 아니지? 알았어&n의심해서 미안해 당신.

1001403716.english: Now, could you please wait a moment? We were each created to correspond to one of the seven deadly sins. I, Alpha... Lust. So...
1001403716.korean: 자, 잠깐만 기다려주시겠어요?&n저희들은 각각 7대 죄악에 대응되게&n만들어졌어요. 저, 알파는... 색욕.&n그래서…

1001403717.english: It doesn't really matter, but... are you by any chance the type to communicate with your body?
1001403717.korean: 별로 상관은 없는데… 혹시&n몸으로 대화하는 타입?

1001403718.english: So you are determined to turn me into a beast...? Fine. If Master wishes... Hehe, hehehehe... as much as you want.
1001403718.korean: 기어코 저를 짐승으로&n만들려고 하시는군요…?&n좋아요. 주인님께서&n바라신다면… 후후,&n후후후후... 얼마든지.

1001403719.english: You've gotten much more relaxed lately, haven't you? As for me, if I let my guard down even a little—Hmph?! … Don't do that. Take your time, and take your time. Got it?
1001403719.korean: 요새 부쩍 여유있어졌네요?&n저는 조금만 긴장을 풀면-&n하읏?! …그러지 마요. 천천히,&n오랫동안. 알았죠?

1001403720.english: Aren't you being a bit too bold? Well... I don't really dislike that side of you, Commander.
1001403720.korean: 너무 대담하신 거 아녜요?&n뭐… 사령관님의 그런 점이…&n그렇게 싫진 않네요.

1001403721.english: What do you mean you can't stand it, really...

1001403722.english: Ugh… P-Please… If you keep doing &n that, my reason… I might become nothing &n but a beast chasing instincts…
1001403722.korean: 읏… 부, 부탁드려요. 계속 그러시면&n제 이성이… 본능만 좇는 짐승이,&n되어버릴 수는…

1001403723.english: You want to do it? Then don't cling &n to me like that. Let me take off my suit. &n Just a second. Okay?
1001403723.korean: 할래요? 그렇게 달라붙지 마요.&n슈트 벗을 테니까 잠깐만.&n알았죠?

1001403724.english: You're really trying to &n turn me into a beast, huh…? &n Fine. If that's what you want, &n Master… Fufu, &n fufufufu… As much as you'd like.
1001403724.korean: 기어코 저를 짐승으로&n만들려고 하시는군요…?&n좋아요. 주인님께서&n바라신다면… 후후,&n후후후후... 얼마든지.

1001403725.english: You've been acting so relaxed lately? &n Just loosening up a little for me and— &n Hngh?! Don't do that. Slowly, &n and for a long time. Got it?
1001403725.korean: 요새 부쩍 여유있어졌네요?&n저는 조금만 긴장을 풀면-&n하읏?! …그러지 마요. 천천히,&n오랫동안. 알았죠?

1001403726.english: If you do that all of a sudden, it'll &n startle me too, Commander… We've got time, &n so just a bit… slower…
1001403726.korean: 갑자기 그러시면, 저도 놀란다구요&n사령관님…. 시간 많으니까,&n조금만… 천천히…

1001403727.english: Weren't you supposed to start with a kiss first? &n Ah, fine… Do it your way…
1001403727.korean: 키스 먼저… 해주는 거 아니었어?&n아, 알겠어… 당신 마음대로 해….

1001403728.english: My lord, my dear lord… For my foolish &n sisters… please bestow punishment and &n teachings upon them.
1001403728.korean: 주인님, 나의 주인님… 어리석은&n제 자매들을 위해... 부디 벌과&n가르침을 내려주세요.

1001403729.english: Last night was that good? I can tell exactly &n what you're thinking. &n ...How was I, you ask? &n Hmm… Guess for yourself.
1001403729.korean: 어젯밤이 그렇게 좋았어요?&n무슨 생각 하는지 다 보여요.&n...저는 어땠냐구요?&n음… 당신이 맞춰봐요.

1001403730.english: Hm? You mean during the vow? Well… &n You suddenly kissed me, so I was a bit &n surprised, but still… it felt really… &n really good.
1001403730.korean: 네? 서약 때 말씀이세요? 그야&n뭐… 갑자기 키스하셔서, 조금&n놀라긴 했지만, 그래도… 엄청…&n기분 좋았어요.

1001403731.english: What happened yesterday stays in the past… Today… &n what are you planning? What? I-I wasn't &n looking forward to it or anything?!
1001403731.korean: 어제 일은 어제 일이고… 오늘은…&n어떻게 할 생각이야? 뭐? 기,&n기대한 거 아니거든?!

1001403732.english: I'll do my best at anything to be of help to the others and the Commander, even outside of combat! ...Huh? Uh, I mean... like cleaning, or making the bed...
1001403732.korean: 전투 말고도 다른 분들과 사령관님에게&n도움이 될 수 있도록 뭐든지 열심히 할게요!&n...네? 그, 그러니까…&n청소라던가, 이불 정리라던가...

1001403733.english: I like playing board games and talking with the Commander the most, then drinking warm Elven Milk and going to sleep. Because when we sleep together... the Commander holds me tight even in my sleep.
1001403733.korean: 사령관님하고 보드 게임하고, 이야기하다가,&n따뜻한 엘븐 밀크를 마시고 자는게 제일 좋아요.&n같이 자면… 잠결에도 사령관님이 절 꼭&n안아주시니까요.

1001403734.english: I'm a detective by profession, so I should always carry handcuffs. Huh? No, no~ These are real handcuffs, so the Commander— ...Huh? If it's the Commander, is it okay?
1001403734.korean: 명색이 형산데 수갑은 항상 챙겨다녀야지. 응?&n안돼, 안돼~ 이거 진짜 수갑이라 사령관은-&n...어라? 사령관이면 괜찮은건가?

1001403735.english: Look. It’s still a bit awkward, but I can move it all just like my own body. Since the artificial nerves are connected to the module—it’s all written on your face what you’re thinking. Do you want to taste the thrill?
1001403735.korean: 봐. 아직 어색하긴 해도 전부 내 몸처럼&n움직일 수 있어. 인공신경이 모듈에 연결돼서-&n무슨 생각인지 얼굴에 다 티나네.&n짜릿한 맛을 보고 싶어?

1001403736.english: If the Great Demon King is left as she is, the magical girls will fall into corruption. Gentleman, I will serve as your attendant, so please guide the magical girls onto the right path.
1001403736.korean: 대마왕을 그대로 둔다면 마법소녀들이 타락하고&n말겁니다. 젠틀맨, 제가 보좌할테니 부디&n마법소녀들을 올바른 길로 이끌어 주십시오.

1001403737.english: I rely on equipment for most of my abilities, so my body is weak. Still, I can do simple things.
1001403737.korean: 전 능력 대부분을 장비에 의존해서 몸이 약해요.&n그, 그래도 간단한 것 정도는 할 수 있어요.

1001403738.english: I'm trying to live for myself, just as you said, Commander. So… ah, please hug me…!
1001403738.korean: 사령관님 말씀대로 저를 위해서 살아보려고&n하고 있어요. 그러니까…&n아, 안아주세요…!

1001403739.english: How do I look? Does it suit me? Hehe, thanks~ ...Huh? The inside? Hmm... Should I show you just a little bit, Commander?
1001403739.korean: 나 어때? 잘 어울려? 헤헷, 고마워~ ...응? 안쪽?&n음… 사령관한테만 살짝, 보여줄까?

1001403740.english: Horns? Why horns... Ha. Do you think I would let you treat me like an object? No matter who you are, Commander, I won't tolerate that.
1001403740.korean: 뿔? 뿔이 왜… 하. 나를 그렇게 물건처럼&n다루게 둘 것 같아? 아무리 사령관이라도&n그런 건 용납 못 해.

1001403741.english: Stopping the wicked Great Demon King, the Four Heavenly Kings, and their subordinate Demon Army. This, too, is an honorable mission.
1001403741.korean: 흉악한 대마왕과 사대천왕들,&n그리고 그 휘하의 마왕군을 막는 것.&n이것 또한 명예로운 임무입니다.

1001403742.english: I like this board game because it holds memories for me. I have fond memories of playing it with the researchers back in the day... Um, Commander. If you don't mind, would you like to play together...?
1001403742.korean: 이 보드 게임엔 추억이 담겨 있어서 좋아해요.&n예전에 연구원 분들이랑 즐겁게 했던 기억이&n있어서… 저, 사령관님.&n괜찮으시면 같이 하실래요...?

1001403743.english: Please keep it a secret from everyone else that I'm acting like this. Um, well... it's because I want to have a secret that only the two of us know, Commander.
1001403743.korean: 제가 이렇게 어리광 부리는 건 다른 분들한테는&n비밀로 해주세요. 음, 그게… 사령관님이랑&n단 둘이서만 알고 있는 비밀을, 갖고 싶어서요.

1001403744.english: I’m going on a date today. Ahaha. I’ve thought of a lot of things, so don’t get tired and make sure you follow along well, okay?
1001403744.korean: 오늘은 데이트를 하겠습니다. 아하핫.&n이것저것 생각해둔 게 많으니까,&n지치지 말고 잘 따라와야 돼?

1001403745.english: I'm not interested in the Great Demon King or whatever, but there's no way I'd turn down a deal that can inflict more intense pain.
1001403745.korean: 대마왕이니 뭐니 하는 건 관심 없지만,&n더 강렬한 고통을 줄 수 있다는데 마다할리가 없지.

1001403746.english: This form of Lineritter, of which there was only one in the past, achieved numerous military feats in the ensuing war. As expected... the presence or absence of a charge was what mattered.
1001403746.korean: 과거에 단 한 개체 있었던 이 형태의 라인리터는&n이어지는 전쟁에서 수많은 전공을 올렸습니다.&n역시... 돌격의 유무가 중요한 것이었군요.

1001403747.english: I helped the maids after work yesterday. And today, I was supposed to help the kitchen staff— No, actually. It's something I want to do, you know?
1001403747.korean: 어제 일과 후엔 메이드 분들 일을 도와드렸어요.&n그리고 오늘은 주방 분들을 도와드리기로-&n아니에요. 제가 하고 싶어서 하는 일인걸요?

1001403748.english: I like playing board games and talking with the Commander the most, then drinking warm Elven Milk and going to sleep. Because when we sleep together... the Commander holds me tight even in my sleep.
1001403748.korean: 사령관님하고 보드 게임하고, 이야기하다가,&n따뜻한 엘븐 밀크를 마시고 자는게 제일 좋아요.&n같이 자면… 잠결에도 사령관님이 절 꼭&n안아주시니까요.

1001403749.english: Eh? Handcuffs on me…?! W-wait— I, I’ve only ever put them on, never been on the receiving end, so... well, if I get taken advantage of while tied up by the Commander— Kyaaa~
1001403749.korean: 엣. 수갑을 나한테…?! 자, 잠깐-&n저, 저는채워만봤지당한적은없어서그게말이죠&n사령관한테묶인채로당해버리면- 꺄아~

1001403750.english: Okay, I get it. If it's just a little bit, I can touch it— Hyaat?! … … Th- I was just surprised because it's an unfamiliar sensation.
1001403750.korean: 알았어, 알았다고. 조금만이라면 만져봐도 좋-&n햐앗?! ……그, 그냥 익숙하지 않은 감각이라&n놀랐을 뿐이야.

1001403751.english: Commander. Um, tonight too… Yes! I’ll be right back after changing into my pajamas.
1001403751.korean: 사령관님. 저기, 오늘 밤에도… 네!&n금방 가서 잠옷으로 갈아입고 올게요.

1001403752.english: I'm trying to live for myself, just as you said, Commander. So… ah, please hug me…!
1001403752.korean: 사령관님 말씀대로 저를 위해서 살아보려고&n하고 있어요. 그러니까…&n아, 안아주세요…!

1001403753.english: You couldn't hang out much when you were Watson because of the cases, right? Now that you have plenty of time, I want to try all sorts of things with you. So, first up is...
1001403753.korean: 사령관이 왓슨일때는 사건 때문에 많이&n못 놀았잖아? 이젠 시간도 많겠다, 사령관이랑&n이것저것 해보고 싶어. 그럼, 첫번째로는...

1001403754.english: How about that? Want me to give you a taste? … Don't be so scared. We agreed to only do that at night, didn't we? … Wait. Come to think of it, it seems like the Commander has been the only one getting excited lately...
1001403754.korean: 어때? 어디 한 번 맛 좀 보여줄까? …그렇게&n겁먹지 마. 그런 건 밤에만 하기로 정해놨잖아?&n...잠깐. 그러고보니 요새는 너무 사령관만&n신을 냈던 것 같은데...

1001403755.english: Aren't you heavy...? Oh, no. It's not uncomfortable. ...It's so cozy that I want to be held like this forever.
1001403755.korean: 무겁지는 않으세요…? 아, 아뇨. 불편하진 않아요.&n...평생 이렇게 안겨있고 싶을 정도로, 포근해요.

1001403756.english: Please keep it a secret from everyone else that I'm acting like this. Um, well... it's because I want to have a secret that only the two of us know, Commander.
1001403756.korean: 제가 이렇게 어리광 부리는 건 다른 분들한테는&n비밀로 해주세요. 음, 그게… 사령관님이랑&n단 둘이서만 알고 있는 비밀을, 갖고 싶어서요.

1001403757.english: I did wear this because I wanted to show it to the Commander... but still, if you stare at me like that, um...
1001403757.korean: 사령관한테 보여주고 싶어서 입은거긴 한데…&n그래도 그렇게 뚫어져라 보면, 저기...

1001403758.english: Hmph. It’s just because it was the first time I’d been treated like that. Do you think I, someone who takes pleasure in the pain of others, would give in so easily?
1001403758.korean: 흥. 그렇게 다뤄진 게 처음이라서 그랬을 뿐이야.&n타인의 고통에서 즐거움을 느끼는 내가&n그렇게 쉽게 굴복할 것 같아?

1001403759.english: …C-could you give me a hug instead of this…?

1001403760.english: Commander, you are holding back a lot because of me, aren't you...? You don't have to.
1001403760.korean: 사령관님, 저 때문에 많이 자제하고 계신거죠…?&n그러시지 않아도 괜찮아요.

1001403761.english: Oh, since we decided to go on a date today... huh?
1001403761.korean: 오, 오늘은 데이트 하기로 했으니까아… 응?

1001403762.english: Stop it already. You seem to be mistaken about something. No matter how hard you try, things won't go the way you want.
1001403762.korean: 그만 좀 하지? 뭔가 착각한 모양인데,&n아무리 애써도 바라는대로 되지는 않을 거야.

1001403763.english: Haah… N-No. It's okay.&nI can feel that you're cherishing me, Commander…&nSo it's not hard at all.
1001403763.korean: 하읏… 아, 아뇨. 괜찮아요.&n사령관님이 절 아껴주신다는게 느껴지니까…&n하나도 힘들지 않아요.

1001403764.english: Commander, you're holding yourself back a lot because of me, aren't you…?&nIt's okay—you don't have to.
1001403764.korean: 사령관님, 저 때문에 많이 자제하고 계신거죠…?&n그러시지 않아도 괜찮아요.

1001403765.english: Mmm, I guess it can't be helped… If you go overboard like last time,&nI won't be able to get up, so… just a little, before we go…
1001403765.korean: 으응, 어쩔 수 없네… 또 저번처럼 해버리면&n나 못 일어나니까, 나가기 전에 조금만...

1001403766.english: Th- That… you're not going to do that like last time?&nEven if I try being this gentle—Ugh…?!&n…Hehe, looks like you've finally decided to go for it?
1001403766.korean: 그… 저번에 그건 안 하는거야?&n이렇게 상냥하게 해봐야- 읏…?!&n...후후, 드디어 할 마음이 들었나보네?

1001403767.english: Commander, is it really okay to just stay like this, being held...?&nIf it's uncomfortable for you...
1001403767.korean: 사령관님, 진짜 이렇게 안겨만 있어도 되나요…?&n혹시 불편하시면…&n...네.

1001403768.english: Actually, I wasn't really planning to have a date outside either.&nI've already experienced a lot of how my husband would react.&nI also know there's still a lot I'm… lacking though…?
1001403768.korean: 사실, 나도 진짜 밖에서 데이트 하려던 건&n아니었어. 우리 남편이 어떻게 반응할지는&n이미 많이 겪어봤으니까.&n아직 많이… 모자라는 것도 알고 있는데…?

1001403769.english: Whether it's horns, tail, or wings—do whatever you want. You were going to do that anyway, right?
1001403769.korean: 뿌, 뿔이든 꼬리든 날개든 뭐든 좋을대로 해.&n어차피 그러려던 거 아니었어?

1001403770.english: While I was staying here, I received so many requests... and every single one of them was thinking only of you, big brother.
1001403770.korean: 여기서 지내는 동안, 정말 많은 요청을 받았는데…&n하나같이 전부 오라버니만 생각하고 있더라구요.

1001403771.english: You think I look like I like drinking? You were right. Together—no, wait. I heard all sorts of rumors about drinking with the manager.
1001403771.korean: 술 좋아할 것 같이 생겼다고? 바로 맞췄어. 같이-&n아니지. 매니저랑 술에 대한 소문을 이것저것&n들었거든.

1001403772.english: Brother, brother. You remember all the adventures we shared, right?
1001403772.korean: 오라버니, 오라버니. 저희가 함께 했던 모험들,&n전부 기억하고 있죠?

1001403773.english: Oh, are you going to give me a massage? Thanks—massages after training are the best. ...But lately, your hands keep going in strange places?
1001403773.korean: 아, 마사지 해주려는 거야? 고마워-&n훈련 끝나고 받는 마사지가 제일 좋단 말이야.&n...근데 요샌 자꾸 손이 이상한 쪽으로 간다?

1001403774.english: I'm sorry about last time. I made the Captain and the Commander worry by staying holed up in my room...
1001403774.korean: 저번에는 죄송해요. 방에 틀어박히는 바람에&n대장님이랑 사령관님을 신경 쓰게 만들어버려서…

1001403775.english: What? I don't want to be with Perrault. You keep pretending not to, but you keep trying to have Master all to yourself, don't you?
1001403775.korean: 네에? 페로 언니랑 같이는 싫어요. 안 그런 척&n하면서 자꾸 혼자서만 주인님을 독차지 하려고&n하잖아요?

1001403776.english: Kaen made the sushi. Yeah. I learned a lot of different things. Among them... I like cooking.
1001403776.korean: 초밥, 카엔이 만들었어. 응. 이것저것, 많이&n배웠어. 그중에서... 요리, 좋아해.

1001403777.english: Hmm... Shall I draw something that might make you feel better? Don't worry, I'm confident in my drawing skills.
1001403777.korean: 음~ 뭔가 기분이 나아질만한걸 그려드릴까요?&n걱정 마요, 그림에는 자신 있으니까요.

1001403778.english: Do you want to see? Go ahead and look. It is a champion's duty to show off their beautiful body to the audience.
1001403778.korean: 보고 싶어? 얼마든지 봐. 아름다운 몸을&n관객들에게 보여주는 건 챔피언의 의무야.

1001403779.english: Thank you so much for letting me see and feel so many things. I hope these happy days continue... forever.
1001403779.korean: 제게 많은 것을 보고 느끼게 해줘서 정말 고마워요.&n앞으로도 계속… 이렇게 행복한 나날이&n계속됐으면 좋겠어요.

1001403780.english: The championship belt suits you well, doesn't it? Well, it wasn't an official match, but since you did beat me, I guess the manager can call you the new champion. Then, new champion, time to start the title defense, right?
1001403780.korean: 챔피언 벨트, 잘 어울리는데~? 뭐, 정식 경기는&n아니었지만 나를 이기긴 했으니까 매니저가&n새 챔피언이라고 해도 되겠네.&n그러면 새 챔피언님. 방어전, 시작해야지?

1001403781.english: Um, Commander. Don't you find it unpleasant to see me wearing this...? H-If you are uncomfortable, I'll go change right away.
1001403781.korean: 저, 사령관님. 제가 이런 걸 입어서 보기 싫지는&n않으신가요…? 호, 혹시 불쾌하시면 바로&n갈아입고 올게요.

1001403782.english: Nya ha ha. I heard Perrault-nee has had a similar experience, too? She said everything got all mixed up and she couldn't tell what was what in the end... I'm curious♬
1001403782.korean: 냐하핫. 페로 언니도 이런 적 있다면서요?&n막 뒤섞여서 나중엔 뭐가뭔지 모르게 됐다던데…&n궁금하네요♬

1001403783.english: Sumire is the alcohol. Kaen is the snacks. Either way, you can eat. ...Why are you taking a deep breath? Are you... angry?
1001403783.korean: 스미레는 술. 카엔은 안주. 어느쪽이든, 먹어도 돼.&n...왜 심호흡, 해? 화났... 어?

1001403784.english: In the past... I just kept drawing in my room. No. I wasn't depressed. Because drawing people's dreams was a truly joyful thing.
1001403784.korean: 예전엔... 방 안에서 계속 그림만 그렸어요.&n아뇨. 우울하진 않았어요. 사람들의 꿈을&n그려주는 건, 정말 즐거운 일이었으니까요

1001403785.english: Curious about a champion's private life isn't really a good thing. An idol is beautiful when they are just an idol, right? So... um, it's nothing.
1001403785.korean: 챔피언의 사생활을 궁금해하는 건 별로 좋은&n행동이 아냐. 우상은 그냥 우상일 때가 아름다운&n거잖아? 그러니까… 음, 아무 것도 아냐.

1001403786.english: Whenever my older brother praises my drawings, new inspiration wells up inside me. It also makes my heart flutter.
1001403786.korean: 오라버니가 제 그림을 칭찬해 줄 때마다 새로운&n영감이 솟아나요. 두근두근하기도 하구요.

1001403787.english: The best thing I think I did since coming here was making a vow with the manager, and the biggest mistake I think I made was… seeing the true form of Sleipnir. Do you remember what was said about an idol being most beautiful when it remains an idol?
1001403787.korean: 여기 와서 제일 잘 했다고 생각하는 일은 매니저랑&n서약한 거고, 제일 실수했다고 생각하는 일은…&n슬레이프니르의 실체를 본 거야. 우상은 우상으로&n남았을 때가 제일 아름답다고 했던 말, 기억 나?

1001403788.english: Calista helped with the makeup, and Spriggan helped with the accessories. The Captain chuckled and... told me to give this, this drink... to the Commander.
1001403788.korean: 화장은 칼리스타가, 악세사리는 스프리건이&n도와줬어요. 대장님은 껄껄 웃으시더니…&n이, 이 음료수를… 사령관님에게 드리라고 했어요.

1001403789.english: Master... Poi is soaked like this... What. Should. I. Do?

1001403790.english: Yeah. It’s what I wore when I infiltrated the brothel. They say people liked Kaen. People said they liked Kaen in it. Does my Lord like it too?
1001403790.korean: 응. 유곽에 잠입할 때, 입던 거.&n사람들이 카엔, 좋아했대. 주공도, 좋아?

1001403791.english: It's really strange. All I wanted to do was draw my older brother... but my hands keep trembling...
1001403791.korean: 정말 이상해요. 전 그저 오라버니를&n그리고 싶었던 것뿐인데.. 자꾸 손이 떨리네요…

1001403792.english: Well, it's nothing. I had a drink before the match... and got a 10-game suspension for stripping naked and causing a ruckus on the field.
1001403792.korean: 뭐, 별건 아냐. 시합 전에 한 잔 했다가…&n홀딱 벗고 경기장을 들쑤시는 바람에&n10경기 출장 정지 처분을 받았었거든.

1001403793.english: Brother, brother. You remember all the adventures we shared, right?
1001403793.korean: 오라버니, 오라버니. 저희가 함께 했던 모험들,&n전부 기억하고 있죠?

1001403794.english: Oh, are you going to give me a massage? Thanks—massages after training are the best. ...But lately, your hands keep going in strange places?
1001403794.korean: 아, 마사지 해주려는 거야? 고마워-&n훈련 끝나고 받는 마사지가 제일 좋단 말이야.&n...근데 요샌 자꾸 손이 이상한 쪽으로 간다?

1001403795.english: But, if I do this, isn't it practically... no different from being naked...? I'm not used to this kind of thing... If you like it, Commander... I-it might be okay.
1001403795.korean: 그, 그런데 이러면 거의… 버, 벗은거나 다름없지&n않나요…? 이런건 익숙하지가 않아서요…&n사령관님이 마음에 드신다면… 괘, 괜찮을지도요.

1001403796.english: Actually, there is a way for Poi and Perrault to become good friends. What is it? Well… when the three of them are together, Master, you just have to put in a little bit more effort.
1001403796.korean: 사실 포이랑 페로 언니가 사이좋아지는 방법이&n있어요. 뭐냐하면… 셋이 같이 있을 때,&n주인님이 조.금.만.더. 힘을 내주시면 돼요.

1001403797.english: Put it on my stomach...? Mmm... No, don't. It'll lose its flavor. Instead... Kaen will feed you. Ah~
1001403797.korean: 배에다, 올려…? 음… 으응, 안 돼. 맛, 없어져.&n대신… 카엔이, 먹여줄게. 아~

1001403798.english: Your heart is filled with the colors of countless people. Just looking at it makes me feel good without even realizing it, and I find myself wanting to quietly... lean on you.
1001403798.korean: 오라버니의 마음속은 수많은 사람들의 색으로&n가득 차있어요. 가만히 보고 있으면 저도 모르게&n기분이 좋아져서, 가만히… 기대고 싶어져요.

1001403799.english: Are you that curious about what I do when I'm alone? I just do cross-stitching while listening to idol songs, or shop online—I can't do it right now, but... See, nothing special, right?
1001403799.korean: 혼자 있을 때 뭐 하는 지 그렇게 궁금해?&n그냥 아이돌 노래를 들으면서 십자수를 하거나,&n지금은 못하지만 인터넷으로 쇼핑을 하거나…&n봐, 별 거 없지?

1001403800.english: Thank you so much for letting me see and feel so many things. I hope these happy days continue... forever.
1001403800.korean: 제게 많은 것을 보고 느끼게 해줘서 정말 고마워요.&n앞으로도 계속… 이렇게 행복한 나날이&n계속됐으면 좋겠어요.

1001403801.english: The championship belt suits you well, doesn't it? Well, it wasn't an official match, but since you did beat me, I guess the manager can call you the new champion. Then, new champion, time to start the title defense, right?
1001403801.korean: 챔피언 벨트, 잘 어울리는데~? 뭐, 정식 경기는&n아니었지만 나를 이기긴 했으니까 매니저가&n새 챔피언이라고 해도 되겠네.&n그러면 새 챔피언님. 방어전, 시작해야지?

1001403802.english: Ah… Th-is that perhaps because of that drink…? Eh? Because of me…? Uh, if you tell me what to do… I-I’ll do my absolute best!
1001403802.korean: 앗… 그, 그건 혹시 그 음료수 때문인가요…?&n엣. 저 때문…? 어, 어떻게 해야하는지&n알려주시면… 최, 최선을 다해볼게요!

1001403803.english: Are you only going to wipe me so gently? Something like this— Hyaung?! ...Nyahaha. That’s just how my master should be.
1001403803.korean: 그, 그렇게 상냥하게 닦아주기만 하시는 건가요?&n이런 건- 햐응?! ...냐하핫.&n이래야 제 주인님이죠.

1001403804.english: This is... a bonus. Kaen is good at massages, too. ...Does it feel good? Yes. Kaen, give me one too.
1001403804.korean: 이건... 서비스. 카엔, 안마도 잘 해. ...기분, 좋아?&n응. 카엔도, 해 줘.

1001403805.english: What? What I'm hoping for? Hmm—would you like to try guessing, big brother? As for the hint… th-this should… be enough… right?
1001403805.korean: 네? 제가 바라는 거요? 음- 오라버니가&n한 번 맞춰 볼래요? 힌트는…&n이, 이 정도면… 되겠… 죠?

1001403806.english: Oh, what? The manager is great, too. Just bear with it a little bit, even if it tickles. Let's see... Oho... ...Just a moment later... No, do you have quite a bit of time?
1001403806.korean: 오, 뭐야. 매니저도 훌륭하잖아. 간지러워도&n좀만 참아봐. 어디보자… 오호…&n...이따가 잠깐… 아니, 좀 오래 시간 있어?

1001403807.english: Whenever my older brother praises my drawings, new inspiration wells up inside me. It also makes my heart flutter.
1001403807.korean: 오라버니가 제 그림을 칭찬해 줄 때마다 새로운&n영감이 솟아나요. 두근두근하기도 하구요.

1001403808.english: The best thing I think I did since coming here was making a vow with the manager, and the biggest mistake I think I made was… seeing the true form of Sleipnir. Do you remember what was said about an idol being most beautiful when it remains an idol?
1001403808.korean: 여기 와서 제일 잘 했다고 생각하는 일은 매니저랑&n서약한 거고, 제일 실수했다고 생각하는 일은…&n슬레이프니르의 실체를 본 거야. 우상은 우상으로&n남았을 때가 제일 아름답다고 했던 말, 기억 나?

1001403809.english: The words "I am pretty" and "I like you"... I heard them from you for the first time, Commander. Since you are my firsts, Commander... please stay with me until the very end.
1001403809.korean: 예쁘다는 말도, 좋아한다는 말도… 사령관님에게&n처음으로 들어봤어요. 제 모든 처음은&n사령관님이시니까… 마지막까지도, 같이 있어 주세요.

1001403810.english: Well… we do like milk. But Poi likes it especially more, so… Master, give me some milk♡
1001403810.korean: 뭐… 저희가 우유를 좋아하긴 해요.&n근데 포이는 특히 더 좋아하니까…&n주인님이 우유, 줘♡

1001403811.english: My Lord. Who would you like to try first today…? ...Yeah. When Sumire says something like that, you taste it. So Kaen, please eat some too.
1001403811.korean: 주공. 오늘은, 누구부터 드셔 보시겠사와요…?&n...응. 스미레가 이런 말 하면, 주공이 맛 봐.&n그러니까 카엔도, 먹어줘.

1001403812.korean: 흐앗?! 그, 그러니까. 이건…&n실수… 인 거죠? 그렇죠?

1001403813.english: You know this is scandalous material, right?

1001403814.english: Even though I know... it's not possible yet...

1001403815.english: Rough is fine, sweet is fine... I like either way. Hmm... it’s true that we’re a good match, but isn’t it really because of love?
1001403815.korean: 거칠게도 좋고, 달콤하게도 좋고… 난 어느쪽이든&n좋아. 음… 궁합이 잘 맞는것도 있지만,&n역시 사랑 때문이 아니겠어?

1001403816.english: If, even like this, I can be of help to the Commander…

1001403817.english: Poi has come thoroughly prepared, you know? So can't you just test the waters with a light heart?
1001403817.korean: 포이는 지금 단단히 준비해 왔거든요?&n그러니까 가벼운 마음으로 찔러보시면 안 돼요?

1001403818.english: Kaen is… not something to eat.

1001403819.english: Wait a moment... give me a little time to prepare my mind...

1001403820.english: Even though I tapped last time, you still won't let go? You have no consideration at all for the partner receiving this, huh? Well… maybe it doesn't matter at night?
1001403820.korean: 저번처럼 탭 했는데도 안 놔주려고?&n이거, 접수하는 파트너에 대한 배려가 전혀 없는걸?&n뭐… 밤에는 상관 없으려나?

1001403821.english: Even though you know it's still not allowed...

1001403822.english: Rough or sweet, I like either way. Hmm… maybe it's because we're so compatible, but isn't it really because of love?
1001403822.korean: 거칠게도 좋고, 달콤하게도 좋고… 난 어느쪽이든&n좋아. 음… 궁합이 잘 맞는것도 있지만,&n역시 사랑 때문이 아니겠어?

1001403823.english: Ugh, haa… I'm okay. It's a little scary, but… Please don't let go of my hand until the end.
1001403823.korean: 윽, 하아… 괘, 괜찮아요. 조금 무섭긴 하지만…&n끝까지 손을 놓지 말아 주세요.

1001403824.english: Uh… that's not milk though… Poi, your switch is completely on now, so hurry up...
1001403824.korean: 으응… 그건, 우유 아닌데요…&n 포이, 지금 완전히 스위치 들어갔으니까, 빨리이...

1001403825.english: Uh, Commander… Kaen, is it tasty...? Kaen wants some of what you're having too.
1001403825.korean: 으응, 주공… 카엔, 맛있어…?&n카엔도 주공, 먹을래.

1001403826.english: Older brother, hunger can't be filled by my drawings. I'll make you a sandwich, so please wait just a little.
1001403826.korean: 오라버니, 배가 고픈건 제 그림으로도&n채워드릴 수 없어요. 제가 샌드위치를 해 올&n테니까 조금만 기다려줘요.

1001403827.english: Looks like I have a lot of fans here too? I'm glad~ So… please don't fondle me just anywhere like that. I'd be embarrassed if the fans saw.
1001403827.korean: 여기 내 팬도 많았구나? 기쁘네~ 그러니까…&n이렇게 아무데서나 주물럭거리진 말아줄래?&n팬들 볼 낯이 없거든?

1001403828.english: I didn't expect you to be so passionate with me. No, I'm just happy. This warm feeling in my chest… it's the first time.
1001403828.korean: 저한테 그렇게 열중해주실 줄은 몰랐어요.&n아뇨. 그냥 기뻐서요. 이렇게 가슴이 따뜻해지는&n느낌은… 처음이에요.

1001403829.english: Real milk... um, I can't. Lilith-Big Sis would scold me, you know? But Poi is really looking forward to it too, so maybe later… about five people? Nyahaha.
1001403829.korean: 진짜 우유는... 음, 안되겠어요. 리리스 언니한테&n혼난다구요? 그래도 포이도 엄청 기대하고&n있으니까, 나중에 한… 다섯 명 정도? 냐하핫.

1001403830.english: Commander, starting with Hatsuna again today...? Yeah. Bath and food come later.
1001403830.korean: 주공. 오늘도 하츠나부터…?&n응. 목욕이랑 밥은, 나중에.

1001403831.english: Did you think I'd allow everything just because we've become this close? Ah, even so, that's... Ah, no! It's not for the rest of my life, it's just... I, I need a little time to get used to it.
1001403831.korean: 이런 사이가 됐다고 다 허락해줄 줄 알았어?&n아, 아무리 그래도 그런건… 아, 아니!&n평생은 아니라, 그게…&n조, 조금 익숙해질 시간이 필요하단 말야.

1001403832.english: Commander, lie down here. I'll put you to sleep.

1001403833.english: You. You were staring blankly at the other kids earlier, weren't you? If you like them so much, why don't you keep them by your side? ...Th-or rather... could it be... am I not enough for you...?
1001403833.korean: 당신. 아까 다른 애들을 넋 놓고 보더라?&n그렇게 좋으면 걔네를 옆에 두던지.&n...그, 그게아니면… 혹시, 나로는 부족해…?

1001403834.english: It's a bit overwhelming because I'm so young, isn't it? Don't worry. The doctor will definitely make the growth medicine perfect.
1001403834.korean: 내가 너무 어려서 부담스럽지? 걱정 마.&n닥터가 분명히 성장약을 완성시켜 줄 거야.

1001403835.english: Do you think I wouldn't be jealous? Everywhere I go, there are pretty girls everywhere, and you treat everyone so kindly. Me— uh… R-really? Do you really like me the most?
1001403835.korean: 질투 안하게 생겼어? 어딜가든 예쁜 애들 천지에다가,&n또 당신은 다 친절하게 대해주고. 내가-&n어… 지, 진짜? 진짜로 나를 제일 좋아해?

1001403836.english: If we win later, you know what? Let's go listen to music. It's going to be really fun.
1001403836.korean: 나중에 우리가 이기면 있잖아. 음악 들으러 가자.&n정말 재밌을 거야.

1001403837.english: Ugh... You... aren't you forgetting something? You promised to kiss me from beginning to end... all the way through.
1001403837.korean: 읏… 다, 당신. 뭐 까먹고 있지 않아?&n처음부터 끝까지 계속… 키스, 해주기로 약속했잖아.

1001403838.english: Did you think I'd allow everything just because we've become this close? Ah, even so, that's... Ah, no! It's not for the rest of my life, it's just... I, I need a little time to get used to it.
1001403838.korean: 이런 사이가 됐다고 다 허락해줄 줄 알았어?&n아, 아무리 그래도 그런건… 아, 아니!&n평생은 아니라, 그게…&n조, 조금 익숙해질 시간이 필요하단 말야.

1001403839.english: Commander, lie down here. I'll put you to sleep.

1001403840.english: You. You were staring blankly at the other kids earlier, weren't you? If you like them so much, why don't you keep them by your side? ...Th-or rather... could it be... am I not enough for you...?
1001403840.korean: 당신. 아까 다른 애들을 넋 놓고 보더라?&n그렇게 좋으면 걔네를 옆에 두던지.&n...그, 그게아니면… 혹시, 나로는 부족해…?

1001403841.english: It's a bit overwhelming because I'm so young, isn't it? Don't worry. The doctor will definitely make the growth medicine perfect.
1001403841.korean: 내가 너무 어려서 부담스럽지? 걱정 마.&n닥터가 분명히 성장약을 완성시켜 줄 거야.

1001403842.english: Do you think I wouldn't be jealous? Everywhere I go, there are pretty girls everywhere, and you treat everyone so kindly. Me— uh… R-really? Do you really like me the most?
1001403842.korean: 질투 안하게 생겼어? 어딜가든 예쁜 애들 천지에다가,&n또 당신은 다 친절하게 대해주고. 내가-&n어… 지, 진짜? 진짜로 나를 제일 좋아해?
