1001403843.english: If we win later, you know what? Let's go listen to music. It's going to be really fun.
1001403843.korean: 나중에 우리가 이기면 있잖아. 음악 들으러 가자.&n정말 재밌을 거야.

1001403844.english: Ugh… d-did you forget something? You promised to keep kissing me from start to finish.
1001403844.korean: 읏… 다, 당신. 뭐 까먹고 있지 않아?&n처음부터 끝까지 계속… 키스, 해주기로 약속했잖아.

1001403845.english: He usually leads a platoon and assists the commander. Walker may look like this, but he is actually quite sturdy and fast.
1001403845.korean: 평소엔 소대를 이끌고 대장을 보조해.&n워커가 이래보여도 꽤 튼튼하고 빠르다고.

1001403846.english: A Deus Ex Machina can simply erase any event or any pain. I am nothing but an empty shell that has borrowed the name.
1001403846.korean: 데우스 엑스 마키나는 어떤 사건이든, 어떤&n고통이든 간단히 없애버릴 수 있죠. 저는 그저&n이름만 빌려온 빈 껍데기일 뿐.

1001403847.english: It was only after meeting the Commander that I started to have one complaint about my personality. That I unnecessarily worry the Commander. I am trying my best, so please don't worry too much.
1001403847.korean: 사령관이랑 만나고 나서야 내 성격에 불만이&n하나 생겼어. 쓸데없이 사령관을 걱정시킨다는&n거 말야. 나도 노력하고 있으니까,&n너무 걱정하지 마.

1001403848.english: How about we make that humble dream of yours come true together, right now? With who I am today, I could make it much more wonderful for you. ...I was just kidding. So... don't make that face.
1001403848.korean: 당신의 그 소박한 꿈, 지금 당장 저랑 같이&n이뤄보는 건 어때요? 지금의 저라면&n훨씬 더 근사하게 만들어드릴 수 있어요.&n...그냥 해본 말이에요. 그러니까…&n그런 표정, 짓지 말아요.

1001403849.english: Just as you said, Master, your companion dog will also faithfully stay by your side until death. This will surely be helpful in serving you as well.
1001403849.korean: 주인님의 말씀대로, 반려견 또한 충직하게 죽을&n때까지 주인의 곁을 지켜요. 분명 이것도&n주인님을 모시는 데에 도움이 될 거예요.

1001403850.english: Um, Commander. ...Thank you. It may be just the uniform, but I feel like I’ve taken one step closer to my goal.
1001403850.korean: 저, 사령관. ...고맙다. 단지 복장일 뿐이지만,&n목표에 한 걸음 더 가까워진 것 같은 기분이 든다.

1001403851.english: Hmph. It’s different from such vulgarity. It is only natural that I need this level of dignity to be by my master’s side.
1001403851.korean: 흥. 그런 천박한 것과는 달라요. 주인님의 곁에&n있으려면 이정도 품격이 있어야하는 게 당연하죠.

1001403852.english: Oho, want to take them on? Just a moment. There's a bunch of stuff in the Walker's cockpit, so I'll just look around. It should be somewhere around here... Organize? Why would you do that?
1001403852.korean: 오호, 한 판 붙어보시겠다? 잠깐만. 워커&n조종석에 이것저것 있으니까 좀 찾아볼게.&n여기 어디 있을텐데… 정리? 그런 걸 왜 해?

1001403853.english: It is okay if you do not try to understand. All the evil deeds I committed… are things that can neither be understood nor forgiven by anyone.
1001403853.korean: 이해하려고 하지 않으셔도 괜찮아요. 제가 저질렀던&n그 모든 악행들은… 누군가에게 이해받지도,&n용서받지도 못할 일이에요.

1001403854.english: Huh? Of course. I’m not in it to take what belongs to others—I just enjoy the thrill of gambling itself. Anyway, if I die, it’s all for nothing, so even if I win—Ah, okay, okay. I can’t even say a word. You really are such a high-maintenance husband.
1001403854.korean: 응? 당연하지. 나는 남의 걸 따내는 게 아니라&n도박 그 자체의 짜릿함을 즐긴다고. 어차피&n죽으면 다 소용 없는데, 따봐야-&n아~ 알았어, 알았다고. 무슨 말을 못하겠네.&n진짜 손 많이 가는 남편이라니까.

1001403855.english: My wish… you mean? One thing arose after I met you. Though it has already come true. ...that there would be even a small place for me in a corner of your paradise.
1001403855.korean: 제 바람… 말인가요. 당신을 만나고 한 가지&n생겼었죠. 이미 이루어졌지만요.&n...당신의 낙원 한켠에, 조금이라도&n제 자리가 있기를.

1001403856.english: King, King. Master, will you cherish me as much as Miss Fenrir...?
1001403856.korean: 왕, 왕. 주인님, 저도 펜리르 양처럼&n예뻐해주시겠어요…?

1001403857.english: I realized that the Commander always cares about us. The other members will surely be happy, too. ...Um, Commander. That... Ah, it's nothing.
1001403857.korean: 사령관은 언제나 우리들을 신경쓰고 있다는 걸&n알았다. 다른 대원들도 분명히 기뻐할거다.&n...저, 사령관. 그… 아, 아무것도 아니다.

1001403858.english: It is alright if you do not look away. I wore all of this for you, Master. To be precise, Master, now that you are this aroused... how shall I... treat you?
1001403858.korean: 눈을 돌리지 않으셔도 괜찮아요. 전부 주인님을&n위해 입은 거니까요. 정확히는 이렇게 흥분하신&n주인님을… 어떻게, 해드릴까요?

1001403859.english: I'm not interested in things like a stable life. You never know when you might die, so aren't you busy enough enjoying this and that?
1001403859.korean: 안정적인 삶 같은 거엔 관심 없어. 언제 죽을지&n모르는데, 이것저것 즐기기도 바쁘잖아?

1001403860.english: My desires… I forgot all of that. A long, long time ago.
1001403860.korean: 제 욕망… 그런 건 전부 잊어버렸어요.&n아주, 예전에.

1001403861.english: You want to go out on the walker? Fine, come on up. Why are you making such a fuss? It’s not like this is the first time. You don't care about tidying up when you're really into something at night, do you? It's similar to that.
1001403861.korean: 워커 타고 나가자고? 좋지, 올라와. 새삼스럽게&n뭘 그래? 한두번 보는 것도 아니고. 너도 밤에&n한창 열중할 땐 정리 같은 거 신경 안쓰잖아?&n그거랑 비슷한 거야.

1001403862.english: You are the most peculiar person I have ever seen. As a commander, you are selfless and altruistic, but as a partner, you are more faithful to your desires than anyone else. Your desires... I am glad I can accept them.
1001403862.korean: 당신은 제가 본 것 중에 가장 별난 사람이에요.&n사령관일때는 무욕하고 이타적이지만,&n반려자일때는 그 누구보다 욕망에 충실하죠.&n당신의 그 욕망… 제가 받아들일 수 있어서&n다행이에요.

1001403863.english: I am not embarrassed since it is my master's gaze. However... is it because of this restraint? I feel a little strange.
1001403863.korean: 주인님의 시선이니 부끄럽지는 않아요.&n그렇지만… 이 구속구 때문일까요.&n조금, 이상한 기분이 드네요.

1001403864.english: I... I wish you wouldn't stare at me like that. I'm not embarrassed. How could I be embarrassed? My idolized Phantom- Ugh, why are you getting closer...
1001403864.korean: 그, 그렇게 빤히 보지 말아주었으면 좋겠다.&n부끄럽진 않다. 부끄러울리가 없지 않은가.&n동경하는 팬텀 선배의-&n으으, 왜 더 가까이 오는 건가...

1001403865.english: Oh my, you look like you're about to devour me right now? How scary... Hehe, but I've been told not to right now... ?
1001403865.korean: 어머, 당장이라도 절  잡아먹을 것 같은&n눈빛이시네요? 무서워라… 후후, 그래도&n지금은 안된답니다…?

1001403866.english: This? After I get burned with a Walker, a lot of shiny stuff remains. I don't really know what it is, but I like it, so I collect it. If you want it, try winning a bet.
1001403866.korean: 이거? 워커로 한바탕 태우고 나면 반짝이는 게&n많이 남거든. 뭔지는 잘 모르지만 맘에 들어서&n모으지. 갖고 싶으면 내기 해서 따 봐.

1001403867.english: Would things have been different if my abilities had been stronger? Though it's pointless to think about it now.
1001403867.korean: 제 능력이 더 강했다면 달라졌을까요?&n이제와서 생각해봤자 의미는 없겠지만요.

1001403868.english: It was only after meeting the Commander that I started to have one complaint about my personality. That I unnecessarily worry the Commander. I am trying my best, so please don't worry too much.
1001403868.korean: 사령관이랑 만나고 나서야 내 성격에 불만이&n하나 생겼어. 쓸데없이 사령관을 걱정시킨다는&n거 말야. 나도 노력하고 있으니까,&n너무 걱정하지 마.

1001403869.english: How about we make that humble dream of yours come true together, right now? With who I am today, I could make it much more wonderful for you. ...I was just kidding. So... don't make that face.
1001403869.korean: 당신의 그 소박한 꿈, 지금 당장 저랑 같이&n이뤄보는 건 어때요? 지금의 저라면&n훨씬 더 근사하게 만들어드릴 수 있어요.&n...그냥 해본 말이에요. 그러니까…&n그런 표정, 짓지 말아요.

1001403870.english: So you were joking… No. I belong entirely to you, Master. I cannot take even a passing remark lightly.
1001403870.korean: 농담, 이셨군요… 아니에요. 저는 온전히&n주인님의 것. 지나가는 말이라도 가볍게&n들을 수는 없어요.

1001403871.english: No problem. The power unit is fine, and the camouflage function is working normally. ...You mean the size? N-no problem. It fits perfectly. It's very comfortable.
1001403871.korean: 문제없다. 동력로 이상없고, 미채 기능도 정상&n작동한다. ...사이즈 말인가? 무, 문제 없다.&n딱 맞는다. 아주 편하다.

1001403872.english: Hehe, you're so cute. Of course I'm the one enjoying it more. You can tell just by the way you flinch and press your body against me, right?
1001403872.korean: 후후, 귀여우셔라. 당연히 제 쪽이&n더 기분 좋으시겠죠. 움찔거리면서 몸을&n붙이시는 걸 보면 알 수 있다구요?

1001403873.english: Yawn... Life here is so boring. Heck, yeah. To put it nicely, it's stable. At least I don't have to worry about getting a bullet in my head right now. Well, not that I've ever worried about that, though.
1001403873.korean: 하암… 여기 생활은 너무 지루해. 킥, 그래.&n좋게 말하면 안정적이지. 당장 머리에 총알&n박힐 걱정 안해도 되고 말이야. 뭐, 그런 걱정은&n한 번도 한 적 없지만.

1001403874.english: I have seen and know all your desires. Isn't it something you could achieve right now, without anyone's help? And yet, why— ...duty? You are saying something strange.
1001403874.korean: 당신의 욕망은 전부 봐서 알고 있어요. 지금&n당장이라도, 누구의 도움도 받지 않고 이룰 수&n있는 일이지 않나요? 그런데도 어째서-&n...의무, 라니. 별난 말을 하네요, 당신은.

1001403875.english: Huh? Of course. I’m not in it to take what belongs to others—I just enjoy the thrill of gambling itself. Anyway, if I die, it’s all for nothing, so even if I win—Ah, okay, okay. I can’t even say a word. You really are such a high-maintenance husband.
1001403875.korean: 응? 당연하지. 나는 남의 걸 따내는 게 아니라&n도박 그 자체의 짜릿함을 즐긴다고. 어차피&n죽으면 다 소용 없는데, 따봐야-&n아~ 알았어, 알았다고. 무슨 말을 못하겠네.&n진짜 손 많이 가는 남편이라니까.

1001403876.english: My wish… you mean? One thing arose after I met you. Though it has already come true. ...that there would be even a small place for me in a corner of your paradise.
1001403876.korean: 제 바람… 말인가요. 당신을 만나고 한 가지&n생겼었죠. 이미 이루어졌지만요.&n...당신의 낙원 한켠에, 조금이라도&n제 자리가 있기를.

1001403877.english: Are you going to pet me...? So this is what it feels like. It makes me want to... act a little spoiled.
1001403877.korean: 쓰다듬어주시는 건가요…? 이런 느낌이었군요.&n조금… 어리광을 부리고 싶어지네요.

1001403878.english: I told you not to look, and now you're touching me… Huh? That’s because of training… Does the Commander perhaps dislike a body this hard…?
1001403878.korean: 보지 말랬더니 이제 주무르다니… 흐에?&n그건 훈련을 해서… 사령관은 혹시 이런&n딱딱한 몸, 싫어하는 건가…?

1001403879.english: I know every nook and cranny of your body, Master. If I do this… it feels good, doesn’t it…?
1001403879.korean: 주인님의 몸은 구석구석, 전부 알아요.&n이렇게 하면… 기분, 좋으시죠…?

1001403880.english: So, dice rolls for today? Okay? Hahaha, Yeah. The old ways are the best. Oh, and you're betting two days of volunteer rights on it? Alright, I'm fired up! Then, let's roll? Hehe, let's see- … …could we, can't we call it a draw…?
1001403880.korean: 오늘 종목은 주사위로 OK? 캬하핫, 그래. 구관이&n명관이지. 오오, 거기다 봉사권 이틀을 거시겠다?&n좋아, 불타오르는구만! 그럼 굴린다? 후후, 어디보-&n…...무, 무승부로 해주면 안될까…?

1001403881.english: You say you… forgive? … …That’s strange. Nothing should change with just a single word from you, and it shouldn’t… but… I feel a little relieved.
1001403881.korean: 용서… 하신다구요? …...이상하네요.&n당신의 말 한마디로 바뀌는 건&n아무것도 없을텐데, 없어야 하는데…&n조금, 마음이 놓여요.

1001403882.english: You want to go out on the walker? Fine, come on up. Why are you making such a fuss? It’s not like this is the first time. You don't care about tidying up when you're really into something at night, do you? It's similar to that.
1001403882.korean: 워커 타고 나가자고? 좋지, 올라와. 새삼스럽게&n뭘 그래? 한두번 보는 것도 아니고. 너도 밤에&n한창 열중할 땐 정리 같은 거 신경 안쓰잖아?&n그거랑 비슷한 거야.

1001403883.english: You are the most peculiar person I have ever seen. As a commander, you are selfless and altruistic, but as a partner, you are more faithful to your desires than anyone else. Your desires... I am glad that I can accept them.
1001403883.korean: 당신은 제가 본 것 중에 가장 별난 사람이에요&n 사령관일때는 무욕하고 이타적이지만,&n반려자일때는 그 누구보다 욕망에 충실하죠.&n당신의 그 욕망… 제가 받아들일 수 있어서&n다행이에요.

1001403884.english: They say licking the chin is a sign of submission. Master, excuse me for a moment— Hmm... if I do that, the meaning changes...
1001403884.korean: 턱을 핥는 것은 복종의 표시라고 해요.&n주인님, 잠시 실례할- 음…&n이러면, 의미가 달라져버리는데...

1001403885.english: I really wish you would answer me. Why does the Commander look out for me so much? I just— uh, how can you say you like me so easily! … I like you too.
1001403885.korean: 꼭 대답해줬으면 좋겠다. 왜 사령관은 나를&n이렇게나 챙겨주는 건가? 나는 그저- 어, 어떻게&n좋아한다는 말을 그리 쉽게 하는 건가!&n…나도, 좋아한다.

1001403886.english: Watching you writhe in pleasure, Master... please stay still. It’s far from over yet.
1001403886.korean: 쾌락에 몸을 비트는 주인님의 모습을 보는 건&n정말… 얌전히 계세요. 끝나려면 아직 멀었으니까.

1001403887.english: Okay. It’s not quite the thrill of gambling, but this isn’t bad either.
1001403887.korean: 좋아. 도박의 짜릿함 만큼은 아니지만,&n이것도 나쁘진 않지.

1001403889.english: Pfft. Can you please stop talking about hearts connecting or healing? It gives me goosebumps. Just keep going. I know everything without you even saying it.
1001403889.korean: 풉. 마음이 이어지니 치유되니 그런 말 하지&n말아줄래? 소름돋거든? 그냥 계속하기나 해.&n말 안해도 다 알고 있어.

1001403890.english: I can tell what you want without even seeing it. Please tell me everything. Because… I want that too.
1001403890.korean: 보지 않아도 당신이 바라는 건 알 수있어요.&n전부 제게 털어놔줘요. 저도… 그걸 원하니까.

1001403892.english: I don't really know why the commander is so obsessed with me...
1001403892.korean: 어째서 사령관이 내게 그렇게 열중하는지…&n잘 모르겠다.

1001403893.english: Could you please bear with me just a little longer? It's my turn now, so please quietly entrust yourself to me, Master.
1001403893.korean: 조금만 참아주시겠어요? 지금은 제 차례니까,&n주인님은 얌전히 제게 몸을 맡기세요.

1001403894.english: Heh… this might get better… I'll know for sure if I try a little more.
1001403894.korean: 헤에… 이게 더 좋아질지도 모르겠네…&n좀 더 해봐야 확실히 알겠어.

1001403895.english: For some reason... I feel like I want to receive only yours directly. ...Yes. All of your desires.
1001403895.korean: 어쩐지... 당신의 것만은 제가 직접 받아들이고&n싶은 기분이 드네요. ...그래요.&n당신의 욕망을, 전부.

1001403896.english: Pfft. Don't say things like ‘hearts connect and heal'—it's creepy, okay? Just keep going. I already know without you saying it.
1001403896.korean: 풉. 마음이 이어지니 치유되니 그런 말 하지&n말아줄래? 소름돋거든? 그냥 계속하기나 해.&n말 안해도 다 알고 있어.

1001403897.english: Even without looking, I know what you want. Tell me everything. Because I want that too.
1001403897.korean: 보지 않아도 당신이 바라는 건 알 수있어요.&n전부 제게 털어놔줘요. 저도… 그걸 원하니까.

1001403898.english: So I just lie down again today…? Haa, master...

1001403899.english: I've felt it before, but at times like this the commander really looks happy. The one who's actually feeling good is me though… alright. Then let's be together...
1001403899.korean: 전부터 느꼈지만, 이럴 때 사령관은 정말&n기뻐보인다. 정작 기분 좋은 건 나인데…&n알았다. 그러면 함께...

1001403900.english: You say you'll give back as much as you received? Fine. The more you do, master… I get even hotter.
1001403900.korean: 받은 만큼 돌려주시겠다고요? 좋아요. 주인님이&n그러실 수록… 저는 더 뜨거워지니까.

1001403901.english: Huh? Ah, I'm trying. But how could I stop overnight? Now that I have more time, just wait a bit.
1001403901.korean: 응? 아아, 노력은 하고 있어. 그래도 어떻게&n하루 아침에 그만두겠어. 이제는 시간 많으니까,&n좀 기다려봐.

1001403902.english: You won't be able to go back to how you were before. You've been through too much. But as you said… the future is what matters.
1001403902.korean: 예전 모습으로 돌아갈 수는 없을 거예요.&n너무 많은 일을 겪었으니까. 그래도 당신의&n말대로… 앞으로가 중요하겠죠.

1001403903.english: As long as I can stay by your side, I'm fine no matter what I look like.
1001403903.korean: 주인님의 곁을 지킬 수만 있다면,&n저는 어떤 모습이라도 좋아요.

1001403904.english: I thought I was confident in my stamina, but looks like I lacked training. …That's not training! That kind of thing might… be okay though.
1001403904.korean: 체력은 자신 있다고 생각했었는데, 훈련이&n부족했던 모양이다. …그건 훈련이 아니지 않은가!&n그런 걸로는… 괘, 괜찮을지도 모르겠다.

1001403905.english: Tonight and tomorrow night, you'll let me hear your sweet voice, right? I'm looking forward to it.
1001403905.korean: 오늘 밤도, 내일 밤도 달콤한 목소리를&n들려주시겠죠? 기대하고 있을게요.

1001403906.english: If you want to motivate me, try preparing a great stage first. I'll think about it then.
1001403906.korean: 내가 의욕을 내게 만들려면 멋진 무대부터&n준비해봐. 그 다음에 생각해볼게.

1001403907.english: Ugh. Don't tease me like that! I could have at least gotten the tomato juice— Ah. You brought it for me? ...Thanks.
1001403907.korean: 윽. 그렇게 놀리지 마! 토마토 쥬스 정도는&n내가 가져다- 앗. 가져와 준 거야? ...고마워.

1001403908.english: The only way to go beyond your innate abilities is through ceaseless effort.
1001403908.korean: 타고난 능력을 넘어서서 나아갈 방법은&n끊임 없는 노력 뿐이에요.

1001403909.english: I knew it, but... you really can be mischievous at times.
1001403909.korean: 알고는 있었지만…&n그대는 정말 짓궂을 때가 있소.

1001403910.english: I shall serve you this meal. Please focus solely on enjoying this fine dining, Master.
1001403910.korean: 소첩이 식사 시중을 들겠사옵니다. 주인께서는&n미식을 즐기시는 것에만 집중하시옵소서.

1001403911.english: Are you really living in a place like this? Haa... I used to have a huge, antique private room with several attendants... Even so, surely there's at least some tomato juice, right? Go get some quickly.
1001403911.korean: 이런 곳에서 지내는 거야? 하아… 원래는 커다랗고&n고풍스러운 개인실에, 내 시중을 드는 애들만&n여럿이었는데… 아무리 그래도 토마토 주스&n정도는 있겠지? 얼른 가져와.

1001403912.english: I was definitely ill-mannered back then. I'm glad I met you, even if it's late. But sometimes... I might want to get scolded...
1001403912.korean: 확실히 예전의 난 버릇이 없었지. 뒤늦게라도&n널 만나서 다행이야.&n근데 가끔은… 혼나고 싶을지도...

1001403913.english: No matter what enemy I face, I will protect the others and the Commander with this shining spear and shield.
1001403913.korean: 어떤 적과 맞서든지, 이 빛나는 창과 방패로&n다른 분들과 사령관님을 지킬 거예요.

1001403914.english: To think I look this embarrassing… Please, please don't stare at me like that.
1001403914.korean: 이렇게 민망한 꼴이라니…&n그, 그렇게 뚫어져라 보지 말아주시오.

1001403915.english: Seeing Master happy with the food I have prepared is the supreme pleasure for me.
1001403915.korean: 주인이 소첩이 만든 요리에 기뻐하는 것이야말로&n소첩에겐 지고의 쾌락이옵니다.

1001403916.english: Is the theme park still there? I need to stay there comfortably once my activity period ends. What's wrong? Why the long face? Are you jealous?
1001403916.korean: 테마파크는 아직 남아있어? 활동 기간이 끝나면&n거기서 편안히 지내야 한단말야.&n뭐야, 표정이 왜 그래? 부러워?

1001403917.english: Things like that happen at theme parks… Uh, uh, you wouldn’t do that, right? I’ll do anything…
1001403917.korean: 테마파크에선 그런 일이…&n저, 저기, 너는 안 그럴거지?&n나, 뭐든지 할테니까...

1001403918.english: I am training even harder than before. I do not want to bring shame upon the Commander, who gave me this magnificent armor.
1001403918.korean: 훈련은 예전보다도 더 열심히 하고 있어요.&n절 위해 이런 멋진 갑옷을 주신 사령관님에게&n부끄러운 모습을 보이지 않도록요.

1001403919.english: Are you satisfied now? Then hurry up and change before the squad members see— … …! Now, hide me for a moment!
1001403919.korean: 이제 만족했소? 그럼 부대원들이 보기 전에&n어서 환복을- …...! 자, 잠깐 숨겨주시오!

1001403920.english: Is today not a meaningful day? My humble servant and the kitchen staff have prepared this with even greater care than usual.
1001403920.korean: 오늘은 뜻깊은 날이 아니옵니까. 소첩과 주방 분들이&n평소보다도 정성껏 준비했사옵니다.

1001403921.english: Hmm, what? There were quite a few famous people here, too, you know? Well, not as famous as me, though.
1001403921.korean: 흐응, 뭐야. 여기도 유명했던 애들이 꽤 있잖아?&n뭐, 나만큼은 아니지만.

1001403922.english: Ugh. Don't tease me like that! I could have at least gotten the tomato juice— Ah. You brought it for me? ...Thanks.
1001403922.korean: 윽. 그렇게 놀리지 마! 토마토 쥬스 정도는&n내가 가져다- 앗. 가져와 준 거야? ...고마워.

1001403923.english: Whether for home use, combat, or rescue... I don't think there is any need to be bound by the abilities given to you at birth. At least, that is what I believe.
1001403923.korean: 가정용이든, 전투용이든, 구조용이든…&n태어났을 때 주어진 능력에 얽매여있을 필요는&n없다고 생각해요. 적어도 저는, 그렇게 믿고 있어요.

1001403924.english: Please don't pinpoint exactly what's wrong with me like that. It's embarrassing...
1001403924.korean: 그렇게 콕 찝어서 어, 어디가 어떻다고&n이야기하지 말아주시오. 민망하오...

1001403925.english: I have put nothing in it, so please eat with peace of mind. … To be honest, a little of my affection has gone into it.
1001403925.korean: 아무것도 넣지 않았사오니, 안심하고&n드셔주시옵소서.&n…사실 소첩의 애정이 조금, 들어갔사옵니다.

1001403926.english: You destroyed the theme park? Then go ahead and rebuild it. And of course, I’ll give you the best room in the castle. ...Well, I’ll make an exception and let you stay in the room right next to mine.
1001403926.korean: 테마파크를 부숴버렸다고? 그럼 어서 재건하도록&n해. 성의 가장 좋은 방은 당연히 나한테 주고.&n...뭐, 특별히 너는 내 바로 옆 방에서 지내게 해줄게.

1001403927.english: I was definitely ill-mannered back then. I'm glad I met you, even if it's late. But sometimes... I might want to get scolded...
1001403927.korean: 확실히 예전의 난 버릇이 없었지. 뒤늦게라도&n널 만나서 다행이야.&n근데 가끔은… 혼나고 싶을지도...

1001403928.english: You once told me to take an interest in things other than training every now and then. Then… would it be alright if I took an interest in you, Commander…?
1001403928.korean: 가끔씩은 훈련이 아닌 다른 것에도 관심을 가져&n보라고 하셨었죠. 그러면… 사령관님한테 관심을&n가져도 괜찮을까요…?

1001403929.english: Fortunately, I wasn't caught... I've fought on countless battlefields, but I've never been this nervous. ...Then, won't you let go now? I keep touching you, though...
1001403929.korean: 다행히 들키지 않았군… 수많은 전장에서&n싸워왔지만, 이렇게나 긴장된 적은 처음이오.&n...그럼 이제 슬슬 놔주지 않겠소?&n자꾸, 닿고 있소만...

1001403930.english: I wish days like this would continue. Just like today, where I prepare the meal and you, Master, eat it... I mean such ordinary days.
1001403930.korean: 이런 하루가 계속 이어졌으면 좋겠사옵니다.&n오늘처럼 소첩이 식사를 준비하고, 주인께서&n드시는… 그런 평범한 하루 말이옵니다.

1001403931.english: What are you doing? Hurry up and get me some cold tomato juice— Huh? Are you, are you angry? With that scary face… Ack?! I, I’m sorry, I really am sorry… P-Please don’t scold me...
1001403931.korean: 뭐하고 있어? 얼른 시원한 토마토 쥬스를- 어?&n화, 화 난 거야? 그렇게 무서운 얼굴로… 꺅?!&n자, 잘못했어, 잘못했으니까아…&n호, 혼내지 말아주세요...

1001403932.english: Things like that happen at theme parks… Uh, uh, you wouldn’t do that, right? I’ll do anything…
1001403932.korean: 테마파크에선 그런 일이…&n저, 저기, 너는 안 그럴거지?&n나, 뭐든지 할테니까...

1001403933.english: When I fight wearing this armor, it feels like the Commander is right beside me. I can feel the Commander's heart always worrying about me and encouraging me... so I can fight without fear.
1001403933.korean: 이 갑옷을 입고 싸우면, 사령관님이 곁에 계신&n것 같아요. 항상 저를 걱정해주시고, 격려해주시는&n사령관님의 마음이 느껴져서…&n두려움 없이 싸울 수 있어요.

1001403934.english: Of course, I am ashamed to the point of death. Still… granting the wish of the one I love is a joyful thing for me as well.
1001403934.korean: 당연히 죽을 정도로 부끄럽소. 그래도…&n연모하는 이의 소망을 들어주는 것은&n나에게도 기쁜 일이오.

1001403935.english: I will never forget the grace of my master for trusting this unworthy concubine. Anytime, anywhere... for the sake of my master's gourmet cuisine, I will not hesitate to crawl through the mud.
1001403935.korean: 못난 소첩을 믿어주신 주인의 은혜,&n평생 잊지않을것이옵니다.&n언제든, 어디서든…&n주인의 미식을 위해서라면&n소첩은 진흙탕을 기는 것도 마다하지&n않을 것이옵니다.

1001403936.english: Can't you let go? Ugh, that's annoying...
1001403936.korean: 손 떼지 못해? 으으, 기분 나빠...

1001403937.english: ...Not like this, but like the first day— Ugh… Yes. Like that...

1001403938.english: If you... then I keep thinking about it during training...
1001403938.korean: 그, 그러시면… 훈련 중에 자꾸&n생각난단 말이에요...

1001403939.english: Ugh... uh, I'm not sure where to cover...
1001403939.korean: 윽… 어, 어디를 가려야 할 지...

1001403941.english: Hyaa… t-this is a special permission, so take it as an honor.
1001403941.korean: 햐읏… 트, 특별히 허락해주는 거니까&n영광으로 알아.

1001403942.english: ...Not like this but like the first day—ah… yes. Like that...

1001403943.english: Commander… yes. This is to prevent me from thinking about it during training, in advance...
1001403943.korean: 사령관니임… 네. 이건… 훈련중에 생각나지&n않도록, 미리 예방하는 거니까...

1001403944.english: Ugh… does this outfit move your heart? Today more than usual…
1001403944.korean: 읏… 이 복장에 마음이 동한 것이오?&n오늘은 평소보다도 훨씬...

1001403945.english: Hehe, can't wait until dessert is served? Then take your time… please savor me.
1001403945.korean: 후후, 디저트를 내올때까지 기다리지&n못하는 것이옵니까. 그렇다면 천천히…&n소첩을 맛보아주시지요.

1001403946.english: Can I sit next to you...? Yeah… Yesterday, um, no. It was better than being sick, surprisingly.
1001403946.korean: 옆에 앉아도 돼…? 응…&n저기 어제는… 아, 아냐. 아픈 것보다 그…&n좋았어, 의외로.

1001403947.english: Thanks to your encouragement, I've come this far, and because you say you love me, I feel like I can go even further. I really love you, commander.
1001403947.korean: 사령관님의 격려 덕분에 제가 여기까지 올 수&n있었고, 사랑한다는 말 덕분에 여기서 더 나아갈 수&n있을 것 같아요. 정말로 사랑해요, 사령관님.

1001403948.english: Did you bring other squad members' clothes...? M-master, please look away just while I change.
1001403948.korean: 또 다른 대원들의 옷을 가져오신겁니까…&n서, 서방님. 갈아입을 때만이라도&n잠깐 다른 곳을 봐주세요.

1001403949.english: Just seeing you eat fills me up. Hehe, what are you thinking…?
1001403949.korean: 주인이 식사하시는 모습만 보아도 소첩은&n배가 부르옵니다. 후후, 무슨 생각을…&n하시는 것이옵니까…?

1001403950.english: What a mess. As if the Order's angels and inquisitors weren't enough, the Savior is breaking the law along with them. This needs to be set right.
1001403950.korean: 엉망이군. 교단의 천사와 이단심문관도 모자라서,&n구원자가 그들과 함께 율법을 어기다니.&n바로잡을 필요가 있겠어.

1001403951.english: From everyone in the technical department to my precious younger colleagues... I've received so much help from others. Would you like to come with me to express your gratitude? Um... just a little later.
1001403951.korean: 기술부 여러분부터, 소중한 동생들까지…&n다른 분들에게 너무 큰 도움을 받았어요.&n같이 감사드리러 가주시겠어요?&n저… 조금, 이따가요.

1001403952.english: Are you the savior of the prophecy… No. To doubt the prophecy of the Holy Light—it is impossible.
1001403952.korean: 네가 예언의 구원자인가… 아니다. 신성한 빛의 예언에&n의문을 품다니, 있을 수 없는 일이지.

1001403953.english: I'm ready. Rather, I can accept your heart— The, the pillow…! ...Yes. The back is the same.
1001403953.korean: 마음의 준비는 됐어요. 오히려 당신의&n마음을 받아들일 수- 베, 베개는…!&n...네. 뒷면도 똑같, 아요.

1001403954.english: My role is to realize the will of the Light and the justice of the Order by any means necessary. Force is merely one of many methods.
1001403954.korean: 무슨 수단을 써서라도 빛의 뜻과 교단의 정의를&n실현하는 것이 내 역할이다. 무력은&n여러 수단 중 하나일 뿐.

1001403955.english: This control device is hideous, isn't it? I couldn't remove this one no matter what. ...Thanks to your kindness, I've been able to hold out until now.
1001403955.korean: 이 제어장치, 흉측하죠? 이것만큼은 어떻게해도&n떼어낼 수 없었어요. ...당신의 그 상냥함 덕분에,&n지금까지 버틸 수 있었어요.

1001403956.english: ...I will suspend punishment against them at your request. However, remember this. The laws of the Order take precedence over everything else. Neither Azazel nor you, the Savior, are exceptions.
1001403956.korean: ...요청에 따라 그들에 대한 처벌은 보류하겠다.&n다만, 기억해라. 교단의 율법은 그 무엇보다 우선한다.&n아자젤이나, 구원자인 너도 예외가 아니다.

1001403957.english: When we stand shoulder to shoulder like this, I can feel all of your emotions, Commander. Worry, interest... even deep affection. ...Can you feel my heart, too...?
1001403957.korean: 이렇게 어깨를 맞대고 있으면, 사령관님의&n감정이 전부 느껴져요. 걱정, 관심… 깊은 애정까지도.&n...제 마음도, 느껴지시나요…?

1001403958.english: Certainly, you have the right and the duty to amend the law. Even so, do not forget that the Savior acts merely as a representative of the will of light.
1001403958.korean: 확실히, 네겐 율법을 수정할 권리와 의무가 있다.&n그렇다 할지라도, 구원자는 빛의 뜻을 대리할&n뿐이라는 것을 잊지 마라.

1001403959.english: You don't have to keep asking if I'm okay. You are truly a kind person...
1001403959.korean: 그렇게 계속 괜찮냐고 물어보시지 않으셔도 돼요.&n정말로, 상냥하신 분…

1001403960.english: The voice of light is clearly whispering that you are the savior. But what on earth is this unsettling feeling… Do not worry. Apart from that, I know that you are a righteous human being.
1001403960.korean: 빛의 목소리는 분명 네가 구원자라고 속삭이고 있다.&n하지만 이 위화감은 대체… 걱정하지 마라. 그것과&n별개로, 네가 올바른 인간이라는 것은 알고 있으니.

1001403961.english: I have finally found a place to stay. To you who healed my wounds and loved me… I will dedicate my all.
1001403961.korean: 드디어 제가 머무를 곳을 찾았어요. 제 상처를&n치유해주고, 사랑해주신 당신께… 제 전부를 바칠게요.

1001403962.english: Hmph... The light will punish your impiety.
1001403962.korean: 큭… 네 불경함을 빛이 징벌할 거다.

1001403964.english: This is an act that violates the order's laws. Stop immediately—ugh…?!
1001403964.korean: 이건, 교단의 율법에... 어긋나는, 행위다.&n당장 멈추- 읏…?!

1001403965.english: Ugh… no. I'm just so happy I can finally accept you… please keep going like this.
1001403965.korean: 읏… 아니에요. 드디어 당신을 받아들일&n수 있게 된 게 너무 기뻐서…&n이대로 계속, 부탁드려요.

1001403966.english: Savior, you are the hope of us all. We thank the Light who sent the savior before us.
1001403966.korean: 구원자여, 그대는 우리 모두의 희망이다.&n구원자를 우리 앞에 내려주신 빛께 감사를.

1001403967.english: Sometimes I get scared wondering if it's okay to be this happy, but it's alright. Every time that happens, you… always hold me tight.
1001403967.korean: 가끔씩 이렇게 행복해도 되는지 무서워지지만,&n괜찮아요. 그럴 때마다 당신이… 꼭 안아주시니까요.

1001403968.english: B-banished as a battle maid — what rude words to put in one's mouth. This one has merely moved to a place where this one's immense power can be better put to use.
1001403968.korean: 배, 배틀메이드로 쫓겨났다니, 무례한 말을&n입에 담는구나. 첩은 그저, 이 강대한 힘을더욱&n잘 활용할 수 있는 곳으로 옮겨갔을 뿐이다.

1001403969.english: Before I knew it, your scent, your voice... even your body temperature have all become familiar. Ugh. Hey, how long do you intend to keep talking about such old stories...!
1001403969.korean: 어느새 그대의 냄새, 목소리… 체온까지 전부&n익숙해졌구나. 윽. 어, 언제까지 그런&n옛날 이야기를 하고 있을 셈이더냐…!

1001403970.english: You know what? The Commander likes animals, right? You can't deny it. I've seen you playing with Bori, Tiger, and the penguins quite often. You ask why I'm asking all of a sudden? Hmm... just because~
1001403970.korean: 있지. 사령관은 동물, 좋아하지? 아니라곤&n말 못할걸? 보리랑, 타이거랑, 또 펭귄들이랑&n노는 거 자주 봤어. 갑자기 왜 물어보냐구?&n흐음… 그냥~

1001403971.english: That look in your eyes… You bastard, what do you intend to do to the concubine! Th-I’m sure she’ll make a complete mess of everything… Ugh… Not that…
1001403971.korean: 그 눈빛은… 네녀석, 첩을 어떻게 할 생각인게냐!&n부, 분명 여기저기를 엉망진창으로…&n으으… 그것만은...

1001403972.english: Hiyat?! ...You really do like tails, don't you? Come to think of it, you've been like this since the first day we met... Hey, didn't I tell you to touch them gently if you were going to?
1001403972.korean: 히얏?! ...그대는 정~말로 꼬리를 좋아하는구나.&n그러고보면 처음 만난 날부터 그랬었지…&n마, 만질 거면 상냥하게 만져달라고 했지 않느냐.

1001403973.english: Hmm, this is… right. Since there’s the New Year’s event and a few other things, I prepared this. What do you think? Does it suit you?
1001403973.korean: 으음, 이건… 그렇지. 신년 행사랑, 또 이것저것&n있으니까 준비해봤어. 어때? 잘 어울려?

1001403974.english: The concubine is a priestess serving the sacred radiance. I will protect you— Hey, wait! Don't come that close!
1001403974.korean: 첩은 신성한 광휘를 모시는 무녀. 그대를 지켜-&n자, 잠깐! 그렇게 가까이 오지 말거라!

1001403975.english: You show a rare moment of weakness. This one is a being who embraces and nurtures all things in heaven and earth. This one can indulge your childishness for all eternity. Come here.
1001403975.korean: 드물게 약한 모습을 보이는구나. 첩은&n천지만물을 품에 안고 길러내는 자.&n그대 하나의 어리광 정도는 미래영겁&n받아줄 수 있느니라. 자, 이리 오거라.

1001403976.english: The kids said that if I don't know about anything else, I absolutely have to be the fox. Saying something about it being cunning or something... Do you think so, Commander?
1001403976.korean: 애들이 다른 건 몰라도 여우는 꼭 해야된다고&n그러더라구. 요망하다나 어쨌다나…&n사령관도 그런 것 같아?

1001403977.english: A concubine needs nothing like your interest. Anyway— Ah… are you leaving? Ah, no. You are busy, so… don't worry about me and go about your business.
1001403977.korean: 그대의 관심 같은 건 첩에겐 필요치 않다. 어차피-&n아… 가는 것이냐? 아, 아니다. 그대는 바쁘니까…&n첩은 신경쓰지 말고 일 보거라.

1001403978.english: Before I knew it, your scent, your voice... even your body temperature have all become familiar. Ugh. Hey, how long do you intend to keep talking about such old stories...!
1001403978.korean: 어느새 그대의 냄새, 목소리… 체온까지 전부&n익숙해졌구나. 윽. 어, 언제까지 그런&n옛날 이야기를 하고 있을 셈이더냐…!

1001403979.english: Hmm... I'm sorry to the fox, but its howl isn't very cute. Then instead... Woof, woof. Or... Meow~? Commander, why are you grinning like that~?
1001403979.korean: 으음… 여우한테는 미안하지만, 여우 울음 소리는&n별로 안 귀엽네. 그럼 그 대신…&n왕, 왕. 아니면… 냐앙~?&n우리 사령관님, 왜 그렇게 실실 웃고 있어요~?

1001403980.english: Promise me that you will treat your concubine kindly. Th-then... it is alright if you come a little, just a tiny bit closer.
1001403980.korean: 첩을 상냥하게 대해주겠다고 약조하거라. 그, 그러면…&n조금, 아주 조금은 가까이 와도... 괜찮다.

1001403981.english: Hiyat?! ...You really do like tails, don't you? Come to think of it, you've been like this since the first day we met... Hey, didn't I tell you to touch them gently if you were going to?
1001403981.korean: 히얏?! ...그대는 정~말로 꼬리를 좋아하는구나.&n그러고보면 처음 만난 날부터 그랬었지…&n마, 만질 거면 상냥하게 만져달라고 했지 않느냐.

1001403982.english: Hehe, doesn't it look like a real tail now? It took me a really long time to set it up. ...A different tail? No way, you dummy. ...I'll think about it later.
1001403982.korean: 헤헷, 이러니까 진짜 꼬리 같아 보이지?&n세팅하는데 엄청 오래걸렸어. ...다른 꼬리?&n안돼, 바보야. ...나, 나중에 생각해볼게.

1001403983.english: Really… my dear, haven’t you been fiddling with it for hours already? You might get tired of just the tail, so try stroking other places. Like your ears, or your head…
1001403983.korean: 정말… 그대여, 벌써 몇 시간째 만지작거리고 있지&n않느냐. 그, 꼬리만이면 질릴 수도 있으니, 다른 곳도&n쓰다듬어 보거라. 귀라던가, 머리라던가...

1001403984.english: You show a rare moment of weakness. This one is a being who embraces and nurtures all things in heaven and earth. This one can indulge your childishness for all eternity. Come here.
1001403984.korean: 드물게 약한 모습을 보이는구나. 첩은&n천지만물을 품에 안고 길러내는 자.&n그대 하나의 어리광 정도는 미래영겁&n받아줄 수 있느니라. 자, 이리 오거라.

1001403985.english: Actually… it’s been a while since we met, you know? So, just in case you might get bored… I thought of something you might like, Commander. ...How is it? Do you like me more now?
1001403985.korean: 사실… 우리 만난지 오래됐잖아? 그래서 혹~시&n지루해할까봐… 사령관이 좋아할 만한 걸&n생각해봤어. ...어때? 나, 더 좋아졌어?

1001403987.english: You are far more… ah… remarkable than this one had ever imagined. Go ahead, then… make a complete mess of this one again today.
1001403987.korean: 그대는 첩이 상상하던 것보다 훨씬 더…&n그… 대단, 하구나. 어디 오늘도 첩을…&n엉망진창으로 만들어보거라.

1001403988.english: My clothes are all getting wrinkled...

1001403989.english: I knew it. As expected, I was destined to be ravaged by your dark desires… …W-what are you doing? Until you're satisfied, I'll hold you close.
1001403989.korean: 이럴 줄 알았다. 역시 첩은 그대의 시커먼&n욕망에 유린당할 운명이었던게지…&n...무, 뭐하고 있느냐. 그대가 성에 찰 때까지,&n첩이  품어주겠다.

1001403990.english: You are far more… ah… remarkable than this one had ever imagined. Go ahead, then… make a complete mess of this one again today.
1001403990.korean: 그대는 첩이 상상하던 것보다 훨씬 더…&n그… 대단, 하구나. 어디 오늘도 첩을…&n엉망진창으로 만들어보거라.

1001403991.english: You seem less relaxed than usual today...? I really, really love you, commander.
1001403991.korean: 오늘은 평소보다 여유가 없네...? &n진짜진짜 좋아해, 사령관.

1001403992.english: Try to be a little quiet. When I'm in your arms… it feels cool and good.
1001403992.korean: 조금만 얌전히 있어 보거라. 그대에게 안기면…&n시원해서 기분이 좋다.

1001403993.english: You want me to wear other clothes too? No, no. Even if it doesn't seem like it, I was really embarrassed. …Eheh, what's this? Master~ Do you like this so much~?
1001403993.korean: 다른 옷도 입어달라구? 안돼안돼. 아닌 것&n같아도 나, 엄청 부끄러웠단 말이야. ...에헷, 뭐야.&n서방니임~ 이게 그렇게 좋으셨사옵니까아~?

1001403994.english: I'm off to take on a Salamander right now. Do you want to come along? This time, I'm definitely going to take it down and put that smirk on its face!
1001403994.korean: 지금부터 샐러맨더랑 한 판 붙으러 갈건데,&n너도 같이 갈래? 이번에야말로 따서&n그 실실 웃는 얼굴을 납작하게 해줄거라고!

1001403995.english: Hey, husband. Let's talk. Th-look at this. The bomb you made has five layers of safety mechanisms—th-do you think this makes any sense?!
1001403995.korean: 야, 남편. 우리 얘기 좀 하자. 이… 이것 좀 보라고.&n네가 만들어준 폭탄에 안전장치가 다섯 겹이나&n되는데, 이, 이게 말이나 된다고 생각해?!

1001403996.english: This dress is absolutely perfect for my taste. From the design to the material, and… even your reaction—it’s really my style.
1001403996.korean: 정말 제 취향에 딱 맞는 드레스에요.&n디자인부터 재질, 그리고… 자기의 반응도,&n정말 제 취향이네요.

1001403997.english: Ah... yes. You are busy, Master. Still, please stop by just this once after you finish work.
1001403997.korean: 아… 네. 주인님은 바쁘시니까요.&n그래도 일 끝나시면 한 번만 들러주세요.

1001403998.english: Charges and bombs, you see... um... how should I put it? Yeah, they're like explosions. Because that's all I live for!
1001403998.korean: 돌격과 폭탄은 말이지, 음… 뭐랄까.&n그래, 폭발같은 거야.&n나는 그것만을 위해 살아가니까!

1001403999.english: Hahaha, of course I won't wear this ring! Even if I get completely stripped naked, this is a no-no. I absolutely must not take it off my body— Ah, right! Should I make it explode if you take it off?
1001403999.korean: 꺄하핫, 당연히 이 반지는 안 걸지! 탈탈 털려서 홀딱&n벗겨져도 이것만은 안 돼. 절대로 몸에서 떼어놓-&n아, 그렇지! 이거, 빼면 폭발하게 만들까?

1001404000.english: Our models used to wear various outfits for operations. Wedding dresses… they probably wore them, too, right? Though they probably weren't as happy as this.
1001404000.korean: 저희 모델들은 작전을 위해 여러 의상을 입곤 했어요.&n웨딩드레스도… 아마 입었었겠죠?&n이렇게나 행복하지는 않았겠지만요.

1001404001.english: Cough, cough… I’m sorry, Master. I’m not feeling well… May I rest for a little while…?
1001404001.korean: 콜록, 콜록… 죄송해요, 주인님. 저, 몸이 안좋아서요…&n조금만 쉬어도 될까요…?

1001404002.english: Huh? Ah, well, I'm holding this shotgun just because it feels a bit empty with my hands, I guess... how should I put it... The real deal is this bomb! Want to take a look? Here, isn't it super pretty?
1001404002.korean: 응? 아아, 이 샷건은 그냥 빈손이면 허전해서&n드는 거랄까, 뭐랄까… 진짜는 이 폭탄이라고!&n한 번 볼래? 자, 엄~청 예쁘지?

1001404003.english: Are your shoulders okay? I accidentally bit them without even realizing it~ Come here. I'll put some ointment on them. ...It's not my fault, though? I mean, who told you to make me go *that* crazy?
1001404003.korean: 어깨 괜찮아? 나도 모르게 깨물어버렸지 뭐야~&n이리 와. 약 발라줄게. ...내 잘못 아닌데?&n그러게 누가 그렇게 뿅~가게 만들래?

1001404004.english: You mean the holster? It feels a bit empty without it.

1001404005.english: If Master nurses me back to health… I might get better soon…?

1001404006.english: Ugh, I'm broke again... Hey, Commander. Can you lend me some tuna? I'll definitely win some and pay you back later. Okay? Okay?
1001404006.korean: 에이,  또 개털됐네… 야, 사령관. 참치 좀 빌려줄래?&n나중에 꼭 따서 갚을게. 응? 응응?

1001404007.english: Hey, husband. Let's talk. Th-look at this. The bomb you made has five layers of safety mechanisms—th-do you think this makes any sense?!
1001404007.korean: 야, 남편. 우리 얘기 좀 하자. 이… 이것 좀 보라고.&n네가 만들어준 폭탄에 안전장치가 다섯 겹이나&n되는데, 이, 이게 말이나 된다고 생각해?!

1001404008.english: Looks like you like it, too? You don't need to keep glancing at me like that...
1001404008.korean: 자기도 마음에 드나보죠?&n그렇게 힐끔힐끔 보지 않아도 괜찮은데...

1001404009.english: Since you are by my side, I feel relieved that you are sick. Am I... a bad child?
1001404009.korean: 제 옆에 계셔주시니, 아파서 다행이라는&n생각이 들어요. 저… 나쁜 아이일까요?

1001404010.english: Hey, hey, look. This is a bomb I modified, and the lethal radius is a whopping five times bigger! Hahaha, isn't that amazing? ...The backlash? Why worry about that?
1001404010.korean: 야야, 봐봐. 이거 내가 개조한 폭탄인데, 살상 반경이&n자그마치 다섯 배라고! 꺄하핫, 대단하지 않아?&n...후폭풍? 그런 걸 왜 걱정해?

1001404011.english: Hahaha, of course I won't wear this ring! Even if I get completely stripped naked, this is a no-no. I absolutely must not take it off my body— Ah, right! Should I make it explode if you take it off?
1001404011.korean: 꺄하핫, 당연히 이 반지는 안 걸지! 탈탈 털려서 홀딱&n벗겨져도 이것만은 안 돼. 절대로 몸에서 떼어놓-&n아, 그렇지! 이거, 빼면 폭발하게 만들까?

1001404012.english: Hehe, I thought I’d never be able to take a weapon off my body for the rest of my life… but I can be a little more comfortable by your side, right?
1001404012.korean: 후후, 평생 몸에서 무기를 떼어 놓을 일은&n없을 줄 알았는데… 자기 곁에서는 조금,&n편하게 있어도 되겠죠?

1001404013.english: W-wait a moment. Sweat... Eek...? ...It's narrower than I thought. Please come closer...
1001404013.korean: 자, 잠시만요. 땀이… 꺅…? …생각보다 좁네요.&n더 가까이 와주세요...

1001404014.english: You mean, be careful when we fight? Keep your distance? Eh, no way. If that's the case, why even fight? ...Well, if you insist... I'll throw from a step or two away. Got it?
1001404014.korean: 싸울때 조심 좀 하라고? 거리를 두고? 에에, 싫어.&n그럴거면 뭐하러 싸워? ...뭐, 네가 그렇게까지&n말한다면… 한두발짝 정도는 멀리서 던질게. 됐지?

1001404015.english: Are your shoulders okay? I accidentally bit them without even realizing it~ Come here. I'll put some ointment on them. ...It's not my fault, though? I mean, who told you to make me go *that* crazy?
1001404015.korean: 어깨 괜찮아? 나도 모르게 깨물어버렸지 뭐야~&n이리 와. 약 발라줄게. ...내 잘못 아닌데?&n그러게 누가 그렇게 뿅~가게 만들래?

1001404016.english: Maybe in the past, but right now... I thought Amy Razor would be useless. But... I think I've found a new role. How about being my husband's wife... and the mother of our cute child?
1001404016.korean: 과거라면 모를까, 지금은 저… 에이미 레이저는&n쓸모 없을 거라고 생각했어요. 그런데… 이제&n새로운 역할을 찾은 것 같아요. 우리 자기의&n아내이자… 귀여운 아이의 엄마는, 어떨까요?

1001404017.english: I'm sorry. Actually, um... it's not that I'm really sick... Ah, no. I am in pain, it really hurts... so could you... give me an injection...?
1001404017.korean: 죄송해요. 사실, 저… 진짜로 아픈 게 아니라…&n아, 아니에요. 아파요, 진짜 아프니까…&n주인님이 주사, 놔주시겠어요…?

1001404018.english: You really have a bad habit of hitting things~ I feel like I should just blow this up.

1001404019.english: Hey, husband. Aren't we... getting along a bit better now? From where we are right now, we just... need to stop holding it in... right?
1001404019.korean: 이봐, 남편. 우리 슬슬… 괜찮지 않아?&n지금 그상태에서 그냥…&n참는 것만 그만두면… 되는데~?

1001404020.english: Oh my, could you wait a moment? I want to enjoy this feeling a little longer...
1001404020.korean: 어머, 잠깐만 기다려줄래요?&n이 기분, 조금 더 즐기고 싶으니까...

1001404021.english: Ah... um, it hurts... just a little bit, please...?

1001404022.english: If you keep doing that, I might explode? …Pfft, just kidding, just kidding. This won't explode, so do whatever you want.
1001404022.korean: 자꾸 그러면, 터질지도 모른다?&n...푸흡, 뻥이야, 뻥. 이건 폭발 같은 거&n안하니까 하고 싶은 대로 하셔.

1001404023.english: Hey, husband. Isn't it about time…? You know, it'd be fine if you just stopped holding back in that state right now~?
1001404023.korean: 이봐, 남편. 우리 슬슬… 괜찮지 않아?&n지금 그상태에서 그냥…&n참는 것만 그만두면… 되는데~?

1001404025.english: Haa… I'm so happy… I wish I could completely… become yours like this...
1001404025.korean: 하읏… 너무 기뻐요… 이대로 완전히…&n주인님의 것이 되어버렸으면...

1001404026.english: Husband, husband. Hey, there's something I want… it's not a bomb, okay?
1001404026.korean: 남편, 남편. 있지, 나 갖고 싶은게 하나 생겼는데…&n포, 폭탄 아닌데?

1001404027.english: Don't be so disappointed. Our dream to have a happy family will definitely come true.
1001404027.korean: 그렇게 아쉬워하지 말아요. 행복한 가정을&n이루고 싶다는 자기와 제 꿈은 꼭 이루어질 거예요.

1001404028.english: If I don't have master's love, I might really get hurt.
1001404028.korean: 주인님의 사랑이 없다면 진짜로 아플지도 몰라요.

1001404029.english: Rhea… yes, it’s all Rhea’s fault… If it weren’t for that detestable woman, the Queen, the Queen…. Hehe, I’ll kill her.
1001404029.korean: 레아… 그래, 전부 레아 때문이야… 그 가증스러운&n여자만 아니었다면 여왕은, 여왕은....&n후후, 죽여버리겠어.

1001404030.english: I would rather not encounter the Fairy series. If I face them... it feels like the Queen's existence is being denied. ...Right. If you affirm it, maybe it will be alright.
1001404030.korean: 페어리 시리즈와는 가급적 만나고 싶지 않아.&n그들과 마주하면... 여왕은 존재를&n부정당하는 기분이니까.&n...그래. 네가 긍정해준다면, 괜찮을지도.

1001404031.english: Ugh... What's with this sudden training... Brownie, go— Where did she go again...?
1001404031.korean: 하… 갑자기 웬 훈련이람… 브라우니,&n가서- 얘 또 어디갔어…?

1001404032.english: Commander, I'm not sure if you'll like it. It was absolute chaos preparing it in such a rush. Ah, um... yes. I received a little help from Miss Hirume.
1001404032.korean: 사령관님 마음에 드실지 모르겠네요.&n급하게 준비하느라 난리도 아니었거든요.&n아, 그… 네. 히루메 양의 도움을 조금 받았어요.

1001404033.english: You said you would make the Queen happy…? ...Hehe, hehehehe… Ahahahaha… ! … ...You. I really don't like you.
1001404033.korean: 여왕을 행복하게 해주겠다고…? ...후후, 후후후후…&n아하하하하…! …...너. 정말 마음에 안드네.

1001404034.english: This pain… I never get used to it. Sometimes my head, sometimes my whole body… aches as if it’s being squeezed. ...But still, when I’m in your arms, I can forget it for a moment.
1001404034.korean: 이 고통… 절대 익숙해지지 않아. 어쩔때는 머리가,&n어쩔때는 온 몸이… 쥐어짜는 듯이 아파.&n...그래도 네게 안겨 있으면, 잠깐 잊을 수 있어.

1001404035.english: Yawn... I guess I'll just hide away and listen to music... Music is truly my life... happiness...
1001404035.korean: 후아암… 적당히 짱박혀서 음악이나 들어야겠다…&n음악이야말로 내 삶… 행복…

1001404036.english: Oh, you already know? Just as you said, I was planning to perform a ritual to ward off bad luck for you, Commander. There are other things as well... but I'll save that for later.
1001404036.korean: 어머, 알고 계시네요? 말씀대로 사령관님께&n액운을 쫓는 의식을 치러드리려고 했어요.&n다른 것도 있지만… 그건 좀 나중에.

1001404037.english: Ugh, my head... Ow... D-Don't come... near me...!
1001404037.korean: 윽, 머리가… 아윽… 가, 가까이 오지… 마…!

1001404038.english: Do you really think you saved the Queen? That's just being overconfident. You only revived the Queen because you needed her. … …Still, the Queen thinks it's a relief to have met you.
1001404038.korean: 진짜 여왕을 구원해줬다고 생각해?&n그거, 자의식 과잉이야. 너는 네가 필요해서&n여왕을 되살렸을 뿐이잖아.&n…...그래도, 여왕은 널 만나서 다행이라고 생각해.

1001404039.english: What are you looking at? Go dig a drain— Ah, so you're the Commander. Commander… I don't want to train… Can't you excuse me? Huh…?
1001404039.korean: 뭘 봐? 가서 배수로나 까- 아, 사령관이었구나.&n사령관… 나 훈련하기 싫은데…&n빼주면 안 돼? 응…?

1001404040.english: How about you? I heard that in the country where I mainly worked, there is a tradition of welcoming the New Year with a shamaness.
1001404040.korean: 어떠신가요? 제가 주로 활동하던 나라에는&n새해를 무녀와 함께 맞이하는&n전통이 있다고 하더라구요.

1001404041.english: Why do you keep interfering? Keep trying to separate Rhea and the Queen like that— Ahaha, right. So you want to die too, huh?
1001404041.korean: 왜 자꾸 방해하는 거야? 계속 그런 식으로 레아와&n여왕을 떼어놓- 아핫, 그래. 너도 죽고 싶은 거구나?

1001404042.english: I would rather not encounter the Fairy series. If I face them... it feels like the Queen's existence is being denied. ...Right. If you affirm it, maybe it will be alright.
1001404042.korean: 페어리 시리즈와는 가급적 만나고 싶지 않아.&n그들과 마주하면... 여왕은 존재를&n부정당하는 기분이니까.&n...그래. 네가 긍정해준다면, 괜찮을지도.

1001404043.english: Yeah, don't worry... I'm keeping a tight eye on the kids— No, you're kidding, right...? I like being a Sergeant. Wow... This feels so good...
1001404043.korean: 응, 걱정 마… 애들 관리는 확실하게 하고 있-&n노, 농담이지…? 나는 병장인게 좋아.&n와아… 너무 좋다...

1001404044.english: Th-threatened? Who told you that?! Heh... Where did that leak out? Should I shut them up right now— Uh, oh my, I did it without thinking... You'll keep this a secret, right...?
1001404044.korean: 혀, 협박했다니, 누구에게 그런 말을 들으신거죠?!&n큭… 어디서 새어나간거지? 지금이라도 입막음을-&n어, 어머 저도 모르게… 이거, 비밀로 해주실거죠…?

1001404045.english: Haa, haa… Hehe, you’re mocking the Queen, aren’t you? Because that useless piece of junk is struggling pathetically. ...Don’t pity me.
1001404045.korean: 하아, 하아… 후후, 너도 여왕을 비웃고 있는거지?&n쓸모없는 폐품이 꼴사납게 발버둥치고 있으니까.&n...동정하지 마.

1001404046.english: This pain… I never get used to it. Sometimes my head, sometimes my whole body… aches as if it’s being squeezed. ...But still, when I’m in your arms, I can forget it for a moment.
1001404046.korean: 이 고통… 절대 익숙해지지 않아. 어쩔때는 머리가,&n어쩔때는 온 몸이… 쥐어짜는 듯이 아파.&n...그래도 네게 안겨 있으면, 잠깐 잊을 수 있어.

1001404047.english: Commander, isn't the foxhole uncomfortable...? I'm fine. I'm used to it... but it's still cramped... I guess I just need to move a little closer...
1001404047.korean: 사령관, 개인호 안 불편해…? 난 괜찮아. 익숙하니까…&n그래도 좁으니까... 내가 좀 더 붙으면 되겠다...

1001404048.english: Eek…?! H-hehe… Where are you putting your hand? Well, I knew you liked these kinds of mischievous pranks, Commander.
1001404048.korean: 꺅…?! 후, 후후… 어디에 손을 넣으시는 건가요?&n뭐, 사령관님이 이런 짓궂은&n장난을 좋아하시는 건 알고 있었지만요.

1001404049.english: You still haven't gotten rid of that useless stubbornness? ...The Queen knows nothing of happiness. All that remains for the Queen is... pain and hatred.
1001404049.korean: 그 쓸데없는 고집, 아직도 안 버렸어?&n...여왕은 행복 따윈 몰라. 여왕에게 남은 건 오직…&n고통과 증오 뿐이야.

1001404050.english: Do you really think you saved the Queen? That's just being overconfident. You only revived the Queen because you needed her. … …Still, the Queen thinks it's a relief to have met you.
1001404050.korean: 진짜 여왕을 구원해줬다고 생각해?&n그거, 자의식 과잉이야. 너는 네가 필요해서&n여왕을 되살렸을 뿐이잖아.&n…...그래도, 여왕은 널 만나서 다행이라고 생각해.

1001404051.english: Well, the music is good, too... but now I like your voice more, Commander... I'm going to sleep... so keep whispering in my ear...
1001404051.korean: 뭐, 음악도 좋은데…&n이제는 사령관 목소리가 더 좋아…&n나 잘테니까… 계속 귓가에 이야기 해줘...

1001404052.english: Oh my, I didn't realize so much bad energy had built up... I'll take care of it right away. You just need to stay put, Commander.
1001404052.korean: 어머, 안좋은 기운이 이렇게나 많이 쌓여있다니…&n제가 금방 처리해드릴게요.&n사령관님은 그냥 가만히 계시면 돼요.

1001404053.english: I wish I could kill you.

1001404054.english: No, it doesn't hurt. Ugh... I don't know what this is...
1001404054.korean: 아니, 아프진 않아. 읏… 뭔지, 모르겠어...

1001404055.english: Please bear with me just a little longer. We need to prepare for the ritual.

1001404056.english: Ugh… Does it hurt? This kind of pain is nothing. Do as you wish.
1001404056.korean: 윽… 아프냐고? 이런 아픔따위, 아무것도 아냐.&n원하는대로 해.

1001404057.english: No, it doesn't hurt. Ugh… I don't know what it is...
1001404057.korean: 아니, 아프진 않아. 읏… 뭔지, 모르겠어...

1001404058.english: Ugh, haa… hehe, you did well. Tell me everything like that. You still have a lot left, right…?
1001404058.korean: 읏, 하아… 후후, 잘하셨어요.&n그렇게 전부 저에게 털어놓으세요.&n아직 많이… 남으셨죠...?

1001404059.english: Am I happy? I don't know. I didn't even know what that was from the start. I just… think it's good because being by your side makes the pain less.
1001404059.korean: 행복해졌냐고? 몰라. 처음부터 그게 뭔지&n몰랐으니까. 그냥… 네 옆에선 아픔이 덜하니까,&n좋다고 생각해.

1001404060.english: If the commander trained with me, I wouldn't be able to hide… Well, I like even this kind of date.
1001404060.korean: 사령관이 같이 훈련받으면 짱박힐수가 없잖아…&n뭐, 이런 데이트라도 난 좋지만.

1001404061.english: The words about giving all my body and mind… am I properly putting them into practice?
1001404061.korean: 몸과 마음을 다 바치겠다는 말…&n저, 제대로 실천하고 있죠?

1001404062.english: Armor plates, all clear. Fusion reactor, all clear. Orbital operation confirmed. Assumed to be fully operational, we are on combat standby.
1001404062.korean: 장갑판, 이상 무. 핵융합로, 이상 무.&n궤도 가동, 확인. 작전수행에 문제 없다는&n판단하에 전투대기 중일세.

1001404063.english: I wear this outfit once a year, and I like how it fits perfectly. I guess being a forward suits me.
1001404063.korean: 해마다 한 번씩 입는 옷인데 착착 감겨서 좋아.&n공격수가 내 적성인가봐.

1001404064.english: That’s a dress befitting a special occasion. Moon— *clears throat*. What do you think, Commander? You can come a little closer to take a look. Tell me your honest opinion.
1001404064.korean: 특별한 날에 걸맞는 드레스네. 달- 흠흠.&n어때, 사령관? 좀 더 가까이 와서 봐도 좋아.&n솔직한 감상을 말해줘.

1001404065.english: As promised to you, I am not late by even a minute or a second. What brings you here?
1001404065.korean: 귀하와 나눈 약속대로 1분 1초도 늦지 않았네.&n어쩐 일로 본기를 불렀는가?

1001404066.english: I'm nervous... Is it because the match is right around the corner? Commander, please cheer for me. Okay?
1001404066.korean: 떨리네... 경기가 코앞이라 그런가?&n사령관님이 응원해 줘. 응?

1001404067.english: You ask if I'm nervous? Did you think I'd get excited just because I'm wearing a wedding dress?
1001404067.korean: 긴장되지 않냐고?&n웨딩드레스를 입었다고 해서 내가 설렐 거라고 생각했어?

1001404068.english: Just as everyone has a role, I, too, have a mission. That is your instruction, and a soldier merely follows orders.
1001404068.korean: 각자 역할이 있듯이, 본기에게도 임무가 있네.&n그것이 귀하의 지시이고, 군인은 명령에 따를 뿐.

1001404069.english: A handshake? What? I can do it a thousand times, ten thousand times! You can ask me anytime.
1001404069.korean: 악수? 뭐야~ 천 번이고 만 번이고 해줄 수 있지!&n언제든지 부탁해도 돼.

1001404070.english: If the sun is too strong, come under the parasol. I'm making an exception just this once.
1001404070.korean: 햇빛이 따가우면 양산 아래로 들어와.&n이번만 특별히 허락하는 거야.

1001404071.english: Armor plates, all clear. Fusion reactor, all clear. Orbital operation confirmed. Assumed to be fully operational, we are on combat standby.
1001404071.korean: 장갑판, 이상 무. 핵융합로, 이상 무.&n궤도 가동, 확인. 작전수행에 문제 없다는&n판단하에 전투대기 중일세.

1001404072.english: Call my name out loud. Once I find out where the Commander is and who he is rooting for, I won't lose to anyone!
1001404072.korean: 큰소리로 내 이름을 불러줘.&n사령관님이 어디 있는지, 누굴 응원하는지&n알게 되면 난 누구한테도 지지 않아!

1001404073.english: Will you escort me? Because on a special day, the only man who can stand by my side is… you, Darling. I didn't realize you’ve become this handsome.
1001404073.korean: 에스코트 해주겠어?&n특별한 날, 내 곁에 설 수 있는 남자는…&n달링밖에 없으니까. 어느새 이렇게 멋있어진건지.

1001404074.english: As promised to you, I am not late by even a minute or a second. What brings you here?
1001404074.korean: 귀하와 나눈 약속대로 1분 1초도 늦지 않았네.&n어쩐 일로 본기를 불렀는가?

1001404075.english: You want an autograph? Hmm... no. If you want an autograph, take me with you. The Cannoneer's ace isn't to be underestimated, you know?
1001404075.korean: 싸인해달라고? 음… 싫어.&n싸인받을 거면  나까지 통째로 가져가.&n캐노니어의 에이스는 만만치 않다구~?

1001404076.english: You're asking if I could use a bigger parasol? Well... do you not like being stuck close to me, darling? Just kidding.
1001404076.korean: 좀 더 큰 양산을 써도 좋지 않냐고? 글쎄…&n나랑 꼭 붙어있는 게 싫은 거야, 달링?&n농담이야.

1001404077.english: Just as everyone has a role, I, too, have a mission. That is your instruction, and a soldier merely follows orders.
1001404077.korean: 각자 역할이 있듯이, 본기에게도 임무가 있네.&n그것이 귀하의 지시이고, 군인은 명령에 따를 뿐.

1001404078.english: Wow, we won! It's all thanks to your support, Commander. My heart has been pounding ever since you called my name.
1001404078.korean: 와아, 이겼다~! 사령관님의 응원 덕분이야.&n사령관님이 내 이름을 불러줬을 때부터,&n계속 두근거렸다구.

1001404079.english: Do you know that Darling is a really cool guy? Yeah. So much so that this Iron-blooded Leona… can't imagine anyone other than Darling.
1001404079.korean: 달링은 정말로 멋진 남자라는 거, 알고 있어?&n그래. 이 철혈의 레오나가…&n달링 말고는 생각할 수 없을 정도로.

1001404080.english: No way~ I need to concentrate before the game... Next time.
1001404080.korean: 안 돼~ 경기 전에는 집중해야되니까… 다음에.

1001404082.english: Isn't it too soon before even taking a shower...? This is a reward for the commander who cheered me on… so it's okay to take your time.
1001404082.korean: 샤워도 하기 전에 너무 서두르는 거 아냐…?&n나를 응원해준 사령관님한테 주는 상이니까…&n천천히 해도 괜찮다구...

1001404083.english: Hmm, haa… what's wrong, darling…? ……! Oh, today is a special day, so I just got caught up without realizing it. Darling… don't you feel the same?
1001404083.korean: 으음, 하아… 왜 그래, 달링…? ......!&n오, 오늘은 특별한 날이니까 나도 모르게&n열중했을 뿐이야. 달링도… 그렇지 않아?

1001404084.english: My hair's a bit inconvenient for matches… but the commander really~ loves it. Always touching it, playing around, smelling it… You're such a real prankster~
1001404084.korean: 머리카락은 시합하는데 불편하긴 하지만…&n사령관님이 엄~청 좋아하잖아.&n맨날 만지면서 장난치구, 냄새 맡구…&n진짜 장난꾸러기라니까~

1001404085.english: Morning kisses were fine since I got them while you were sleeping. Well… I'd be happy if you did it again.
1001404085.korean: 모닝 키스는 달링이 잘 때 받았으니까 괜찮아.&n뭐… 또 해주면 기쁘긴 하겠네.

1001404086.english: I will accomplish anything the Master orders. Without getting hurt…? Safely…?
1001404086.korean: 마스터의 지령이라면 뭐든지 해내겠습니다.&n다치지 않고…? 무사히…?

1001404087.english: My body and mind belong to the Master. In other words, if I refine my mind and body to become perfect, no one will be able to disregard the Master. Ah, um... I, I'm sorry. I got carried away without realizing it...
1001404087.korean: 제 몸과 마음은 마스터의 것.&n즉, 제 심신을 갈고 닦아 완벽해지면,&n그 누구도 마스터를 무시하지 못할 겁니다.&n아, 그… 죄, 죄송합니다. 저도 모르게 흥분해서...

1001404088.english: Ah... I, I'm sorry. Was I staring too intently? It's just... I was so happy just looking at you, Master.
1001404088.korean: 아… 죄, 죄송합니다.&n제가 너무 빤히 보고 있었나요? 그냥…&n주인님을 바라보고만 있어도 너무 행복해서요.

1001404089.english: Welcome, Master. ...Ah, these hand puppets are Kongkong and Tongtong. They are used for assistance when there is a need to share opinions with others.
1001404089.korean: 오셨습니까, 마스터.&n...아, 이 손인형은 콩콩이, 통통이 입니다.&n타인과 의견을 나눌 필요가 있을 때&n도움을 받고 있습니다.

1001404090.english: To satisfy the Master's palate, I coated the sugarcane with mint and cilantro and cooked it at high temperature. ...By any chance, do you not like it?
1001404090.korean: 마스터의 입맛을 만족시켜드리기 위해&n설탕수수에다 민트, 고수를 발라 고온에서&n익혀냈습니다. ...혹시, 마음에 안 드십니까?

1001404091.english: The more my feelings for you grow, Master… my fear grows too. If anything were to happen to you, Master, I…
1001404091.korean: 주인님에 대한 감정이 커질수록… 두려움도 커져가요.&n만약 주인님께 무슨 일이 생긴다면, 저는…

1001404092.english: Are you saying we will have a meal together, Master...? How dare a mere weapon share a table with the Master...
1001404092.korean: 함께 식사하신다는 말씀이십니까, 마스터…?&n감히 무기 따위가 마스터와 겸상이라니…

1001404093.english: Would you mind filling in for Kongkong? Aside from the Master... there is no one else I can ask. ...Thank you.
1001404093.korean: 콩콩이 역할을 대신해 주시겠습니까?&n마스터 말고는... 부탁드릴 사람이 없습니다.&n...감사합니다.

1001404094.english: Would you… hold my hand? I want to feel your warmth anytime, anywhere.
1001404094.korean: 제 손을… 잡아주시겠어요?&n언제 어느 때라도 주인님의 온기를 느끼고 싶어요.

1001404095.english: I will be back, Master. I will complete the mission safely and return exactly as instructed. After all, I am a weapon you cherish.
1001404095.korean: 다녀오겠습니다, 마스터. 지령대로 몸 성히&n임무를 완수하고 돌아오겠습니다.&n저는 마스터가 아끼는 무기니까요.

1001404096.english: My body and mind belong to the Master. In other words, if I refine my mind and body to become perfect, no one will be able to disregard the Master. Ah, um... I, I'm sorry. I got carried away without realizing it...
1001404096.korean: 제 몸과 마음은 마스터의 것.&n즉, 제 심신을 갈고 닦아 완벽해지면,&n그 누구도 마스터를 무시하지 못할 겁니다.&n아, 그… 죄, 죄송합니다. 저도 모르게 흥분해서...

1001404097.english: It’s alright if you don’t dress up, Master. Just the way you are… is Master I like the most.
1001404097.korean: 주인님께선 꾸미지 않으셔도 괜찮아요.&n평소대로의 그 모습이…&n제가 가장 좋아하는 주인님이니까요.

1001404098.english: Today's dish is pomegranate with lemon juice, vinegar, and balsamic sauce— Master? Where are you going, Master?
1001404098.korean: 오늘의 요리는 석류에 레몬즙, 식초와&n발사믹 소스를 곁들인- 마스터?&n어디로 가시는 겁니까, 마스터?

1001404099.english: To satisfy the Master's palate, I coated the sugarcane with mint and cilantro and cooked it at high temperature. ...By any chance, do you not like it?
1001404099.korean: 마스터의 입맛을 만족시켜드리기 위해&n설탕수수에다 민트, 고수를 발라 고온에서&n익혀냈습니다. ...혹시, 마음에 안 드십니까?

1001404100.english: Hehe... When we first met, I never imagined you would mean this much to me... Just holding hands like this... makes me truly happy.
1001404100.korean: 후후... 처음 만났을 때는, 주인님께서 제게 이토록&n큰 의미가 될 줄은 생각도 못했었는데…&n이렇게 손만 잡고 있어도… 정말로 행복해요.

1001404101.english: It seems Kongkong and Tongtong… want to stay by the Master's side. Would you… be willing to talk with them…?
1001404101.korean: 콩콩이와 통통이가…&n마스터의 곁에 있고 싶어 하는 것 같습니다.&n함께… 이야기를 나눠주시겠습니까…?

1001404102.english: Would you mind filling in for Kongkong? Aside from the Master... there is no one else I can ask. ...Thank you.
1001404102.korean: 콩콩이 역할을 대신해 주시겠습니까?&n마스터 말고는... 부탁드릴 사람이 없습니다.&n...감사합니다.

1001404103.english: It doesn't matter if these feelings for you... are the backlash from my destroyed emotion control module. I will give you my true heart so that this becomes real. … I truly love you, Master. Will you… accept my whole body and heart…?
1001404103.korean: 주인님을 향한 이 마음이... 감정 제어 모듈이&n파괴된 반동이라도 상관없어요. 그게 진짜가&n되도록, 주인님께 제 진심을 드릴테니까요.&n…정말로 사랑해요, 주인님. 제 몸과 마음 모두를…&n받아, 주시겠어요…?

1001404105.english: "…I-it's not that I dislike it. It's just… I'm a weapon, so I wonder if it's okay for me to have feelings..."
1001404105.korean: ...시, 싫은 건 아닙니다. 다만…&n무기인 제가, 감정을 가져도 되는지...

1001404106.english: At this rate… I might go crazy from being so happy.

1001404107.english: It's nothing, master. My pulse is quickening, my body temperature rising… It doesn't hurt, so why...?
1001404107.korean: 아무 것도 아닙니다, 마스터.&n맥박이 빨라지고, 체온이 올라가서…&n아프지 않은데, 왜...?

1001404108.english: "…I-it's not that I dislike it. It's just… I'm a weapon, so I wonder if it's okay for me to have feelings..."
1001404108.korean: ...시, 싫은 건 아닙니다. 다만…&n무기인 제가, 감정을 가져도 되는지...

1001404109.english: You want to enjoy watching my reactions… you're really mischievous… Right now… every time your touch reaches me…
1001404109.korean: 제 반응을 감상하시겠다니… 정말, 짓궂으세요…&n지금의 저는… 주인님의 손길이, 닿을 때마다…

1001404110.english: I can now understand what it means to be glad to have been born. To belong to you brings such joy… I'm truly glad to have met you, master.
1001404110.korean: 태어나서 다행이라는 말, 이제 이해할 수 있습니다.&n마스터의 것이란 게 이렇게 기쁠 줄은…&n마스터를 만나서 정말로 다행입니다.

1001404111.english: It's great to defeat the enemies of the one you love, but I also believe there is love in protecting them from harm. I'll give my all to keep you safe, master.
1001404111.korean: 사랑하는 사람의 적을 쓰러뜨리는 것도 좋지만,&n다치지 않도록 보호하는 사랑도 있다고 생각해요.&n주인님이 다치지 않도록 제 한 몸 바칠게요.

1001404112.english: ♩~ ♬~ … … ! D-Did you hear that…? It’s just a simple practice song. P-Please forget about it, Producer...
1001404112.korean: ♩~ ♬~ ……! 드, 들으신 건가요…?&n그냥 별거 아닌 연습곡이에요.&n이, 잊어주세요, 프로듀서...

1001404113.english: All the Sky Knights like you, Commander. And even without me saying who the most special one is among them... you know, right?
1001404113.korean: 스카이나이츠 모두 사령관님을 좋아하고 있어요.&n그 중에서 제일 특별한 사람이 누군지&n말하지 않아도… 아시죠?

1001404114.english: Hello, Sky Knights'— It's stupid. Why on earth do we have to practice this? Humans think so too, right...?
1001404114.korean: 안녕하세요, 스카이나이츠의- 바보같아.&n이런 걸 왜 연습해야 되는 거야, 대체.&n인간도 그렇게 생각하지...?

1001404115.english: Sky Knights' Cutie...? Beauty...? This is a big problem... Linty has so many responsibilities, I don't know what I should take on...
1001404115.korean: 스카이나이츠의 큐티…? 뷰티…?&n큰일이네요… 린티는 담당할 게 너~무 많아서,&n뭘 맡아야 할지 모르겠어요오…

1001404116.english: To think I'm an idol… I never thought I’d be doing something like this. Um, Producer…? Um, isn't this awkward?
1001404116.korean: 아이돌이라니… 이런 걸 하게 될 줄은 몰랐어요.&n저기, 프로듀서…? 저, 어색하지는 않나요?

1001404117.english: Because I stay in my room all the time due to stage fright, I've become afraid of meeting people... so just staying cooped up in my room suits me best.
1001404117.korean: 무대공포증 때문에 방에만 있다 보니,&n사람을 만나는 것도 무서워져서…&n저는 그냥 방에 틀어박혀 있는 게 제일 잘 어울려요.

1001404118.english: ...You're being too harsh, Commander. I was really surprised. As punishment, you're going on a date with me for the day, understand?
1001404118.korean: ...너무하세요, 사령관님. 깜짝 놀랐단 말이에요.&n벌로 오늘 하루는 저랑 데이트하시는 거예요,&n아시겠죠?

1001404119.english: Who, who says I look like I'm having fun? I just don't want to hold the others back. And the stage… I'm not really looking forward to it either.
1001404119.korean: 누, 누가 즐거워보인다는 거야?&n그냥 다른 애들 발목을 잡기 싫은 것 뿐이야.&n무대도… 별로 기대 안된다구.

1001404120.english: The reason Rinti is an idol? Of course, it's because she wants everyone to see cute Rinti~
1001404120.korean: 린티가 아이돌을 하는 이유요? 당연히 모두가&n귀여운 린티의 모습을 봐줬으면 해서죠~

1001404121.english: The reason I became an idol? Hmm... because everyone seemed to be having fun. Squad Leader... no, calling her the leader seems a bit excessive, though.
1001404121.korean: 아이돌이 된 이유요? 음…&n다들 즐거워하는 것 같아서요. 전대장…&n아니, 리더는 좀 지나친 것 같지만요.

1001404122.english: When I'm in my room, I compose music, write poetry... and... I also read books. … … ! No...! I, I can't lend it to you.
1001404122.korean: 방에 있을 땐 작곡을 하거나,&n시를 쓰거나… 그… 채, 책도 읽어요.&n……! 안돼요...! 비, 빌려드릴 수는 없어요.

1001404123.english: I have a question! How much do you cherish me, Commander? Please tell me, Commander. Please? Hurry up!
1001404123.korean: 궁금한 게 생겼어요!&n사령관님은 절 얼마나 소중히 여기고 있을까요?&n말씀해주세요, 사령관님. 네? 빨리요~

1001404124.english: Huh? What's that banner? Let me see. … 'Sparkling Griffon is the best'… W-why are you preparing something like this! No, never mind, just don't bring it.
1001404124.korean: 응? 그 현수막은 뭐야? 이리 줘봐.&n…’반짝반짝 그리폰 최고다’ 라니…&n이, 이런 건 왜 준비하는 거야!&n돼, 됐으니까 절대로 가져오지 마.

1001404125.english: Here you go. I’ll give you an autograph to celebrate you becoming Linti’s first fan. Linti, you’re so thoughtful, so cute… You’re always so refreshing…
1001404125.korean: 자, 여기요. 린티의 첫 번째 팬이 되신 기념으로&n사인을 해드릴게요. 배려심까지 넘치는 린티,&n너무 귀여워… 늘 새로워...

1001404126.english: Now that you're all dressed up, you all look like real idols. You're pretty and full of personality... But as for me... I don't really have anything to show off, so I'm embarrassed.
1001404126.korean: 차려입으니까 다들 진짜 아이돌 같아요.&n예쁘고, 개성도 넘치고... 그런데 저는…&n별로 내세울 것도 없어서 부끄러워요.

1001404127.english: Actually, this song... is the one I cherish the most. It's unfinished and a bit rough... but I poured my heart into it.
1001404127.korean: 사실 이 곡은... 제가 가장 소중히 여기는 곡이에요.&n미완성이라 어설프지만… 제 진심을, 담았거든요.

1001404128.english: All the Sky Knights like you, Commander. And even without me saying who the most special one is among them... you know, right?
1001404128.korean: 스카이나이츠 모두 사령관님을 좋아하고 있어요.&n그 중에서 제일 특별한 사람이 누군지&n말하지 않아도… 아시죠?

1001404129.english: I'm Griffon from the Sky Knights~ Nice to meet you, everyone~ Good, that feels a bit natural now- Uh, how long have you been watching?!
1001404129.korean: 스카이나이츠의 그리폰이에요~&n반가워요, 여러분~&n좋아, 이제 좀 자연스러워-&n어, 언제부터 보고 있었어?!

1001404130.english: Scented with flowers from head to toe! I'm Linty, the cute and rapper of Sky Knights~! Hehehe, how is it? I did well, right? I practiced sooo much.
1001404130.korean: 머리부터 발끝까지 꽃향기가 뿜뿜!&n스카이나이츠의 귀여움과 랩 담당, 린티랍니다~!&n에헤헷, 어때요? 잘하죠? 엄~청 연습했다구요.

1001404131.english: I'm Black Hound, the Sky Knights' resident aegyo member. Bl-ha~ I practiced really hard, does it sound weird...? I even have another aegyo prepared specially for the Producer...
1001404131.korean: 스카이나이츠의 애교담당, 블랙 하운드입니다.&n블하~ 열심히 연습했는데, 이상한가요…?&n프로듀서에게는 특별히 준비한 다른 애교도 있는데…

1001404132.english: Eh…? Th-Did you read it…? That…? Ah, ah…! I started reading it because the descriptions were good… I-I'm sorry. You must have been disillusioned thinking I was a lewd woman…?
1001404132.korean: 에…? 이, 읽으신 건가요…? 그걸…? 아, 아아…!&n묘사가 좋아서 보기 시작했던 건데… 죄, 죄송해요.&n음란한 여자라고 환멸하셨겠죠…?

1001404133.english: ...You're being too harsh, Commander. I was really surprised. As punishment, you're going on a date with me for the day, understand?
1001404133.korean: ...너무하세요, 사령관님. 깜짝 놀랐단 말이에요.&n벌로 오늘 하루는 저랑 데이트하시는 거예요,&n아시겠죠?

1001404134.english: I mean, I wasn't really singing just for the producer, okay? It's just that that embarrassing banner caught my eye the most... Well, it did give me strength, though...
1001404134.korean: 벼, 별로 프로듀서만 보고 노래한 거 아니거든?&n그냥 그 낯부끄러운 현수막이 제일 눈에&n띄었으니까… 뭐, 힘이 나긴 했지만...

1001404135.english: An amazing service for our first fan, the Producer~! Alright, a free hug- Kyaa?! … Um, um… If you hug me that tight, Rinti is a little, shy too...
1001404135.korean: 첫 번째 팬인 프로듀서님을 위한 어마어마한&n서비스~! 자아, 프리허그를- 꺅?! …저, 저기…&n그렇게 꼭 안으시면 린티도 조금, 부끄러운데요오...

1001404136.english: You were able to get this far thanks to me…? … Um, can I hug you for just a moment? Hehe, hearing the words I really wanted to hear from the person I wanted to hear them from… my heart is pounding.
1001404136.korean: 여기까지 올 수 있었던 건, 제 덕분…?&n…저, 잠깐만 안겨도 될까요?&n헤헷, 정말로 듣고 싶었던 말을, 듣고 싶었던&n사람에게 들으니까… 가슴이 두근거려요.

1001404137.english: M-going on stage, really—can I really convey my feelings through singing...? If the producer tells me... I think I can muster up the courage.
1001404137.korean: 무, 무대에 오르는건, 역시-&n정말… 노래로 제 마음을 전할 수 있을까요…?&n프로듀서가 말해주면…&n용기를 낼 수 있을 것 같아요.

1001404138.english: I have a question! How much do you cherish me, Commander? Please tell me, Commander. Please? Hurry up!
1001404138.korean: 궁금한 게 생겼어요!&n사령관님은 절 얼마나 소중히 여기고 있을까요?&n말씀해주세요, 사령관님. 네? 빨리요~

1001404139.english: Producer! How was I? On stage just as I practiced— Ah, um… well… You worked hard too, Producer, so it’s okay to hug me like this for just a moment.
1001404139.korean: 프로듀서! 나 어땠어? 연습한대로 무대에서-&n아, 어… 그게… 프로듀서도 고생했으니까,&n아주 잠깐동안은 이렇게 안아줘도 괜찮아.

1001404140.english: How was Linti's performance? You surely couldn't take your eyes off her, right? Actually, Linti sang while looking only at the Producer she was cheering for. How was it…? Was Linti cute enough to make your heart flutter…?
1001404140.korean: 린티의 무대, 어떠셨어요? 분명 눈을 떼지&n못하셨겠죠? 사실, 린티도 응원하는 프로듀서님만&n보면서 노래했어요. 어때요…? 프로듀서님의&n마음이 떨릴만큼, 린티는 귀여웠나요…?

1001404141.english: Haa, haa… Producer… We created a wonderful performance thanks to everyone’s hard work together, but… right now, I’m going to cut in a little. Could you… praise me for doing a good job…?
1001404141.korean: 하아, 하아… 프로듀서…&n멋진 무대를 만든 건 다 함께 노력한 덕분이지만…&n지금은, 살짝 새치기할래요.&n잘했다고… 칭찬해 주시겠어요…?

1001404142.english: Ugh... Um, if I'm okay with you...

1001404143.english: Your expression at times like this is really cute, Commander. The more I look at it… the more my heart races.
1001404143.korean: 이럴 때 사령관님 표정, 정말 귀여워요.&n볼수록… 점점 더 두근거려요.

1001404144.english: Your outfit is ruined, you idiot.

1001404145.english: Ah, no! If a scandal breaks out with the producer, Linti's idol career is over just like this...!
1001404145.korean: 아, 안 돼요! 프로듀서랑 스캔들이 나버리면,&n린티의 아이돌 생명은 이대로…!

1001404146.english: I'm sorry, I'm nervous right now...

1001404147.english: Hmph… p-producer… I don't really know what to do…
1001404147.korean: 흣… 프, 프로듀서어…&n뭐, 뭔지 모르겠어요…&n저는, 어떻게 해야...

1001404148.english: At times like this, commander's expressions are really cute. The more I see them… the more my heart races.
1001404148.korean: 이럴 때 사령관님 표정, 정말 귀여워요.&n볼수록… 점점 더 두근거려요.

1001404149.english: This… is just my heart pounding because of the stage, so… just this once, okay…?
1001404149.korean: 이건… 무대 때문에 가슴이 두근거려서,&n그런거니까… 이번, 만이라구…?

1001404150.english: Ehehe, now there's no way to take it back…? If someone finds out, it'd be a disaster… So please… be appropriate.
1001404150.korean: 에헤헷, 이제 빼도 박도 못하겠네요…?&n들키면 큰일이니까…&n적.당.히. 해주세요.

1001404151.english: I got more absorbed than I meant to… The producer keeps saying things that make my heart race, so before I realize it… We still have some time until the show, so just a little more.
1001404151.korean: 제가 더 열중해버렸네요… 프로듀서가 자꾸&n두근거리는 말만 해주셔서 저도 모르게...&n공연까진 아직 남았으니까, 조금만 더요.

1001404152.english: It's still hard to deal with others… but when the producer holds my hand, I feel at ease.
1001404152.korean: 아직 다른 분들을 대하는 건 어렵지만…&n프로듀서가 손을 잡아주시면, 마음이 놓여요.

1001404153.english: Hmmm, wearing this makes me think of the stage. …You want me to sing? Well, I'll think about it, silly♥
1001404153.korean: 흐응, 이걸 입으니까 무대 생각이 나네.&n...노래 불러달라고? 뭐, 생각은 해볼게,&n바~보♥

1001404154.english: Shall I become the canary just for the producer? But then you have to take care of the cute Lin-Ti forever… It might actually be a reward~?
1001404154.korean: 프로듀서님을 위한 카나리아가 되어 드릴까요?&n대신 평.생. 귀여운 린티를 보살펴줘야 하는데…&n오히려 포상일지도~?

1001404155.english: Please tell me anything. I'm the producer's exclusive idol, so I'll do whatever you wish. In return… just one hug will do.
1001404155.korean: 뭐든 말씀해주세요.&n저는 프로듀서의 전속 아이돌이니까,&n바라신다면 무엇이든 할게요.&n답례는… 포옹 한 번이면 돼요.

1001404156.english: A shining presence, that is what an idol is… Momo, ah, no, I will do my best for the fans. Now, let's practice.
1001404156.korean: 빛나는 존재, 그것이 아이돌이니까…&n모모, 아, 아니 팬분들을 위해서 힘내겠습니다.&n자, 연습하죠.

1001404157.english: S-Sky Knights! Ah~! I keep getting it wrong no matter how many times I try. I guess idols are made through grueling effort.
1001404157.korean: 스, 스카이나이쯔! 아~!&n몇 번 해봐도 계속 틀리네. 아이돌이란&n뼈를 깎는 노력으로 만들어지는 거구나.

1001404158.english: Lee of the Sky Knights, the leader…! It’s my first time being an idol leader, so I keep getting confused.
1001404158.korean: 스카이나이츠의 리, 리더…!&n아이돌 리더는 처음이라 자꾸 헷갈리네.

1001404159.english: I heard that my personality was intentionally created so as not to threaten customers, since I use bladed weapons. Hehe, but I don't really care about that.
1001404159.korean: 제 성격은 손님분들에게 위협을 주지 않도록,&n의도적으로 만들어졌다고 들었어요.&n날붙이를 쓰니까요. 헤헷, 근데 저는&n그런 건 별로 신경 안 써요.

1001404160.english: Excuse me~ If you keep touching me like that during a massage- Hyaat?! ...Oh, even so, Oppa, what about my professionalism?! ... ...Can I, can I surrender?
1001404160.korean: 즈기요오~&n마사지중에 자꾸 그렇게 만지작거리시면-&n흐얏?! ...오, 오빠가 아무리 그래도&n내 직업정신으으으은?! …...나, 항복해도 돼?

1001404161.english: I like being with the squad members, but I'm happiest spending time with the Commander. Should I just read *The Brothers Karamazov* and fall asleep like this?
1001404161.korean: 대원들이랑 함께 있는 것도 좋지만,&n사령관이랑 함께 보내는 시간이 제일 행복해.&n이대로 카라마조프 가의&n형제들이나 읽다 잠들까?

1001404162.english: Please look forward to it, Producer. All three of us are pouring our hearts and souls into this right now.
1001404162.korean: 기대하고 계세요, 프로듀서님. 지금 저희 세-&n모두가 심혈을 기울이고 있으니까요.

1001404163.english: M-m-sorry! Where were we talking from? Maybe it's because I stayed up late... I won't overexert myself.
1001404163.korean: 미, 미안! 어디까지 이야기하고 있었더라?&n늦게까지 깨있어서 그런가... 무리하지 않을게.

1001404164.english: P-Producer?! When did you get here? ...This is a notebook where I jot down good ideas whenever they come to me. Choreography, stage direction, lyrics... things like that!
1001404164.korean: 프, 프로듀서?! 언제 왔어?&n...이건  괜찮은 아이디어가 생기면 적어 둔&n수첩이야. 안무나 무대 연출이나, 가사…&n뭐 그런 거!

1001404165.english: Aqua Land is a comprehensive health care and entertainment facility. I am in charge of the beauty and massage sections. The first visit is free, so would you like to try it?
1001404165.korean: 아쿠아 랜드는 종합 건강관리 및 엔터테인먼트&n시설이예요. 그중에서 저는 미용이랑 마사지&n파트를 담당하고 있구요. 초회는 무료인데,&n한 번 받아보시겠어요?

1001404166.english: Oppa, do you by any chance have any plans to grow your hair out? Whether it's your hair or anything else. I could take good care of it for you to look pretty~ And yes, I am. I'd like your belly to get a little bigger, too, and as for your age… hmm, maybe not… huh? You're saying you'll make it work somehow?
1001404166.korean: 오빠, 혹시 더 기를 생각 없어? 머리든 다른&n데든 다. 내가 예쁘게 관리해 줄 수 있는데에~&n그리구있지. 배도 좀 더 나왔으면 좋겠구, 나이는…&n으음, 안되나… 응? 어떻게든 해보겠다구?

1001404167.english: More and more people are mistaking me for someone else. If I just changed my clothes, wouldn't even the Commander get confused? You ask how I could confuse someone I love? Th-that's right. You're right. Ah, it's hot!
1001404167.korean: 날 다른 사람이랑 착각하는 사람이 늘고 있어.&n옷만 바뀌면 사령관도 헷갈리지 않을까?&n사랑하는 사람을 어떻게 헷갈리겠냐고?&n그, 그렇지. 맞는 말이야. 아, 덥다!

1001404168.english: We must do our best to get good results. ....I'm sorry, but would you mind practicing with me today as well, Producer?
1001404168.korean: 좋은 결과를 얻기 위해선 최선을 다해야 합니다.&n....죄송하지만 오늘 연습도 함께해 주시겠어요,&n프로듀서님?

1001404169.english: It’s not like Sky Knights is full of people who are good at dancing, right? It’s weird, why am I the only one who’s so clumsy?
1001404169.korean: 스카이나이츠에 춤 잘 추는 애들만 모인 거 아니지?&n이상해, 왜 자꾸 나만 덤벙대는 걸까.

1001404170.english: The reason I decided to become an idol? Because this is the only thing I can do for the kids. I want them to genuinely enjoy it. You think so too, Producer, right?
1001404170.korean: 아이돌이 되자고 결심한 이유?&n내가 애들한테 해줄 수 있는 게 이런 거밖에&n없잖아. 진심으로 즐겼으면 좋겠다.&n프로듀서도 그렇게 생각하지?

1001404171.english: Oh, have you heard anything about my preferences? ...From Audrey? Hmm, what should I do~ Hehe, if you fill up this coupon completely, I might be able to tell you~?
1001404171.korean: 앗, 제 취향에 대해 들으신 게 있으신가요?&n...오드리 님한테요? 흐음, 어쩔까나아~ 헤헤,&n이 쿠폰 다 채우시면 말씀드릴 수 있을지도~?

1001404172.english: Nana is good at housework, too~ Hehe. I don't know why, either. Because I was good at it from the start. ...Ah! I guess I was meant to become your wife.
1001404172.korean: 나나, 집안일도 잘하지이~&n헤헷, 왠지는 나도 몰라. 처음부터 잘했으니까.&n...아! 오빠 아내가 되려고 그랬나보다.

1001404173.english: If we were to compile our story into a book, what genre would it be? Thriller, horror, or romance...? A diary? Why? You're right. Because we have to keep writing it.
1001404173.korean: 만약 우리 이야기를 책으로 엮으면 어떤 장르일까?&n스릴러, 호러, 아니면 로맨스…? 일기? 왜?&n그러네. 앞으로 우리가 써나가야 하니까.

1001404174.english: Momo...? You're waiting for the show to start? Is that for real? You're not lying, are you?! Alright, everyone. Let's go all out starting from the first song!
1001404174.korean: 모모가...? 공연이 시작되는 걸 기다리고 있다니,&n정말인가요? 거짓말은 아니겠죠?!&n자, 모두들. 첫 번째 노래부터 전력으로 갑시다!

1001404175.english: I'm Harpyia, the sweet-voiced member of Sky Knights! *Applause*. It finally feels natural now. I really sounded like an idol, didn't I, Producer?
1001404175.korean: 스카이나이츠의 꿀보이스, 하르페이아입니다!&n박수~. 이제야 몸에 뱄네.&n나 진짜 아이돌 같았지, 프로듀서?

1001404176.english: I am Sleipnir, the leader of the Sky Knights! How about that? I'm flawlessly perfect now, aren't I? I told you being a leader really suits me~!
1001404176.korean: 스카이나이츠의 리더, 슬레이프니르입니다!&n어때? 이제 흠 잡을 데 없이 완벽하지?&n역시 리더가 내 적성이라니까~!

1001404177.english: I like my personality, but what about you, sir? Do you like it? ...Hehe, really? Hehe, ehehe… Um, sir~ Would you like a full-body aesthetic treatment? Or a full-body wax? I'll just do everything for you~
1001404177.korean: 저는 제 성격이 마음에 드는데, 손님은 어떠세요?&n좋으세요? ...헤헤, 그래요? 헤헷, 에헤헤…&n저기, 손님~ 전신 에스테틱 해드릴까요?&n아니면 전신 왁싱? 전부 그냥 해드릴게요~

1001404178.english: Excuse me~ If you keep touching me like that during a massage- Hyaat?! ...Oh, even so, Oppa, what about my professionalism?! ... ...Can I, can I surrender?
1001404178.korean: 즈기요오~&n마사지중에 자꾸 그렇게 만지작거리시면-&n흐얏?! ...오, 오빠가 아무리 그래도&n내 직업정신으으으은?! …...나, 항복해도 돼?

1001404179.english: I like being with the squad members, but I'm happiest spending time with the Commander. Should I just read *The Brothers Karamazov* and fall asleep like this?
1001404179.korean: 대원들이랑 함께 있는 것도 좋지만,&n사령관이랑 함께 보내는 시간이 제일 행복해.&n이대로 카라마조프 가의&n형제들이나 읽다 잠들까?

1001404180.english: ...May I lean on your shoulder? I wanted to rest for a moment… Thank you. Thanks to you, we finished successfully. ...Yes. You worked hard too, Producer.
1001404180.korean: ...어깨에 기대도 될까요? 잠깐 쉬고 싶어서…&n감사합니다, 덕분에 성공적으로 끝났네요.&n...네. 프로듀서님도 고생 많으셨어요.

1001404181.english: How was our performance? All that practice paid off! Hehe, it's completely different from when I was a total no-rhythm clumsy... You said you'd give me a massage since I worked hard? You're being sneaky again... Th-then... shall we take it easy right now...?
1001404181.korean: 우리 무대 어땠어? 연습한 성과가 있었지!&n후후, 몸치였던 때랑은 완전-&n...고생했으니까 마사지, 해준다구? 또 응큼하게…&n그, 그럼 지금은… 느긋하게 받아볼까…?

1001404182.english: That was so hard... What the heck, how can the producer be having a hard time too? ...Thank you. Thanks to your support, I felt so much strength.
1001404182.korean: 힘들었다아아…&n뭐야아, 프로듀서도 힘들어하면 어떡해~&n...고마워. 응원 덕분에 엄청, 힘이 났어.

1001404183.english: Ah, that one from last time? Actually, it's nothing special, but for some reason, I just like it when they're hairy~ And while I'm at it, I'd like them to have a bit of a belly too~ Plus, if they're old, kyaaa~ Ha, I'm drooling without even realizing it...
1001404183.korean: 아, 저번에 그거요? 사실 별건 아니구, 왠지&n저는 털이 많은게 좋더라구요~ 기왕이면&n배도 좀 나왔으면 좋겠구우~ 거기에&n나이도 많으면, 꺄아~ 핫, 저도 모르게 군침이...

1001404184.english: Oppa, do you by any chance have any plans to grow your hair out? Whether it's your hair or anything else. I could take good care of it for you to look pretty~ And yes, I am. I'd like your belly to get a little bigger, too, and as for your age… hmm, maybe not… huh? You're saying you'll make it work somehow?
1001404184.korean: 오빠, 혹시 더 기를 생각 없어? 머리든 다른&n데든 다. 내가 예쁘게 관리해 줄 수 있는데에~&n그리구있지. 배도 좀 더 나왔으면 좋겠구, 나이는…&n으음, 안되나… 응? 어떻게든 해보겠다구?

1001404185.english: More and more people are mistaking me for someone else. If I just changed my clothes, wouldn't even the Commander get confused? You ask how I could confuse someone I love? Th-that's right. You're right. Ah, it's hot!
1001404185.korean: 날 다른 사람이랑 착각하는 사람이 늘고 있어.&n옷만 바뀌면 사령관도 헷갈리지 않을까?&n사랑하는 사람을 어떻게 헷갈리겠냐고?&n그, 그렇지. 맞는 말이야. 아, 덥다!

1001404186.english: I know that my tastes and personality are a bit… troublesome. …But the producer understood me. The producer is truly a dazzling person.
1001404186.korean: 제 취향과 성격이 좀…&n성가시다는 건 저도 알고 있습니다.&n…그런데 프로듀서는 그런 저를 이해해주셨죠.&n정말로 눈부신 분이십니다, 프로듀서는.

1001404187.english: You worked hard too, Producer. Now, let me give you a special hug— *Squeal*... You can rest in my arms anytime you're tired. Because... we're getting so much more from you, Producer.
1001404187.korean: 프로듀서도 고생 많았어.&n자아, 특별히 내가 안아줄- 꺅…?&n힘들 땐 언제든지 내 품에서 쉬어도 돼.&n우린… 프로듀서한테 훨씬 더 많이 받고 있으니까.

1001404188.english: How was our unit song…? While I was only looking at the Producer— Ugh?! Hmm… So, it reached…? ...Yeah. Because I’m a star only for the Producer.
1001404188.korean: 우리 유닛 곡, 어땠어…?&n나, 프로듀서만 바라보면서-&n읍?! 으음… 닿았, 구나…?&n...응. 나는 프로듀서만을 위한 스타니까.

1001404189.english: You're going to give me a massage? Ah, no. It's my first time getting one from someone else... Ugh, uh... Th-this feels strange...
1001404189.korean: 저한테 마사지를 해주신다구요?&n아, 아뇨. 남한테 받아보는 건 처음이라…&n읏, 으… 이, 이상한 기분이네요...

1001404190.english: Nana is good at housework, too~ Hehe. I don't know why, either. Because I was good at it from the start. ...Ah! I guess I was meant to become your wife.
1001404190.korean: 나나, 집안일도 잘하지이~&n헤헷, 왠지는 나도 몰라. 처음부터 잘했으니까.&n...아! 오빠 아내가 되려고 그랬나보다.

1001404191.english: If we were to compile our story into a book, what genre would it be? Thriller, horror, or romance...? A diary? Why? You're right. Because we have to keep writing it.
1001404191.korean: 만약 우리 이야기를 책으로 엮으면 어떤 장르일까?&n스릴러, 호러, 아니면 로맨스…? 일기? 왜?&n그러네. 앞으로 우리가 써나가야 하니까.

1001404192.english: I will believe it is a mistake.

1001404193.english: Not now. The performance is starting soon.

1001404194.english: Mo, momo, what are you doing!

1001404195.english: There is an extra charge for this. Is that okay with you?

1001404196.english: Mm-huh, Oppa... Hehe, I've completely turned into your shape- ...Eh? You say you're going crazy? Why? Ugh? Kyaa~!
1001404196.korean: 으응, 오빠아… 헤헷,&n나 완전히 오빠 모양이 돼서-&n...에? 미치겠다니, 왜? 으아? 꺄아~!

1001404197.english: I’ve worked so hard studying various things for the Commander, but I haven’t been able to put any of them to use… It’s a shame. The things I practiced… can I try them out now?
