1001404197.korean: 애써 사령관을 위해 여러 가지 공부해왔는데&n하나도 써먹어 보질 못했네…&n아쉬운데, 연습한 것들... 지금 해봐도 돼?

1001404198.english: "…Producer? You do know the show is about to start, right? …Can't help it. Alright, but you know what that means, right?"
1001404198.korean: ...프로듀서님?&n곧 공연이 시작되는 걸 모르시진 않겠죠?&n...못 말려. 알겠어요, 대신… 아시죠?

1001404199.english: "Uh… Ah! It's a big deal, I have to get on stage soon. You're not going to let me go...? …Alright. Then just a little more…"
1001404199.korean: 으응… 앗! 큰일이야, 곧 무대 올라가야 돼.&n놔주지 않을 거라고...? …알았어.&n그러면 조금만 더...

1001404200.english: "As the leader, I should set an example… but I can't be doing this with the producer behind the scenes… Don't whisper in my ear…"
1001404200.korean: 리더인 내가 솔선수범해야 하는데…&n뒤에서 프로듀서랑 이러고 있으면 안돼…&n귓가에 속삭이지 마아아...

1001404201.english: "Um… e-extra fees aren't necessary. …Can I come find you privately after work…?"
1001404201.korean: 저기… 추, 추가요금은 됐어요.&n…...업무 끝나고 개인적으로 찾아가도 되나요…?

1001404202.english: "Uh, Big Brother… hehe, I've completely turned into Big Brother's form— …Huh? You say you're going crazy? Why? Waaah? Kyaa~!"
1001404202.korean: 으응, 오빠아… 헤헷,&n나 완전히 오빠 모양이 돼서-&n...에? 미치겠다니, 왜? 으아? 꺄아~!

1001404203.english: "I worked hard studying all sorts of things for the commander, but I haven't been able to use any of it… It's a shame, can I try what I practiced now?"
1001404203.korean: 애써 사령관을 위해 여러 가지 공부해왔는데&n하나도 써먹어 보질 못했네…&n아쉬운데, 연습한 것들... 지금 해봐도 돼?

1001404204.english: "Exclusive idol, huh? I'm pretty strict about contract terms, but… for the producer, any condition is OK."
1001404204.korean: 전속 아이돌, 인가요?&n전 계약조건을 철저히 따지는 편입니다만…&n프로듀서님이라면 어떤 조건이든지 OK예요.

1001404205.english: "If I had to choose between books and idols...? Both are precious to me… Yeah, I've decided. I'll choose the producer. An excellent choice!"
1001404205.korean: 책과 아이돌, 둘 중에 하나만 고르면...?&n둘 다 나한테 소중한데…&n응, 결정했어. 프로듀서를 고를래.&n탁월한 선택이지!

1001404206.english: "Dances and songs just for the producer? No problem at all! You thought I'd be embarrassed? I can grant whatever my husband wishes."
1001404206.korean: 프로듀서만을 위한 춤과 노래? 어려울 거 없지!&n부끄러워 할 거라고 생각했나봐?&n남편이 바라는 건 뭐든 들어줄 수 있어.

1001404207.english: "Big Brother~ I've got something I want~ Sa- …Hup?! Ah… ah, no. This is enough. Hehe…"
1001404207.korean: 오빠아~ 나 갖고 싶은 거 생겼는데에~ 사-&n읍…?! 아… 아, 아냐. 이거면 됐어. 헤헷...

1001404208.english: You went to such lengths to style me... but, I guess it really doesn't suit me... Yes, saying I look pretty... That is the only thing I hear from the producer... it’s truly special.
1001404208.korean: 기껏 꾸며주셨는데… 여, 역시 저한테는&n안 어울리죠… 예, 예쁘다니… 프로듀서에게&n듣는 그 말만은 정말… 특별해요.

1001404209.english: It's been a long time since I've worn an outfit that reveals this much bare skin. ...How is it, Master? Is this not an outfit an educator should wear?
1001404209.korean: 맨살이 이렇게나 드러나는 의상은&n오랜만이네요. ...어때요, 주인님?&n교육자가 해선 안 될 복장인가요?

1001404210.english: As long as I have my lovely family, anywhere is my home and hometown. Are Tomo and Shirayuri doing well?
1001404210.korean: 사랑스러운 가족만 있으면 어디든&n내 집이고 고향이지. 우리 토모와&n시라유리는 잘 지내고 있어?

1001404211.english: It's about time my younger siblings started growing up. Maybe they'll mature only after having a niece or nephew... What do you think?
1001404211.korean: 슬슬 내 동생들도 철이 들어야 하는데.&n조카라도 생겨야 성숙해지려나…&n자기는 어떻게 생각해?

1001404212.english: Looking back now, it feels like it was all a dream. The glittering stage, the cheering audience, and… singing under the starry night sky… looking only at the Producer, only at the Producer. Producer, will you… let me dream once again?
1001404212.korean: 지금 생각해 보면, 전부 꿈이었던 것 같아요.&n빛나는 무대랑 환호하는 관객분들, 그리고…&n별이 빛나는 밤하늘 아래에서... 프로듀서를,&n프로듀서만을 바라보고 노래했던 것도요.&n프로듀서, 저를 다시 한번…&n꿈꾸게 해주시겠어요?

1001404213.english: Um… you’re really going to be on stage, right? ...Ah, no. I-I’m fine. ... ...It’ll be fine.
1001404213.korean: 저… 정말로 무대에 서는 거죠.&n...아, 아뇨. 괘, 괜찮아요.&n…...괜찮을, 거예요.

1001404214.english: I can't possibly miss out on a competition where people with great physiques are participating, can I? Master, I will definitely win and come back. You can look forward to it.
1001404214.korean: 몸매 좋은 사람들이 참가하는 대회에&n제가 빠질 순 없겠죠? 주인님, 반드시&n우승하고 돌아올게요. 기대하셔도 좋아요.

1001404215.english: Even the best agents are bound to accumulate stress. You need to relieve it with leisure activities every now and then. … You ask what my hobby is? B-It's a secret.
1001404215.korean: 뛰어난 요원이라고 해도 스트레스는 쌓이기&n마련이지. 가끔씩 여가활동으로 해소해 줘야 돼.&n…취미가, 뭐냐고? 비, 비밀이야.

1001404216.english: Here, milk tea. I’ve added plenty of sugar, so it’ll help you recover from fatigue. What? You don’t even need to figure out if the person you love is tired. You can tell just by looking at them.
1001404216.korean: 자, 밀크티. 설탕을 듬뿍 넣어서 피로회복에&n도움 될 거야. 뭐야~ 사랑하는 사람이 피곤해하는 건&n추리할 필요도 없어. 보기만 해도 알 수 있지.

1001404217.english: Just like the producer did for me, I also want to… give strength to others through my songs in the future. ...Yes. With songs that convey sincerity, just like back then.
1001404217.korean: 프로듀서가 제게 해주셨던 것처럼, 저도 앞으로…&n제 노래로 다른 분들에게 힘을 드리고 싶어요.&n...네. 진심을 전하는 노래로, 그때처럼.

1001404218.english: What if everyone… hates my song… booing, walking out of the audience… I guess I should have just stuck to making music…
1001404218.korean: 다들… 내 노래, 싫어하면 어쩌지…&n야유하고, 객석에서 나가버리고…&n역시 난, 그냥 노래만 만드는 게 나았는데…

1001404219.english: Hmm...? I need to apply oil, but I can't quite reach it. If you don't mind, Master, would you please apply it to my back yourself?
1001404219.korean: 흐음~? 오일을 발라야 되는데 손이 닿지&n않네요. 괜찮다면 주인님께서 직접 제 등에&n발라주시겠어요?

1001404220.english: You probably didn't notice at all, but I actually really love mystery novels and movies. Is that surprising? Did you notice? Commander, your deductive skills are amazing!
1001404220.korean: 전혀 눈치채지 못했겠지만 사실 난&n추리소설이나 영화를 굉장히 좋아해. 의외려나?&n눈치챘었어? 사령관, 추리력이 굉장하구나!

1001404221.english: Since getting married, I’ve been doing fewer hobbies than when we were dating. I can’t relieve my stress! ...Speaking of which, shall we go now? I’ve found a great spot.
1001404221.korean: 결혼하고 나니까 연애할 때보다 취미활동이&n뜸해졌어. 스트레스를 해소할 수 없다구!&n...말 나온 김에 지금 갈까?&n좋은 장소를 찾아놨어.

1001404222.english: Um... um... should I... hold back a little at night...? I... I don't think that'll happen, but just in case, by any chance, the Producer thinks badly of me, I... Yes... I love you, Producer.
1001404222.korean: 저… 그, 밤에는… 조금 자제하는 게 좋을까요…?&n그, 그럴 리 없다고 생각하지만, 만에 하나라도&n프로듀서가 저를 안 좋게 보시면,&n저는… 네에… 사랑해요, 프로듀서.

1001404223.english: Ah, Producer… Yes. I’m going to say hello to those who helped us— ...Yes. If you could come with me… I think I would be happy.
1001404223.korean: 아, 프로듀서… 네.&n도움을 주신 분들에게 인사를 드리러-&n...네. 프로듀서가 함께 가주시면…&n기쁠 것, 같아요.

1001404224.english: Sometimes I forget that I am an educator. Like when I am alone with my Master, for instance...? That’s a big problem.
1001404224.korean: 가끔 제가 교육자라는 걸 망각할 때가 있어요.&n이를테면 주인님과 단 둘이 마주할 때라든지...?&n큰일이네요.

1001404225.english: Maybe it's because I've been hanging out with the Commander. It's hard to see the kids these days. Want to go see them together? It'll kill two birds with one stone, like dropping off Amy about our relationship.
1001404225.korean: 사령관이랑 붙어 지내서 그런가.&n요즘 애들 보기가 힘드네.&n같이 보러 갈래? 에이미 언니한테&n우리 관계도 보고할 겸 겸사겸사.

1001404226.english: It's about time my younger siblings started growing up. Maybe they'll mature only after having a niece or nephew... What do you think?
1001404226.korean: 슬슬 내 동생들도 철이 들어야 하는데.&n조카라도 생겨야 성숙해지려나…&n자기는 어떻게 생각해?

1001404227.english: Looking back now, it feels like it was all a dream. The glittering stage, the cheering audience, and… singing under the starry night sky… looking only at the Producer, only at the Producer. Producer, will you… let me dream once again?
1001404227.korean: 지금 생각해 보면, 전부 꿈이었던 것 같아요.&n빛나는 무대랑 환호하는 관객분들, 그리고…&n별이 빛나는 밤하늘 아래에서... 프로듀서를,&n프로듀서만을 바라보고 노래했던 것도요.&n프로듀서, 저를 다시 한번…&n꿈꾸게 해주시겠어요?

1001404228.english: Just a moment ago, I was so anxious and scared... I felt like something terrible was going to happen... but now that I'm in the producer's arms like this... Yes. I'll do my best. I'll sing while looking only at the producer.
1001404228.korean: 분명 조금 전까지만 해도, 불안하고 무서워서… &n어떻게 되어버릴 것만 같았는데…&n이렇게, 프로듀서 품에 안겨 있으니까…&n네. 힘낼게요. 프로듀서만 보면서 노래할게요.

1001404229.english: So, Master. Just like that, all the way up to the waist— ...you're saying you'll cheer for me...? Now I'm the one learning from you, Master.
1001404229.korean: 그래요, 주인님. 그대로 허리까지-&n...절 응원하실 거라고요…?&n이젠 제가 주인님에게 배우네요.

1001404230.english: Wait! I think I know. The two cups of tteokbokki you're holding. You're planning to eat them all by yourself, right? Right? You want to eat together? Uh... thanks.
1001404230.korean: 잠깐! 알 것 같아. 들고 있는 컵떡볶이 2개.&n혼자 다 먹으려는 거지? 맞지?&n같이 먹자고? 어… 고마워.

1001404231.english: Here, milk tea. I’ve added plenty of sugar, so it’ll help you recover from fatigue. What? You don’t even need to figure out if the person you love is tired. You can tell just by looking at them.
1001404231.korean: 자, 밀크티. 설탕을 듬뿍 넣어서 피로회복에&n도움 될 거야. 뭐야~ 사랑하는 사람이 피곤해하는 건&n추리할 필요도 없어. 보기만 해도 알 수 있지.

1001404232.english: Just like the producer did for me, I also want to… give strength to others through my songs in the future. ...Yes. With songs that convey sincerity, just like back then.
1001404232.korean: 프로듀서가 제게 해주셨던 것처럼, 저도 앞으로…&n제 노래로 다른 분들에게 힘을 드리고 싶어요.&n...네. 진심을 전하는 노래로, 그때처럼.

1001404233.english: You ask how my first performance was…? The stage was so beautiful… the audience cheering for my song, the Sky Knights matching my rhythm… actually, I only remember the Producer cheering for me. Because I… sang while only looking at the Producer, too.
1001404233.korean: 첫 무대는, 어땠냐구요…? 무대는, 너무 예뻤구요…&n제 노래에 환호해 주시는 관객분들, 호흡을&n맞춰주시는 스카이나이츠 분들… 사실, 저를&n응원해 주시는 프로듀서의 모습밖에 기억 안 나요.&n저도… 프로듀서만 바라보면서… 노래, 했으니까요.

1001404234.english: ...Do you understand what kind of determination I had when I entered this competition? If I win this tournament, I’m going to proudly confess to my Master. So— Ugh…! ...So you felt the same way.
1001404234.korean: ...제가 이번에 어떤 각오로 참가했는지&n아시겠나요? 이 대회에서 우승하면&n주인님에게 당당히 고백할 거예요. 그래서-&n읍…! ...같은 마음이었군요.

1001404235.english: So you figured it out? That's right. In a deserted place late at night, completely naked... From now on, I'll let you watch from the VIP seats. Then, shall we enjoy today? Commander.
1001404235.korean: 이제 추리해낸 거야? 맞아.&n인적 드문 장소에서 늦은 시간에, 실오라기 하나&n없이... 앞으로는 특등석에서 관람하게 해줄게.&n그럼 오늘을 즐겨볼까? 사령관.

1001404236.english: Since getting married, I’ve been doing fewer hobbies than when we were dating. I can’t relieve my stress! ...Speaking of which, shall we go now? I’ve found a great spot.
1001404236.korean: 결혼하고 나니까 연애할 때보다 취미활동이&n뜸해졌어. 스트레스를 해소할 수 없다구!&n...말 나온 김에 지금 갈까?&n좋은 장소를 찾아놨어.

1001404237.english: Um... um... should I... hold back a little at night...? I... I don't think that'll happen, but just in case, by any chance, the Producer thinks badly of me, I... Yes... I love you, Producer.
1001404237.korean: 저… 그, 밤에는… 조금 자제하는 게 좋을까요…?&n그, 그럴 리 없다고 생각하지만, 만에 하나라도&n프로듀서가 저를 안 좋게 보시면,&n저는… 네에… 사랑해요, 프로듀서.

1001404238.english: If I do this... will I be able to forget reality for a moment...?
1001404238.korean: 이러면... 잠깐 현실을 잊을 수 있을까요…?

1001404239.english: Could you please bear with me just a little longer, Master?

1001404241.english: No! Lately, because of you, I don't even have time for my hobbies or to read mystery novels...! You're so mean, really. I can't stand this anymore.
1001404241.korean: 안 돼! 요즘 자기 때문에 취미생활시간도&n부족하고 추리소설도 잘 못 읽고 있는…!&n못 됐어, 정말. 이럼 나도 못 참아.

1001404242.english: I didn't know I would become this proactive... You didn't like it...? Is that so... Then... may I ask you for another favor...? I... I want you to be a producer a little more.
1001404242.korean: 저도 제가 이렇게 적극적이 될 줄은…&n싫으셨어요…? 그런, 가요… 그러면…&n또, 부탁드려도 될까요…?&n저, 프로듀서를 좀 더 원해요.

1001404243.english: "Producer… While the thrill of the stage is still with me… Please make today an unforgettable day for me."
1001404243.korean: 프로듀서…&n아직 무대의 떨림이 남아있는 동안…&n오늘을 제게, 잊을 수 없는 날로 만들어주세요.

1001404244.english: Surely you've learned how to treat someone you love by now… So, come on… show me.
1001404244.korean: 사랑하는 상대를 어떻게 다루어야 하는지…&n그동안 잘 배우셨겠죠? 자아, 그럼…&n제게 보여주세요.

1001404245.english: My heart races more than just showing… but for you, Commander, I want to show you everything… Ah, I'm so shy!
1001404245.korean: 보여주는 것보다 더 두근거리네. 그치만…&n사령관한테라면 내 모든 걸 보여주고 싶어…&n아, 부끄러워!

1001404246.english: No way! Because of you, I barely have time for my hobbies or even to read my mystery novels… That's just mean. I really can't stand it.
1001404246.korean: 안 돼! 요즘 자기 때문에 취미생활시간도&n부족하고 추리소설도 잘 못 읽고 있는…!&n못 됐어, 정말. 이럼 나도 못 참아.

1001404247.english: I never thought I'd be this forward… Did you dislike it? If so… then… can I ask again? I want more of you, Producer.
1001404247.korean: 저도 제가 이렇게 적극적이 될 줄은…&n싫으셨어요…? 그런, 가요… 그러면…&n또, 부탁드려도 될까요…?&n저, 프로듀서를 좀 더 원해요.

1001404248.english: When I wear this outfit… it reminds me of that day, and I just can't calm my heart… Producer, I love you more than all the stars in the night sky.
1001404248.korean: 이 옷을 입으면… 그날이 생각나서,&n도저히 마음을 추스를 수가 없네요…&n프로듀서, 사랑해요.&n밤하늘 별들보다도 더 많이.

1001404249.english: What do you think of me trying to be a queen for you, darling? Oh my, now you want me not as a queen, but as the mother of your child…
1001404249.korean: 당신을 위해 여왕에 도전한 절 어떻게&n생각하세요, 여보...? 어머나. 이젠 제가&n여왕이 아니라 한 아이의 엄마가&n되기를… 원하시는군요.

1001404250.english: Honey, next time, should I wear a collar too? I need something different, something exciting… What if we get caught? Then don't get caught!
1001404250.korean: 자기야, 다음엔 목줄도 차고 나갈까?&n평소와 다른 자극이 필요한데…&n응? 걸리면? 안 걸리면 되지!

1001404251.english: Honey? Hehe... Did you finish studying for today? Surely... you didn't let go of my hand on purpose just to get punished, did you?
1001404251.korean: 여보? 후후…&n오늘 공부는 다 마치셨나요?&n설마… 벌을 받고 싶어서&n일부러 손을 놓은 건 아니겠죠?

1001404252.english: Hmm... I need to punish my naughty wife... Where would be a good place? If you prefer a public place... just let me know anytime.
1001404252.korean: 으음… 나쁜 여보에겐 벌을 줘야 하는데…&n어디가 좋을까? 혹시 공개적인 장소가&n좋으시다면… 언제든 말씀만 하세요.

1001404253.english: Since I was the one doing the punishing yesterday... how about you punish me today? You do the punishing too... so I need to get used to it.
1001404253.korean: 어제는 제가 벌을 주는 쪽이었으니…&n오늘은 여보가 벌을 주면 어떨까요?&n여보도 벌을 주는데… 익숙해져야 하니까.

1001404254.english: Honey? Hehe... Did you finish studying for today? Surely... you didn't let go of my hand on purpose just to get punished, did you?
1001404254.korean: 여보? 후후…&n오늘 공부는 다 마치셨나요?&n설마… 벌을 받고 싶어서&n일부러 손을 놓은 건 아니겠죠?

1001404255.english: Hmm... I need to punish my naughty wife... Where would be a good place? If you prefer a public place... just let me know anytime.
1001404255.korean: 으음… 나쁜 여보에겐 벌을 줘야 하는데…&n어디가 좋을까? 혹시 공개적인 장소가&n좋으시다면… 언제든 말씀만 하세요.

1001404256.english: Since I was the one doing the punishing yesterday... how about you punish me today? You do the punishing too... so I need to get used to it.
1001404256.korean: 어제는 제가 벌을 주는 쪽이었으니…&n오늘은 여보가 벌을 주면 어떨까요?&n여보도 벌을 주는데… 익숙해져야 하니까.

1001404257.english: Hehe... They say that even married couples need to keep learning. Alright, it's time for a special training session. Get ready. Today... is an all-night session.
1001404257.korean: 후후… 부부 간에도 계속 배워야 한답니다.&n자, 특별 교육 시간이에요. 각오하세요.&n오늘은… 밤샘 교육이니까.

1001404258.english: Hehe… Even married couples have to keep learning. Now, it's time for special training. Get ready. Tonight's an all-nighter.
1001404258.korean: 후후… 부부 간에도 계속 배워야 한답니다.&n자, 특별 교육 시간이에요. 각오하세요.&n오늘은… 밤샘 교육이니까.

1001404259.english: Please don't treat me like a child.

1001404260.english: I don't like being treated like a child… No, please… pet me more.
1001404260.korean: 어린애 취급은, 싫은데… 아, 아뇨!&n...더 쓰다듬어 주세요.

1001404261.english: You're not doing this to withhold candy, are you, Commander?
1001404261.korean: 사탕 안 주려고 이러시는 건 아니죠, 사령관님?

1001404262.english: Candy is nice, but your touch is the sweetest— Ahem, thanks for the candy though. Still, don't waste it!
1001404262.korean: 사탕도 좋지만, 사령관님이 쓰다듬어 주시는 게&n제일- 흠흠, 사탕 감사합니다.&n그래도 자원낭비는 안돼요!

1001404263.english: Are those little rascals doing well? I heard you need to build up your stamina to become a member of Pride, so I'm curious to see how they've grown.
1001404263.korean: 그 땅꼬맹이들은 잘 지내고 있어?&n프라이드의 구성원이 되려면 체력을 길러야&n한다고 했는데, 어떻게 성장했을지 궁금한데.

1001404264.english: Commander, aren't you working a bit too hard? A leader always needs to conserve their strength. You never know what might happen. Enough, come here. Me? I'm a queen, so I'm trying to conserve some power too.
1001404264.korean: 사령관, 너무 일을 열심히 하는 거 아냐?&n우두머리는 항상 힘을 비축하고 있어야 된다고.&n무슨 일이 일어날지 모르니까. 됐으니까 이리와.&n나? 나도 여왕이니까 힘을 좀 비축해두려고.

1001404265.english: The more I look at you, the more you resemble a dragon slayer. Especially those eyes. It is the pupils that convey a resolute determination that make this so.
1001404265.korean: 그대는 보면 볼수록 용살자와 똑 닮았구나.&n특히 그 눈. 결연한 의지가 느껴지는&n눈동자가 그러하다.

1001404266.english: I am Miss Safety, your master's housekeeper starting today. Please feel free to call me anytime if you need anything.
1001404266.korean: 오늘부터 주인님의 가정부가 된&n미스 세이프티입니다. 필요한 일이 있으시다면&n언제든지 불러주세요.

1001404267.english: If I, the supply support officer, go around wearing clothes like this, the unit's reputation... What? You're saying the older sisters are happy?
1001404267.korean: 보급 지원 담당인 제가 이런 옷을 입고&n다니면 부대의 평판이… 네?&n언니들이 기뻐하고 있다고요?

1001404268.english: Do you happen to know a place called Miami? It is said that lovers freely expressed their affection for each other there. Later, I, too, together with you, Commander... Yes. Now there is yet another reason to create a peaceful world.
1001404268.korean: 혹시 마이애미라는 곳을 아십니까? 연인들은&n그곳에선 자유롭게 서로 애정을 표현했다고&n합니다. 나중에 저도 사령관님과 같이…&n네. 평화로운 세상을 만들어야 할 이유가&n또 늘었군요.

1001404269.english: Commander! I've told you so many times that we need to conserve resources! ...If you just keep smiling and changing the subject like that— Ack… I, I'll let it slide just this once. It's not because you hugged me, you know…?
1001404269.korean: 사령관님! 자원은 아껴써야 한다고 몇 번이나&n말씀드렸잖아요! ...맨날 그렇게 웃으면서&n말 돌리시기만 하면- 꺅… 이, 이번에만 넘어가&n드릴게요. 안아주셔서 그러는 건 아니라구요…?

1001404270.english: You think having global pride is absurd? Ha. You're so lacking in spirit... If that's how it is, learn from me. I'll teach you the know-how.
1001404270.korean: 전 세계를 아우르는 프라이드는 말도 안된다고?&n하. 그렇게 기개가 없어서야... 정 그러면 나한테&n잘 배워봐. 노하우를 알려주지.

1001404271.english: Your pride is growing steadily. ...What? Ha. That is the right of a leader. Why would I be jealous? Well, still, as the queen of the pack... I do want to receive a little more than the others, you know?
1001404271.korean: 프라이드는 순조롭게 커져가고 있군. ...뭐? 하.&n그건 우두머리의 권리야. 내가 질투할 리가&n있겠어? 뭐, 그래도 무리의 여왕으로서…&n다른 녀석들보다는 내가 좀 더, 받고는 싶네?

1001404272.english: My dear friend. I hope you always stay in a safe place, just as you are now. If you were to suffer even the slightest scratch… I would surely sacrifice everything to punish your enemy. ...Yes. Even my own life.
1001404272.korean: 맹우여. 그대는 지금처럼, 항상 안전한 곳에 있었으면&n좋겠구나. 만약 그대에게 작은 생채기 하나라도&n생긴다면… 나는 분명, 그대의 적을 벌하기 위해&n모든 것을 바칠 테지. ...그래. 나의 목숨까지도.

1001404273.english: The Orca, commanded by Master, is peaceful today as well. ...So peaceful that even I, the security officer, am looking for a side job.
1001404273.korean: 오늘도 주인님이 지휘하시는 오르카호는 평화롭습니다.&n...치안담당인 제가 부업을 찾을 만큼요.

1001404274.english: I asked Alexandra what they do when they get to daycare, and she said they play house and read storybooks. That's not what I do; I have to manage the supplies...
1001404274.korean: 등원하면 뭘 하는지 알렉산드라님에게 여쭤봤는데,&n소꿉놀이를 하고, 동화책을 읽고 그런대요.&n저는 그런 게 아니라 물자 관리를 해야 하는데...

1001404275.english: I can do anything for you, Commander. Even stepping down from my position or giving up my career. I am always sincere.
1001404275.korean: 사령관님을 위해서라면 뭐든 할 수 있습니다.&n제 직책을 내려놓는 것도, 쌓아온 경력을 포기하는&n것도요. 전 언제나 진심입니다.

1001404276.english: Did you make a mess again? Ugh, please move aside for a moment. I'll clean it up. Seriously... what are you going to do without me?
1001404276.korean: 또 어질러 놓으신 거예요? 에휴, 잠깐 비켜주세요.&n제가 정리할게요. 정말…&n저 없으면 어떡하려고 그러세요.

1001404277.english: I had high expectations because the others said he was great... Ha. He's much weaker than I thought. Do you think you can lead Pride with just that?
1001404277.korean: 다른 녀석들이 대단하대서 기대했더니…&n하. 생각했던 것보다 훨씬 비실비실하잖아?&n고작 그 정도로 프라이드를 이끌 수 있겠어?

1001404278.english: Did you perhaps neglect your training? Just this much— Hah. ...So you were letting your guard down? No, no. It's just so much to my liking. Then, shall I... check if the other parts are this hard too?
1001404278.korean: 혹시 단련을 게을리 한 거야? 고작 이 정도로-&n핫. ...힘을 빼고 있던 거였구나? 아냐, 아냐. 그냥&n너무 내 취향이라서. 그럼 어디, 다른 곳도&n이렇게 단단한지… 확인해볼까?

1001404279.english: When it's all over... well. Spending the rest of my life alone in a place where no one knows me wouldn't be bad... but I don't think life with a close friend would be bad either.
1001404279.korean: 모든 게 끝나면… 글쎄. 아무도 모르는 곳에서&n혼자 여생을 보내는 것도 나쁘지 않겠지만…&n맹우와 함께하는 삶도, 나쁘진 않을 것 같구나.

1001404280.english: According to the survey, the housekeepers always wore this outfit. Don't I look like a competent housekeeper, Master?
1001404280.korean: 조사에 따르면 가정부들은 반드시 이 옷을&n착용했다고 합니다. 유능한 가정부로 보이지&n않습니까, 주인님?

1001404281.english: I-I'm not a little kid! Believe it or not, I'm the supply officer for the Sisters of Valhalla- Th-this outfit... well, uh... it's, y-it's cute... so I wore it...
1001404281.korean: 저, 저는 꼬마가 아니에요! 이래봬도&n시스터즈 오브 발할라의 보급담당- 이, 이 옷은…&n그게, 그… 귀, 귀여워서… 입었어요...

1001404282.english: Another police baton...? If you need one, I will have it ready. It might be a good idea to think of some more diverse ways to use it.
1001404282.korean: 또 경찰봉을…? 필요하시다면 준비해 놓겠습니다.&n좀 더 다양한 사용법을 생각해 보는 것도 좋겠군요.

1001404283.english: You don't have to keep leaving leftovers for me. That's for you to eat, Commander... Then, let's share.
1001404283.korean: 자꾸 그렇게 부식 남겨서 저한테 주시지 않으셔도&n괜찮아요. 그건 사령관님이 드셔야 하는 거니까…&n그럼, 같이 나눠먹어요.

1001404284.english: To mate a superior female, shouldn't you first become a superior male? I will train you personally, especially. It starts with jumping off a cliff naked.
1001404284.korean: 우수한 암컷을 거느리기 위해선, 우선 우수한&n수컷이 되어야 되지 않겠어? 특별히 내가 직접&n단련시켜주지. 시작은 절벽에서 맨몸으로&n뛰어내리는 것부터야.

1001404285.english: Commander, aren't you working a bit too hard? A leader always needs to conserve their strength. You never know what might happen. Enough, come here. Me? I'm a queen, so I'm trying to conserve some power too.
1001404285.korean: 사령관, 너무 일을 열심히 하는 거 아냐?&n우두머리는 항상 힘을 비축하고 있어야 된다고.&n무슨 일이 일어날지 모르니까. 됐으니까 이리와.&n나? 나도 여왕이니까 힘을 좀 비축해두려고.

1001404286.english: The more I look at you, the more you resemble a dragon slayer. Especially those eyes. It is the pupils that convey a resolute determination that make this so.
1001404286.korean: 그대는 보면 볼수록 용살자와 똑 닮았구나.&n특히 그 눈. 결연한 의지가 느껴지는&n눈동자가 그러하다.

1001404287.english: Oh...! Since this is a side job, I'm not quite used to it yet. I would be grateful if you could personally proofread it for me, step by step, on how to do it.
1001404287.korean: 앗…! 부업이다 보니 아직 익숙치 않군요.&n어떻게 하는지 하나하나... 직접, 교정해 주시면&n감사하겠습니다.

1001404288.english: You don't have to worry. I decided to go with LRL, Aqua, and Coco. Well then, I'll be back!
1001404288.korean: 걱정 안 하셔도 돼요. LRL이랑, 아쿠아랑, 코코랑&n같이 가기로 했어요. 그럼, 다녀오겠습니다!

1001404289.english: Do you happen to know a place called Miami? It is said that lovers freely expressed their affection for each other there. Later, I, too, together with you, Commander... Yes. Now there is yet another reason to create a peaceful world.
1001404289.korean: 혹시 마이애미라는 곳을 아십니까? 연인들은&n그곳에선 자유롭게 서로 애정을 표현했다고&n합니다. 나중에 저도 사령관님과 같이…&n네. 평화로운 세상을 만들어야 할 이유가&n또 늘었군요.

1001404290.english: Commander! I've told you so many times that we need to conserve resources! ...If you just keep smiling and changing the subject like that— Ack… I, I'll let it slide just this once. It's not because you hugged me, you know…?
1001404290.korean: 사령관님! 자원은 아껴써야 한다고 몇 번이나&n말씀드렸잖아요! ...맨날 그렇게 웃으면서&n말 돌리시기만 하면- 꺅… 이, 이번에만 넘어가&n드릴게요. 안아주셔서 그러는 건 아니라구요…?

1001404291.english: Hmm, what? You were hiding something pretty cool under your clothes, weren't you? I apologize for judging you too hastily. Anyway, you really need to show off something that great a bit more. Just like me.
1001404291.korean: 흐음, 뭐야. 옷 아래에 꽤나 멋진 걸 숨겨두고&n있었잖아? 섣불리 판단했던 건 사과할게. 그나저나,&n그런 대단한 건 좀 더 과시할 필요가 있어.&n나처럼 말야.

1001404292.english: Your pride is growing steadily. ...What? Ha. That is the right of a leader. Why would I be jealous? Well, still, as the queen of the pack... I do want to receive a little more than the others, you know?
1001404292.korean: 프라이드는 순조롭게 커져가고 있군. ...뭐? 하. 그건&n우두머리의 권리야. 내가 질투할 리가 있겠어?&n뭐, 그래도 무리의 여왕으로서… 다른 녀석들보다는&n내가 좀 더, 받고는 싶네?

1001404293.english: My dear friend. I hope you always stay in a safe place, just as you are now. If you were to suffer even the slightest scratch… I would surely sacrifice everything to punish your enemy. ...Yes. Even my own life.
1001404293.korean: 맹우여. 그대는 지금처럼, 항상 안전한 곳에 있었으면&n좋겠구나. 만약 그대에게 작은 생채기 하나라도&n생긴다면… 나는 분명, 그대의 적을 벌하기 위해&n모든 것을 바칠 테지. ...그래. 나의 목숨까지도.

1001404294.english: To think this outfit was used for a different purpose…! Still, if Master says it’s okay, I will… keep wearing it. H-just in case…
1001404294.korean: 이 옷이 다른 의미로 사용됐다니…!&n그래도 주인님께서 괜찮다고 하시면&n계속… 입겠습니다. 호, 혹시 모르니까...

1001404295.english: Aren't we going to the playground today...? It's not that I had fun, and we can't let LRL pull another dangerous prank...! Ugh... It was fun... so can't you come with me...?
1001404295.korean: 오늘은 놀이터에 안 가나요...? 제, 제가 재밌었던 건&n아니라, LRL이 또 위험한 장난을 치면 안 되니까…!&n우으… 재밌었으니까… 같이 가주시면 안돼요…?

1001404296.english: I can do anything for you, Commander. Even stepping down from my position or giving up my career. I am always sincere.
1001404296.korean: 사령관님을 위해서라면 뭐든 할 수 있습니다.&n제 직책을 내려놓는 것도, 쌓아온 경력을 포기하는&n것도요. 전 언제나 진심입니다.

1001404297.english: Did you make a mess again? Ugh, please move aside for a moment. I'll clean it up. Seriously... what are you going to do without me?
1001404297.korean: 또 어질러 놓으신 거예요? 에휴, 잠깐 비켜주세요.&n제가 정리할게요. 정말…&n저 없으면 어떡하려고 그러세요.

1001404298.english: What are you doing, Commander? Leading a massive pride is the right and duty of a superior male. Let's go get the others to join your pride.
1001404298.korean: 뭐 하는 거야, 사령관. 거대한 프라이드를 거느리는&n건 우수한 수컷의 권리이자 의무라고.&n어서 다른 녀석들도 네 프라이드에 합류시키러 가자.

1001404299.english: Did you perhaps neglect your training? Just this much— Hah. ...So you were letting your guard down? No, no. It's just so much to my liking. Then, shall I... check if the other parts are this hard too?
1001404299.korean: 혹시 단련을 게을리 한 거야? 고작 이 정도로-&n핫. ...힘을 빼고 있던 거였구나? 아냐, 아냐. 그냥&n너무 내 취향이라서. 그럼 어디, 다른 곳도&n이렇게 단단한지… 확인해볼까?

1001404300.english: When it's all over... well. Spending the rest of my life alone in a place where no one knows me wouldn't be bad... but I don't think life with a close friend would be bad either.
1001404300.korean: 모든 게 끝나면… 글쎄. 아무도 모르는 곳에서&n혼자 여생을 보내는 것도 나쁘지 않겠지만…&n맹우와 함께하는 삶도, 나쁘진 않을 것 같구나.

1001404301.english: If it weren't for the housekeeper, you wouldn't have known your room was this messy, Master. Still, it's a relief that I can help, isn't it? I'll clean it up right away.
1001404301.korean: 가정부가 아니었다면 주인님 방이 이렇게 어질러진&n걸 알 수 없었을 겁니다. 그래도 다행인 건 제가&n도와드릴 수 있어서겠죠? 금방 정리하겠습니다.

1001404302.english: You know, you know. Today, I played house, read storybooks, drew pictures, and... had so much fun. ...Ah. I-I'm sorry. Acting spoiled like this... Is it okay to do this once in a while...? Yes. Please make sure to listen to me next time too.
1001404302.korean: 있죠, 있죠. 오늘은 소꿉놀이를 했구요, 동화책도&n읽고, 또 그림도 그리고 또… 엄청 즐거웠어요.&n...앗. 죄, 죄송해요. 이렇게 응석이나 부리고…&n가끔씩은, 괜찮은건가요…? 네. 다음에도 꼭,&n이야기 들어주세요.

1001404303.english: Another police baton...? If you need one, I will have it ready. It might be a good idea to think of some more diverse ways to use it.
1001404303.korean: 또 경찰봉을…? 필요하시다면 준비해 놓겠습니다.&n좀 더 다양한 사용법을 생각해 보는 것도 좋겠군요.

1001404304.english: You don't have to keep leaving leftovers for me. That's for you to eat, Commander... Then, let's share.
1001404304.korean: 자꾸 그렇게 부식 남겨서 저한테 주시지 않으셔도&n괜찮아요. 그건 사령관님이 드셔야 하는 거니까…&n그럼, 같이 나눠먹어요.

1001404305.english: I never gave you permission for me!

1001404306.english: If you waste your energy like this now, what are you going to do when you really need it later? Th-this isn't even a warm-up... you say? Fine. The Commander is indeed... the best male.
1001404306.korean: 지금 이렇게 힘 빼서야, 나중에 진짜 필요할&n때는 어쩌려고 그래? 이, 이 정도는&n준비운동도… 안 된다고? 좋아. 사령관은 역시…&n최고의 수컷이야.

1001404308.english: Why, why are you acting like this? Is something on you?

1001404309.english: From now on, this is a lawless zone. So… let’s commit some bad deeds we shouldn’t. Because no one will hold us accountable…
1001404309.korean: 지금부터 이곳은 무법지대입니다. 그러니…&n하면 안 되는 나쁜 짓들을 저질러 보죠.&n아무도 책임을 묻지 않을 테니까...

1001404310.english: Since I'm in charge of supplies, I have no choice but to be strict with everyone. But... just with you, Commander... it's okay if I act a little childish, right...?
1001404310.korean: 저는 보급 담당이니까, 모두에게 깐깐할&n수밖에 없어요. 그래도 사령관님에게만은…&n어리광을 부려도, 괜찮겠죠…?

1001404311.english: Why do you like this useless flabby flesh that never gets stronger? Instead, let's do something more practical, something productive.
1001404311.korean: 단련을 해도 단단해지지 않는 이 쓸데없는&n살덩이가 그렇게 좋은 거야?&n그런 것보단 좀 더… 실용적이고, 생.산.적.인&n일을… 하자고?

1001404312.english: If you're already this tired, what will you do when the real thing comes? This is barely a warm-up… Commander, you really are the best.
1001404312.korean: 지금 이렇게 힘 빼서야, 나중에 진짜 필요할&n때는 어쩌려고 그래? 이, 이 정도는&n준비운동도… 안 된다고? 좋아. 사령관은 역시…&n최고의 수컷이야.

1001404313.english: It looks like we're both soaked now…? Cleaning can wait… Taking care of you is more urgent.
1001404313.korean: 저희 둘 다… 젖어버린 것 같군요…?&n청소보다… 주인님을 깨끗하게 해드리는 일이&n시급할 것 같습니다.

1001404314.english: Ah, I'm not asleep. I just closed my eyes for a moment. I really wasn't sleeping… Can I sleep now? Okay then…
1001404314.korean: 아, 안 졸았어요. 잠깐 눈만 감은 거예요.&n진짜 안 졸았는데… 자, 자도 되나요? 그럼...

1001404315.english: From now on, this place is a lawless zone. So, let's do all the naughty things we shouldn't. No one will hold us responsible.
1001404315.korean: 지금부터 이곳은 무법지대입니다. 그러니…&n하면 안 되는 나쁜 짓들을 저질러 보죠.&n아무도 책임을 묻지 않을 테니까...

1001404316.english: I'm in charge of supplies, so I have to be strict with everyone. But with you, Commander… can I act a little spoiled?
1001404316.korean: 저는 보급 담당이니까, 모두에게 깐깐할&n수밖에 없어요. 그래도 사령관님에게만은…&n어리광을 부려도, 괜찮겠죠…?

1001404317.english: Now that's some pride! Still, there's room to improve… Yes, soon, we should even think about making an heir.
1001404317.korean: 이제야 좀 프라이드답군. 아직 부족한 부분은…&n그래. 슬슬, 후계자도 만들어야 되지 않겠어?

1001404318.english: You brought a whip here… Are you trying to make me slip up on purpose?
1001404318.korean: 이런 곳에 회초리를 준비해 두셨다니…&n일부러라도… 실수를 해야 하는 걸까요?

1001404319.english: You're busy with kindergarten duties… Principal, are you really okay? It's okay to rest when you're tired. I'll be right here to help you, alright?
1001404319.korean: 바쁘신데 유치원 업무까지… 원장 선생님,&n정말 괜찮으세요? 흐음… 힘들 땐 조금 쉬어도&n괜찮아요. 제가 곁에서 도울 테니까, 아시겠죠?

1001404320.english: This individual feels a kind of… uplift when with the small animals of Watcher of Nature. Based on the analysis, it is determined that it can also provide emotional stability to the administrator.
1001404320.korean: 본 개체는 와쳐 오브 네이쳐의 소동물들과&n함께할 때, 일종의… 고양감을 느낍니다.&n분석 결과, 관리자님에게도 정서상의 안정감을&n줄 수 있을 것으로 판단됩니다.

1001404321.english: An error occurred in the emotion module. I request that you keep some distance from me. Ah... I confirmed a rapid rise in body temperature and heart rate. And... I can also feel that the Manager's embrace is very warm.
1001404321.korean: 감정 모듈에 에러 발생. 제게서 다소 거리를&n둘 것을 요청합니다. 앗... 체온과 심박수의&n급속한 상승 확인. 그리고… 관리자님의 품은&n몹시 따뜻하다는 것도, 느껴집니다.

1001404322.english: Couldn't I just go to my room and finish assembling the model? I just asked. … …Then how about going to the workshop?
1001404322.korean: 그냥 방에 가서 모형 조립이나 마저 하면&n안 될까요? 그냥 물어봤어요.&n…...그럼 공방에 가 있는 건?

1001404323.english: Now the scythe of judgment turns toward Master's enemy… Speak of where darkness and terror shall come…
1001404323.korean: 이제 선고의 낫은 주인의 적에게로 향한다…&n어둠과 공포가 도래할 곳을 말하라...

1001404324.english: This unit, Mnemosyne, is specialized in facility management and maintenance, as well as information storage and processing. We recommend that you familiarize yourself with its usage as soon as possible.
1001404324.korean: 본 개체, 므네모시네는 시설의 관리와 유지,&n정보의 저장과 처리에 특화되어있습니다.&n조속히 사용법에 익숙해지시는 것을 추천드립니다.

1001404325.english: As the Administrator stated, accessing information within the Ark leaves a record for me as well. … Request denied. Due to a newly established protocol, access to this record is impossible even with the Administrator's special privileges. Please be advised that if you attempt to forcibly access it, all information within the Ark, including this record, will be deleted.
1001404325.korean: 관리자님의 말씀 대로, 저도 방주 내의 정보에&n접근하면 기록이 남습니다. …요청 거부. 신설된&n프로토콜로 인해, 관리자님의 특급 권한이라도&n해당 기록은 열람이 불가능합니다. 만약 강제로&n열람을 시도하실 경우, 해당 기록과 더불어 방주의 &n모든 정보가 삭제되니 주의하시기 바랍니다.

1001404326.english: I tried doing makeup for the first time in my life... and it's taking so long. With that time, I could have made more than ten finished products...
1001404326.korean: 메이크업을 태어나서 처음으로 해봤는데…&n시간이 너무 오래 걸리네요. 그 시간이면&n완성품을 열 개도 넘게 만들 수 있을텐데...

1001404327.english: Death is peace... If you wish, I will let you sleep in eternal rest...
1001404327.korean: 죽음은 곧 평온… 원한다면 영원한 안식 속에&n잠들게 해주겠다...

1001404328.english: If you need someone to talk to, I will call another entity. ...Do you mean this entity? Then I will provide you with information about wildflowers. It is very interesting.
1001404328.korean: 이야기 상대가 필요하시면 다른 개체를 호출&n하겠습니다. ...본 개체와, 말씀이십니까?&n그럼 들꽃에 대한 정보를 전달하겠습니다.&n몹시, 흥미롭습니다.

1001404329.english: Based on the analysis, I have determined that the feeling I have for you, Administrator, is not love. This is because what I feel is incomparably warmer and more intense than any recorded instance. Since I believe it is a special emotion that no one has discovered in the thousands of years since history began to be recorded, it appears that defining this feeling will take at least 25,000 years.
1001404329.korean: 분석 결과, 제가 관리자님에게 느끼는 이 감정은&n사랑이 아닌 것으로 판단됩니다. 제가 느끼는 것은,&n기록된 사례들과는 비교도 할 수 없을정도로&n따뜻하고, 강렬하기 때문입니다. 분명 역사가&n기록되기 시작하고 수천 년동안 누구도 발견하지&n못한, 특별한 감정이라고 생각되기에, 이 감정의&n정의에는 최소 25000년의 시간이 소요될 것으로&n보입니다.

1001404330.english: Does it look okay? I entered this competition on Machina's recommendation, but... this is more embarrassing than I thought. The outfit is also quite revealing, so it's a bit...
1001404330.korean: 보기 괜찮나요? 마키나 씨의 추천으로 출전하긴&n했는데… 이거, 생각보다 부끄럽네요.&n의상도 노출이 많아서 조금...

1001404331.english: How does it feel to command death itself? However, do not let your guard down, Master… Death spares no one…
1001404331.korean: 죽음 그 자체를 부리는 기분이 어떠한가?&n허나 방심하지 말거라, 주인이여…&n죽음은, 상대를 가리지 않으니...

1001404332.english: Is this entity beautiful? ...Incomprehensible. This entity was merely sculpted this way. ... ...Confirming a feeling similar yet different from when viewing small animals. Initiating a search.
1001404332.korean: 본 개체가 아름, 답습니까? ...이해 불능. 본 개체는&n그저 이렇게 조형되었을 뿐입니다. …...소동물들을&n볼 때와는 비슷하면서도 다른 감정을 확인.&n검색을 개시합니다.

1001404333.english: An error occurred in the emotion module. I request that you keep some distance from me. Ah... I confirmed a rapid rise in body temperature and heart rate. And... I can also feel that the Manager's embrace is very warm.
1001404333.korean: 감정 모듈에 에러 발생. 제게서 다소 거리를&n둘 것을 요청합니다. 앗... 체온과 심박수의&n급속한 상승 확인. 그리고… 관리자님의 품은&n몹시 따뜻하다는 것도, 느껴집니다.

1001404334.english: That’s a bad sense of humor. Is it that fun to see me flustered? It’s annoying that I’m the only one getting this... Oh my, isn’t this enough now? Hehe, it’s fine if you fight back anytime.
1001404334.korean: 악취미네요. 제가 당황하는게 그렇게&n재미있어요? 저만 당하는 건 약오르니까…&n어머, 이제 이정도로는 안되나요?&n후후, 언제든지 반격해도 괜찮은데요?

1001404335.english: Now the scythe of judgment turns toward Master's enemy… Speak of where darkness and terror shall come…
1001404335.korean: 이제 선고의 낫은 주인의 적에게로 향한다…&n어둠과 공포가 도래할 곳을 말하라...

1001404336.english: Since this entity has not been used for information utilization, its processing speed is not fast. Therefore, requests for information such as blueprints for weapons of war will take some time. ...Yes. If it is a story about wildflowers, anytime.
1001404336.korean: 본 개체는 정보의 활용에는 사용되지 않았기에,&n연산 속도는 빠르지 않습니다. 따라서 전쟁병기의&n설계도와 같은 정보의 요청에는 다소 시간이&n걸립니다. ...네. 들꽃에 관한 이야기라면, 언제든지.

1001404337.english: As the Administrator stated, accessing information within the Ark leaves a record for me as well. … Request denied. Due to a newly established protocol, access to this record is impossible even with the Administrator's special privileges. Please be advised that if you attempt to forcibly access it, all information within the Ark, including this record, will be deleted.
1001404337.korean: 관리자님의 말씀 대로, 저도 방주 내의 정보에&n접근하면 기록이 남습니다. …요청 거부. 신설된&n프로토콜로 인해, 관리자님의 특급 권한이라도&n해당 기록은 열람이 불가능합니다. 만약 강제로&n열람을 시도하실 경우, 해당 기록과 더불어 방주의 &n모든 정보가 삭제되니 주의하시기 바랍니다.

1001404338.english: You don't have to force yourself to praise me like that. On the Orca, besides a modest woman like me— Oh my. Commander, you are so honest. I really like that about you.
1001404338.korean: 그렇게 억지로 칭찬할 필요 없어요.&n오르카 호에는 저처럼 수수한 여자 말고도-&n어머. 사령관은 정말 솔직하네요.&n그런 점, 정말 좋아해요.

1001404339.english: Death is peace... If you wish, I will let you sleep in eternal rest...
1001404339.korean: 죽음은 곧 평온… 원한다면 영원한 안식 속에&n잠들게 해주겠다...

1001404340.english: This entity possesses no ability to entertain you, Administrator. All it can do is manage facilities, process information, and… freeze its surroundings. Even so, would you please continue to use this entity?
1001404340.korean: 본 개체에겐 관리자님을 즐겁게 할 수 있는 기능이&n존재하지 않습니다. 가능한 것이라곤 시설의 관리,&n정보 처리와… 주위를 얼려버리는 것 뿐입니다.&n그래도 본 개체를 계속, 사용해 주시겠습니까?

1001404341.english: Based on the analysis, I have determined that the feeling I have for you, Administrator, is not love. This is because what I feel is incomparably warmer and more intense than any recorded instance. Since I believe it is a special emotion that no one has discovered in the thousands of years since history began to be recorded, it appears that defining this feeling will take at least 25,000 years.
1001404341.korean: 분석 결과, 제가 관리자님에게 느끼는 이 감정은&n사랑이 아닌 것으로 판단됩니다. 제가 느끼는 것은,&n기록된 사례들과는 비교도 할 수 없을정도로&n따뜻하고, 강렬하기 때문입니다. 분명 역사가&n기록되기 시작하고 수천 년동안 누구도 발견하지&n못한, 특별한 감정이라고 생각되기에, 이 감정의&n정의에는 최소 25000년의 시간이 소요될 것으로&n보입니다.

1001404342.english: Since the Commander praised me like that, it makes the time I spent worthwhile. Now then, let's go to the room together. The reason to sortie is gone now. Don't you understand? I... my heart is pounding like crazy because of what the Commander said!
1001404342.korean: 사령관이 그렇게 칭찬해주니, 시간을 들인&n보람이 있네요. 자, 그럼 같이 방으로 가요.&n이제 출전할 이유가 사라졌으니까.&n아직 모르겠어요? 저, 사령관의 말 때문에&n엄청, 두근거리고 있다구요?

1001404343.english: How does it feel to command death itself? However, do not let your guard down, Master… Death spares no one…
1001404343.korean: 죽음 그 자체를 부리는 기분이 어떠한가?&n허나 방심하지 말거라, 주인이여…&n죽음은, 상대를 가리지 않으니...

1001404345.english: There are still 131 situations remaining that I would like to experience with the administrator. Since these items are updated approximately every two hours, I request that you resume them as soon as possible.
1001404345.korean: 관리자님과 경험하고 싶은 상황은, 아직&n131가지가 남아 있습니다. 해당 항목은&n약 2시간 단위로 갱신되므로, 조속히&n재개해주시길 요청드립니다.

1001404346.english: I'm sorry. I don't have as much time as it looks right now, so maybe next time.

1001404347.english: To follow the Administrator's request, I'm searching for the best actions right now. Since this is my first time doing this, please forgive me if I'm clumsy.
1001404347.korean: 관리자님의 요청에 응하기 위해, 현 상황에서&n가장 적합한 행동을 검색합니다.&n…...본 개체가 시연하는 것은 처음이므로,&n서투르더라도 양해를 부탁드립니다.

1001404348.english: There are still 131 situations the Administrator wants to experience with me. This list updates every two hours, so please start again soon.
1001404348.korean: 관리자님과 경험하고 싶은 상황은, 아직&n131가지가 남아 있습니다. 해당 항목은&n약 2시간 단위로 갱신되므로, 조속히&n재개해주시길 요청드립니다.

1001404349.english: Can't hold back? Honestly, me neither. Hearing 'you're pretty' from someone you like feels better than I expected. Come hug me now. I'm not as composed as I seem.
1001404349.korean: 못 참겠어요? 사실 저도 그래요. 좋아하는&n사람에게, 예쁘다는 말을 듣는 게 이렇게&n기쁠 줄은 몰랐으니까요. 자, 어서 안아줘요.&n저 지금... 보기보다 여유가 없으니까.

1001404350.english: My control is perfect, so Administrator, you can touch me whenever you want. …Actually, I'm asking for a hug.
1001404350.korean: 제 제어능력은 완벽하므로, 관리자님께선 언제든&n제게 신체접촉을 하셔도 괜찮습니다.&n...정정합니다. 포옹을 요청드립니다.

1001404351.english: Sometimes, this isn't so bad. Which do you like better? The usual me? Or me all dressed up? Honestly, I love you no matter what.
1001404351.korean: 가끔은 이런 것도 나쁘지 않네요. 당신은&n어느쪽이 좋은가요? 평소의 저? 아니면 한껏&n꾸민 저? 참고로, 저는 어떤 모습의&n당신이든 좋아요.

1001404352.english: That Spatoia guy— *clears throat*. Spatoia is a problem because she's just too wild. Enough for Aeda to have to allocate more resources to battle predictions. Ah, Coco is calling. Yeah, I'm on my way~
1001404352.korean: 스파토이아 금마- 흠흠. 스파토이아는 너무&n천방지축이라서 문제입니다. 에이다 님이&n전투 예측에 리소스를 더 할당해야 했을만큼요.&n아, 코코가 부르네요. 응, 언니 가께~

1001404353.english: No matter how many worlds I pass through, or what form they may take, I am destined to meet Roy, Tachi, and Tina again. After all, we are connected by the threads of fate. Still, I tend to go looking for Tachi first. Because that child needs care.
1001404353.korean: 몇 번의 세계를 지나도, 어떤 모습일 지라도&n로이, 타치, 티나와는 다시 만나게 되어있어요.&n운명의 실로 이어져 있으니까요.&n그래도 저는 타치부터 찾아 나서는 편이에요.&n그 아이는 보살핌이 필요하니까.

1001404354.english: My body is surprisingly sturdy. Want to feel it? Here. Th-that's the way you touch at night, isn't it? Not that, okay?
1001404354.korean: 내, 몸 의외로 튼튼하다. 함 만져볼래? 자.&n그, 그건 밤에 만지는 방식 아이가.&n그거 말고, 응?

1001404355.english: I got permission from the chef, so I'll cook dinner for you tonight. Don't expect too much, though. I only know how to make simple food.
1001404355.korean: 주방장님에게 허락 받았으니까,&n오늘 저녁은 제가 해드릴게요.&n너무 기대하진 마세요.&n저는 소박한 음식밖에 할 줄 모르니까요.

1001404356.english: It would have been great if the Watcher of Nature friends could have joined us, but it's a shame they're on duty. Let's just do it among ourselves today, Commander.
1001404356.korean: 와쳐 오브 네이처 친구들도 함께 했으면&n참 좋았을 텐데, 근무 중이라서 아쉽네요.&n오늘은 우리끼리라도 해요, 사령관님.

1001404357.english: All I have experienced is the soundless expanse of space and the harsh jungles of South America. Although it is in ruins, this is my first time seeing a place so urbanized, so I am a little excited.
1001404357.korean: 제가 겪은 것은 아무런 소리도 들리지 않는&n우주 공간과, 남아메리카의 가혹한 밀림 뿐입니다.&n폐허가 됐기는 하지만, 이렇게 도시화된 곳은&n처음이라 조금 설레네요.

1001404358.english: In the universe and dimensions, countless worlds exist that are similar yet different. Some worlds naturally fade away, while others are destroyed by someone. We have come to stop that.
1001404358.korean: 우주와 차원에는 비슷하면서도 다른 수많은&n세계들이 존재해요. 자연스럽게 사라지는 세계도&n있지만, 누군가에 의해 멸망하는 세계도 있죠.&n저희는 그것을 막기 위해 왔어요.

1001404359.english: Oppa, go ahead and call me by my nickname. … Hehe. Huh? You're asking if I'm not embarrassed? Th-was this supposed to be embarrassing too? Didn't I say I don't know much about this kind of thing...
1001404359.korean: 오빠야, 빨리 애칭 불러도.&n…헤헷. 응? 안부끄럽냐고?&n이, 이것도 낯부끄러운 거였나?&n내, 내는 이런 거 잘 모른다 안캤나...

1001404360.english: In this world, my destiny points toward you. Perhaps… I may have crossed countless worlds just to meet you.
1001404360.korean: 이 세계에서 제 운명은 당신을 가리키고 있어요.&n어쩌면… 저는 당신을 만나기 위해&n수많은 세계를 넘어온 걸지도 모르겠어요.

1001404361.english: The loser has to grant a wish? I have no choice but to take this seriously. Alright, Commander. Draw a card!
1001404361.korean: 진 사람이 소원 들어주기라니,&n이건 진지하게 임할 수밖에 없겠네요.&n자, 사령관님. 카드를 뽑으세요!

1001404362.english: Please do not mind the dialect. It is solely due to the specificity of my language module, and it does not affect my assigned mission in the slightest.
1001404362.korean: 사투리는 신경쓰지 말아주세요.&n제 언어 모듈의 특수성 때문일 뿐이고,&n맡은 임무에는 전.혀. 지장 없습니다.

1001404363.english: Whenever I come to a new world, I am the only one who can remember my past life to some extent. Thanks to that, I was able to reach this point. This name is originally mine.
1001404363.korean: 새로운 세계로 올 때마다,&n저만은 어느정도 전생을 기억할 수 있어요.&n덕분에 여기까지 도달할 수 있었죠.&n이 이름은, 원래의 제 것이에요.

1001404364.english: You know what? I really like being with you, Oppa. … Right? … Th-that's embarrassing, isn't it? If you keep doing that… Ugh… Oh, Oppa… I s-really like you.
1001404364.korean: 있제. 내는 오빠야랑 있어서 참 좋다.&n…맞나. …그, 그건 부끄럽다 안카나. 자꾸&n그라믄… 으으… 오, 오빠야…&n진~짜로 좋아한다.

1001404365.english: Even now, sometimes I feel anxious, wondering if it is okay to spend ordinary time like this. You ask what I should do? Just hold my hand. That is all I need.
1001404365.korean: 아직도 가끔, 이렇게 평범한 시간을 보내도&n되는 건지 불안해질 때가 있어요. 어떻게 해주면&n되냐구요? 그냥, 손을 잡아주세요.&n저는 그거면 충분하니까요.

1001404366.english: Hehehe, I stay like this when I rest. The uniform is too tight and uncomfortable, you see. ...Should I give you some animal pajamas, Commander, too? Please make sure to show them to Saetti and the Empress later.
1001404366.korean: 에헤헤, 쉴 때는 이렇게 있어요.&n제복은 꽉 조여서 불편하니까요.&n...동물 잠옷, 사령관님도 드릴까요?&n나중에 세띠랑 엠프리스 한테도 꼭 보여주세요.

1001404367.english: Commander, what are you looking at? … …! My, my combat records... where did you find them...? Th-that is... when blood rushes to my head during combat, well... I just can't help but attack wildly... Haha...
1001404367.korean: 사령관님, 뭘 보고 계신가요? ……!&n제, 제 전투기록을 어디서…?&n그, 그건 전투중에 머리에 피가 몰리면 그게…&n어쩔 수 없이 마구 공격하게 돼서요… 하하...

1001404368.english: We are artificially created beings. In a way, we are similar to the precious people over there. Is this also fate?
1001404368.korean: 저희들은 인공적으로 만들어진 존재에요.&n어떻게보면 그쪽의 소중한 분들과도 비슷하네요.&n이것도 운명일까요.

1001404369.english: My body is surprisingly sturdy. Want to feel it? Here. Th-that's the way you touch at night, isn't it? Not that, okay?
1001404369.korean: 내, 몸 의외로 튼튼하다. 함 만져볼래? 자.&n그, 그건 밤에 만지는 방식 아이가.&n그거 말고, 응?

1001404370.english: I got permission from the chef, so I'll cook dinner for you tonight. Don't expect too much, though. I only know how to make simple food.
1001404370.korean: 주방장님에게 허락 받았으니까,&n오늘 저녁은 제가 해드릴게요.&n너무 기대하진 마세요.&n저는 소박한 음식밖에 할 줄 모르니까요.

1001404371.english: Usually I play with Saetti, Empress, Pengsoon, and Tiger... but today, I'm just going to play with the Commander. Because, it's a real battle!
1001404371.korean: 평소엔 세띠랑 엠프리스랑 펭순이랑 타이거랑&n같이하는데… 오늘은 그냥 사령관님 하고만&n하려구요. 지, 진검승부니까요!

1001404372.english: Wow. Is this the first time you've seen a bioroid speaking with a dialect? … You don't understand people's feelings. … …Really? I'll let you fool me just this one more time. Wow, why are you smiling? You say I'm too innocent? Me?
1001404372.korean: 와. 사투리 쓰는 바이오로이드 처음 보나&n…사람 맘도 모르고. …...진짜가? &n내 딱 한번만 더 속아준다.&n와, 와 웃는데? 너무 순수하다고? 내가?

1001404373.english: Your past life… hmm, that’s strange. I can’t see it at all. It’s as if someone painted over it with black paint… That’s true. Just as you said, the future is what matters.
1001404373.korean: 그쪽의 전생은… 흠, 이상하네. 전혀 보이지&n않아요. 마치 누군가 검은 물감으로 덧칠해 놓은&n것처럼… 그렇네요. 그쪽 말대로, 앞으로가&n중요하니까요.

1001404374.english: Oppa, go ahead and call me by my nickname. … Hehe. Huh? You're asking if I'm not embarrassed? Th-was this supposed to be embarrassing too? Didn't I say I don't know much about this kind of thing...
1001404374.korean: 오빠야, 빨리 애칭 불러도.&n…헤헷. 응? 안부끄럽냐고?&n이, 이것도 낯부끄러운 거였나?&n내, 내는 이런 거 잘 모른다 안캤나...

1001404375.english: In this world, my destiny points toward you. Perhaps… I may have crossed countless worlds just to meet you.
1001404375.korean: 이 세계에서 제 운명은 당신을 가리키고 있어요.&n어쩌면… 저는 당신을 만나기 위해&n수많은 세계를 넘어온 걸지도 모르겠어요.

1001404376.english: Ah, you're saying the cat on the T-shirt is cute? Right? It is cute, isn't it? Me too— Ugh, have you been staring at nothing but this the whole time...?
1001404376.korean: 아, 티셔츠의 고양이가 귀엽다고요?&n그렇죠? 귀엽죠? 저도- &n우읏, 계속 이거만 보고 계셨던 거예요…?

1001404377.english: Commander, I found a decent cafe during reconnaissance. Would you like to come with me? It’s quick if we fly there. I’ve even prepared a jetpack for you to use. Let’s stop by there and then go look around somewhere else.
1001404377.korean: 사령관님, 정찰중에 멀쩡한 카페를 찾았는데&n같이 가시겠어요? 날아서 가면 금방이에요.&n사령관님이 쓰실 제트팩도 준비했고요.&n거기 들렸다가 다른데도 구경 가요.

1001404378.english: Although you are different from me, you are also striving for the world. Not merely protecting it, but rebuilding it and even living it out... That is something I have never even thought about.
1001404378.korean: 저와는 다르지만, 당신도 세계를 위해&n힘쓰고 있군요. 단순히 지킬 뿐만 아니라&n재건하고, 살아가는 것까지…&n저는 한 번도 생각해보지 못한 일이에요.

1001404379.english: You know what? I really like being with you, Oppa. … Right? … Th-that's embarrassing, isn't it? If you keep doing that… Ugh… Oh, Oppa… I s-really like you.
1001404379.korean: 있제. 내는 오빠야랑 있어서 참 좋다.&n…맞나. …그, 그건 부끄럽다 안카나. 자꾸&n그라믄… 으으… 오, 오빠야…&n진~짜로 좋아한다.

1001404380.english: Even now, sometimes I feel anxious, wondering if it is okay to spend ordinary time like this. You ask what I should do? Just hold my hand. That is all I need.
1001404380.korean: 아직도 가끔, 이렇게 평범한 시간을 보내도&n되는 건지 불안해질 때가 있어요. 어떻게 해주면&n되냐구요? 그냥, 손을 잡아주세요.&n저는 그거면 충분하니까요.

1001404381.english: I won! Hehe, Commander, Commander. You promised to grant my wish— ...Since I'm being held like this, can I tell you my wish right now...?
1001404381.korean: 이겼다아! 헤헷, 사령관님, 사령관님.&n소원들어주시겠다는 약속 꼭- &n...이렇게 안겨있는 김에 소원,&n지금 말씀드려도 돼요…?

1001404382.english: Mumumu, what are you doing— ...What are you doing!

1001404383.english: I thought you were a gentleman; was that just your appearance?

1001404384.english: Ugh... what is this... that's weird, stop it...

1001404385.english: Are all men just like that? Please come. Because even I only realized I was like this after meeting you.
1001404385.korean: 남자들은 원래 다 그런가요?&n와주세요. 저도 제가 이렇다는 걸…&n당신을 만나고 나서야 알았으니까요.

1001404386.english: This is an important turn, Commander.

1001404387.english: So this… really exists. I thought it was just a story made up… Kyaa… Is this really how it's done?
1001404387.korean: 이런게… 지, 진짜로 있는 거였군요.&n꾸며낸 이야기인줄 알았는데…&n꺅… 이, 일케 하믄되나…?

1001404388.english: Being held by a wonderful man gives such a fulfilling feeling. For someone like me who lived only for duty all my life… it's dangerously intoxicating. I don't even want to think about anything else right now.
1001404388.korean: 멋진 남성에게 안기는 건, 이렇게나&n충족감을 주는군요. 평생 사명만을 위해&n살았던 저에겐 너무… 치명적이에요.&n이대로 아무것도 생각하고 싶지 않을 정도로.

1001404389.english: Ugh… what is this… it's strange, don't do this…

1001404390.english: Are all men really like this? Come closer. I only realized I'm like this after meeting you.
1001404390.korean: 남자들은 원래 다 그런가요?&n와주세요. 저도 제가 이렇다는 걸…&n당신을 만나고 나서야 알았으니까요.

1001404391.english: In a comfortable place, doing something enjoyable… with someone you love… I guess it's natural to feel like this, right?
1001404391.korean: 편안한 공간에서, 즐거운 일을…&n좋아하는 사람과 하다보면… 이런 기분이&n드는 것도, 어쩔 수 없는 거겠죠…?

1001404392.english: Big brother said he'd take me to a crowded amusement park. Then I guess I'll have to fight a little harder.
1001404392.korean: 오빠야, 내랑 사람 많은 유원지 놀러가준다캤제.&n그럴라믄, 내가 좀 더 열심히 싸워야겠네.

1001404393.english: You used to seem so busy, but now I see you still make time to rest and have fun. And you spend a lot of time with me too, which makes me happy.
1001404393.korean: 전에는 엄청 바빠보였는데, 이제보니 놀거 쉴거&n다 챙기고 있으셨네요? 그러면서도 저한테&n시간을 많이 써주셔서 기뻐요.

1001404394.english: I couldn't go outside before, so I enjoyed board games. But now, sa—ah, ah, it's nothing. Loving isn't a bad thing, right?
1001404394.korean: 옛날엔 밖에 나가지 못해서 보드게임을&n즐겼는데, 이젠 사- 앗, 아, 아무것도 아니에요.&n좋아한다는 게 나쁜 건 아니잖아요.

1001404395.english: The presidents of PECS made me into this body simply to mock Dr. Anna. They designed the sisters that way with the arrogant thought that they would command the Seven Deadly Sins as their subordinates only after I was born. Heh heh, you don't need to worry about it. They are all worthless, not even reaching the tip of your toes, Master.
1001404395.korean: PECS의 회장들이 저를 이런 몸으로 만든 건,&n단순히 안나 박사님을 조롱하기 위해서였어요.&n제가 태어나고 나서야 칠죄종을 수하로&n부리겠다는 오만한 생각으로 자매들을 그렇게&n설계했죠. 후후, 신경쓰실 필요 없어요. 전부&n주인님의 발 끝에도 미치지 못하는 자들이니까요.

1001404396.english: Before I met you, Master, I cursed my fate. A mark that I could never resolve on my own... tormented me endlessly. Only after serving you... was I able to find peace.
1001404396.korean: 주인님을 만나기 전까지, 저는 제 운명을&n저주했어요. 스스로는 절대 해소할 수 없는&n각인이… 끊임없이 저를 괴롭혔죠. 주인님을 모시고&n나서야… 편해질 수 있었어요.

1001404397.english: Master, I had something to tell you… Ah, never mind. I will begin today’s work briefing.
1001404397.korean: 주인님, 드릴 말씀이… 아, 아니에요.&n금일 업무 브리핑을 시작할게요.

1001404398.english: You do not need to worry about my sisters. The moment they face Master, they will surely realize their own destiny and the stance they must take. ...Instinctively.
1001404398.korean: 제 자매들은 걱정하지 않으셔도 괜찮아요. 분명&n주인님과 마주하는 순간, 스스로의 운명과 취해야할&n자세를 깨닫게 될 테니까요. ...본능적으로요.

1001404399.english: ...Master, I am sorry. I... I can't bear it any longer. I, your possession, dare to ask you. Please, me...
1001404399.korean: ...주인님, 죄송해요. 저, 더이상은 참을 수가&n없어요. 주인님의 소유물인 제가 감히&n부탁드려요. 부디, 저를...

1001404400.english: Even the strongest bioroid, the bioroid that ruled the seas, and I... before my master, we are merely servants hoping for your grace.
1001404400.korean: 최강의 바이오로이드도, 바다를 호령하던&n바이오로이드도, 그리고 저도… 주인님의 앞에선&n그저 은혜를 내려주시길 바라는 몸종일 뿐이에요.

1001404402.english: Master… I've become someone who can't live without you. Please pity me… You're finally granting me permission… Thank you so much. I'll do my best too…
1001404402.korean: 주인님… 저는 주인님이 없으면 살 수 없는&n몸이 되어버렸어요. 부디 저를 불쌍히 여기셔서…&n드디어 허락해 주시는 거군요…? 정말 감사해요.&n저도 최선을 다할테니까...

1001404403.english: Being made into this body… I don't regret it anymore. Because now… I can make you happy like this.
1001404403.korean: 이런 몸으로 만들어진 것…&n이제는 후회하지 않아요. 이렇게나…&n주인님을 기쁘게 만들어드릴 수 있는걸요…?

1001404404.english: To think that the angels and nuns of the Order were all here… Thank you, Light. We will be able to spread the doctrine far and wide to the world.
1001404404.korean: 교단의 천사님들과 수녀님들이 이곳에&n다 계셨다니… 빛이시여, 감사드립니다.&n교리를 세상에 널리 전할 수 있겠군요.

1001404405.english: The reason I was born was to operate the barbell alongside my older sister, but things changed after I met you, my partner. I will stand by your side and support you for a better future.
1001404405.korean: 제가 태어난 이유는 언니와 함께&n바벨을 가동하기 위해서였지만,&n반려님과 만난 뒤로는 달라졌어요.&n더 나은 미래를 위해 반려님 곁에서 보좌할게요.

1001404406.english: This is the outfit we wore when we went to Aqua Land. It wasn't quite as comfortable as a theme park, but we were still pretty comfortable there. Well, it doesn't really matter now.
1001404406.korean: 이건 우리가 아쿠아 랜드로 갈 때 입던 의상이야.&n테마파크만큼은 아니지만, 거기서도 꽤나 편하게&n지낼 수 있었다네. 뭐, 지금은 의미 없지만.

1001404407.english: At first, I had some friction with Bo-ryeon. However, surprisingly, our synergy seems better than I expected. We also have similar goals.
1001404407.korean: 처음에는 보련 양과 마찰이 있었죠. 하지만&n의외로 제 생각보다는 보련 양과의 시너지가&n좋은 것 같네요. 서로 노리는 것도 비슷하구요.

1001404408.english: Audrey and Boryeon styled me. Is it okay for a gloomy person like me to look like this... Yes, you say I look pretty? ...Thank you.
1001404408.korean: 오드리님과 보련님이 꾸며주셨어요. 저처럼&n음침한 자가 이런 모습을 해도 괜찮을까요…&n예, 예쁘다구요? ...감사합니다.

1001404409.english: Ah, hello. ...Yes, I was alone. I need to have some time to myself once a day so that I can distinguish between others' emotions and my own.
1001404409.korean: 아, 안녕하세요. ...네, 혼자 있었어요.&n타인의 감정과 제 감정을 구분할 수 있도록,&n하루에 한 번은 혼자만의 시간을 가져야 해요.

1001404410.english: As I walk down the hallway, other people's emotions flow in. Everyone's feelings for you, my partner, mix with my own and overflow. Please take responsibility, my partner.
1001404410.korean: 복도를 걷다 보면 다른 사람의 감정이&n흘러들어와요. 반려님을 향한 모두의 마음이,&n제 감정이랑 섞여서 넘쳐 흘러요.&n책임져주세요, 반려님.

1001404411.english: At this rate, my whole body is going to get sunburned. My skin is sensitive, so I have to be careful. ...What are you doing? Don't just stand there doing nothing, go get a parasol.
1001404411.korean: 이러다가 온몸이 다 타겠어. 내 피부는 예민하니까&n조심해야 한단 말이야. ...뭐 하고 있어?&n멀뚱히 있지 말고 가서 파라솔이라도 가져와.

1001404412.english: I told you before, didn't I? That I'm taking care of my body shape as well as my clothes. How is it? My body is excellent, isn't it?
1001404412.korean: 제가 전에 말씀드렸었죠?&n옷뿐만 아니라 바디쉐잎도 가꾸고 있다구요.&n어때요? 제 바디, 엑설런트하죠?

1001404413.english: Ah. Master, please don't go. If you aren't by my side, I feel so anxious that I think I'm going to die.
1001404413.korean: 앗. 주인님, 가지 마세요. 주인님이 곁에 없으면,&n너무나도 불안해서 죽을 것만 같아요.

1001404414.english: I am praying to the Light for the Savior. I will beg you to watch over the Agent of Light tomorrow as well, so that they do not get sick or hurt.
1001404414.korean: 구원자님을 위해 빛께 기도드리고 있어요.&n내일도 빛의 대리인님이 아프지 않게,&n다치지 않게 보살펴달라고 간청할게요.

1001404415.english: My dear, it's time for worship… Ack! …The congregation is waiting, you have to get up. What? You want us to stay like this just a little longer? …Then, may I give you a hug too?
1001404415.korean: 반려님, 예배할 시간이에… 꺅! ...신도님들이&n기다리고 계세요, 일어나셔야 해요.&n네? 조금만 더 이렇게 있자구요?&n...그럼 저도 반려님을 껴안아도 될까요?

1001404416.english: How about building something like a resort here? I think we could just pour some concrete... Ah, no, I'm not saying I'm going to do it!
1001404416.korean: 이곳에 리조트 같은 걸 짓는 건 어때?&n적당히 공구리치면 될 것 같은데…&n아, 아니 내가 한다는 말은 아니야!

1001404417.english: I'm just trying to make a swimsuit, not enter the contest myself. But it feels like I've become the main character.
1001404417.korean: 저는 수영복을 만들어 주려는 거지&n직접 콘테스트에 참가하려는 건 아니에요.&n하지만 마치, 제가 주인공이 된 것 같네요.

1001404418.english: Master. We can go swimming at the beach and eat shaved ice together... I mean, how about a date?
1001404418.korean: 주인님. 저랑 같이 해수욕도 하고 빙수도 먹고…&n그러니까, 데이트는... 어떠세요?

1001404419.english: It feels like Veronica and I are the only ones cleaning lately. We need to clean up the trash as soon as it appears... Savior, could you please talk to the angels yourself?
1001404419.korean: 요새 저랑 베로니카님만 청소하는 거 같아요.&n쓰레기는 생기자마자 바로바로 치워야 하는데…&n구원자님께서 직접 천사님들을 타일러주시겠어요?

1001404420.english: The reason I was born was to operate the barbell alongside my older sister, but things changed after I met you, my partner. I will stand by your side and support you for a better future.
1001404420.korean: 제가 태어난 이유는 언니와 함께&n바벨을 가동하기 위해서였지만,&n반려님과 만난 뒤로는 달라졌어요.&n더 나은 미래를 위해 반려님 곁에서 보좌할게요.

1001404421.english: Why are you looking away? Do you think I, Lady Draculina, would care about such things? Go ahead and admire the most radiant Lady Draculina here to your heart's content.
1001404421.korean: 뭘 눈을 돌리고 그래? 이 드라큐리나 님이&n그런 거에 신경이나 쓸 것 같아?&n이곳에서 가장 빛나는 드라큐리나&n님의 모습을 마음껏 감상하라고.

1001404422.english: I guess I should have discussed this with Miss Boryeon sooner. Thanks to you, I was able to stay by the Commander's side. I should express my gratitude to Miss Boryeon.
1001404422.korean: 더 빨리 보련 양과 의견을 나눌 걸 그랬나 봐요.&n덕분에 사령관의 곁에 있게 되었으니까요.&n보련 양에게는 감사를 표해야겠어요.

1001404423.english: I thought it wouldn't suit someone like me even if I tried to dress up... but seeing that you like it, Master, I'm overjoyed I could die.
1001404423.korean: 저 같은 게 꾸민다고 해도 어울리지 않을 거라고&n생각했었는데... 주인님께서 좋아해 주시니,&n죽을 만큼 기뻐요.

1001404424.english: It looks like you worked overtime yesterday too. Aren't you tired? Is there anything I can help you with...? You want me to smile? Th-would this be okay?
1001404424.korean: 어제도 야근하신 것 같은데 피곤하지 않으세요?&n제가 도와드릴 일은 없을까요…? 웃어달라고요?&n이, 이렇게 하면 될까요?

1001404425.english: As I walk down the hallway, other people's emotions flow in. Everyone's feelings for you, my partner, mix with my own and overflow. Please take responsibility, my partner.
1001404425.korean: 복도를 걷다 보면 다른 사람의 감정이&n흘러들어와요. 반려님을 향한 모두의 마음이,&n제 감정이랑 섞여서 넘쳐 흘러요.&n책임져주세요, 반려님.

1001404426.english: Hmph. If you want to serve me properly, shouldn't you at least feed me some tomato juice? Huh? Really? Th-thank you...
1001404426.korean: 흥. 제대로 시중을 들고 싶다면, 이 몸에게&n토마토 주스라도 먹여줘야 하는 거 아냐?&n어? 진짜? 고, 고마워...

1001404427.english: Commander, you should enter the contest too. First, the measurements… Wow. You have a more solid physique than I expected. Let's take a full body check. From head to toe.
1001404427.korean: 사령관도 콘테스트에 참가해보세요.&n우선 치수를… 와우. 생각보다 탄탄한 몸이시네요.&n어디 한 번 몸 전체를 확인해야겠어요.&n머리부터, 발끝까지.

1001404428.english: Master. I know it is greedy of me, but please, look at me. Every time you look at someone else, my heart aches so much that I feel like I’m going to die.
1001404428.korean: 주인님. 욕심인 건 알지만, 부디 저를 바라봐주세요.&n주인님께서 다른 분을 보실 때마다&n마음이 너무 아파서, 죽을 것 같아요.

1001404429.english: If you're not busy, will you stay by my side, Savior? Having you with me makes me feel... more at ease than being alone. ...Thank you, I love you...
1001404429.korean: 바쁘지 않으면 제 곁에 있어주실래요, 구원자님?&n혼자 있는 것보다 구원자님이 함께 있는 게 더…&n마음이, 편안해져요. ...고마워요, 좋아해요...

1001404430.english: My dear, it's time for worship… Ack! …The congregation is waiting, you have to get up. What? You want us to stay like this just a little longer? …Then, may I give you a hug too?
1001404430.korean: 반려님, 예배할 시간이에… 꺅! ...신도님들이&n기다리고 계세요, 일어나셔야 해요.&n네? 조금만 더 이렇게 있자구요?&n...그럼 저도 반려님을 껴안아도 될까요?

1001404431.english: You're going to put oil on me? Fine, fine. Ugh! You told me my skin is sensitive! A little gentler... Ah, no... maybe, doing it a little harder would be good too...
1001404431.korean: 오일 발라준다고? 뭐, 좋아. 으읏!&n피부 예민하다고 했잖아! 좀 더 살살…&n아, 아니… 좀 더, 세게 하는 것도 좋을지도...

1001404432.english: Really... you can't take your eyes off me. Come here. It's okay if this dress gets wet.
1001404432.korean: 정말이지... 저에게서 눈을 떼지 못하시는군요.&n이리 오세요. 이 옷은 젖어도 괜찮은 옷이니까요.

1001404433.english: When I am with you, Master, I can feel a warmth welling up in my heart. It is so warm that I feel happy. Is it... because of the sunlight?
1001404433.korean: 주인님과 함께 있으면, 가슴 한편이 따뜻해지는 게&n느껴져요. 너무나도 따뜻해서 행복한 기분이에요.&n햇빛… 때문일까요?

1001404435.english: W-wait a minute...! Hmph, my feelings for you and me... and all the good feelings are all mixed up... I feel like my head is going to go crazy...
1001404435.korean: 자, 잠깐만요…! 흐읏, 반려님과 제 감정이랑…&n기분 좋은 게 전부 뒤섞여서…&n머리가 이상해질 것 같아요...

1001404436.english: Don't touch it! Ugh, I was feeling good about this...

1001404437.english: Stop! It's not gentlemanly to touch a lady's swimsuit!
1001404437.korean: 스탑! 레이디의 수영복에 손대는 건&n젠틀하지 못해요!

1001404439.english: Is this really okay? I shouldn't do anything disrespectful, and the light must be watching… Have I become corrupted?
1001404439.korean: 정말… 괜찮은 걸까요? 불경한 행위는 안되는데,&n빛께서 보고 계실 텐데… 저, 타락해버린 걸까요?

1001404440.english: W-wait a moment…! Ahh, my feelings and pleasure with you… are all mixed up… My head feels like it's going to explode...
1001404440.korean: 자, 잠깐만요…! 흐읏, 반려님과 제 감정이랑…&n기분 좋은 게 전부 뒤섞여서…&n머리가 이상해질 것 같아요...

1001404441.english: Like back then… you want to make me unable to move, right? Usually, that would hurt and feel bad… but with you… it feels strange.
1001404441.korean: 그때처럼… 날 꼼짝도 못 하게 하려는 거지…?&n그런 짓을 당하면 아프고 기분 나빠야 하는데…&n너한테라면… 이상한 기분이 들어.

1001404442.english: Haah… can't you really hold back? Oh my… heh heh. I guess it can't be helped. Then… shall we go to the locker room alone?
1001404442.korean: 하아… 정말로 못 참으시겠나요?&n어머나... 후훗. 어쩔 수 없네요. 그럼…&n단둘이서 라커룸으로 가실까요?

1001404443.english: Ahh… I'm so happy with the love you give me, I feel like I could die. If I could die, then let me have just a little more…
1001404443.korean: 하읏… 주인님께서 베풀어주시는 사랑에&n저는 너무 행복해서 죽을 것 같아요.&n죽어도 좋으니 좀 더...

1001404444.english: My heart beats fast every time I see you… Could you confess it's not just my feelings?
1001404444.korean: 반려님이랑 마주칠 때마다 마음이 두근거려요…&n저만의 감정은 아닐 거라고 고백해 주시겠어요?

1001404445.english: Hey… why are you being so kind lately? I don't hate it, but sometimes… could you please do things my way? …Because of you, I've become like this.
1001404445.korean: 저기... 요새 왜 이렇게 상냥하게 해?&n시, 싫은 건 아닌데, 그래도... 가, 가끔씩은&n내 취향에 맞춰줘. ...너 때문에 이렇게 됐으니까.

1001404446.english: The sun is so hot. We can't lose. Let's burn our love even hotter than the sun, together, okay?
1001404446.korean: 태양이 너무 뜨겁네요. 질 수 없죠.&n우리의 사랑이 저 태양보다 더 뜨겁게 타오르도록,&n같이 힘내볼까요?

1001404447.english: Even if I die someday, I'll always be by your side. Death can't separate us.
1001404447.korean: 언젠가 제가 죽는다 해도&n저는 항상 주인님 곁에 있을 거예요.&n죽음도 우리를 갈라놓을 수 없으니까요.

1001404448.english: This is Aqua Land, the beach mobile barbershop~ Hey customer! We'll give you a service, would you like to try it?
1001404448.korean: 아쿠아 랜드, 해변 출장 바버샵입니다~&n거기 손님! 서비스 해드릴테니까,&n한 번 받아보실래요?

1001404449.english: I have always strived to strengthen my steel line. I am worried that wearing clothes like this might cause my efforts to crumble.
1001404449.korean: 항상 스틸라인을 강하게 키우려고&n노력해왔습니다. 이런 옷을 입으면&n제 노력이 무너지지는 않을까 걱정됩니다.

1001404450.english: Audrey Unnie... made this for me~ ...Huh? You're asking if it's really clothes? There's a zipper here, too. Look. It is clothes, right?♡
1001404450.korean: 이건 오드리 언...니? 가 만들어줬어요~&n...네? 옷 맞냐고요? 여기 지퍼도 있어요.&n보세요. 옷 맞죠♡

1001404451.english: I never imagined I would be reunited here with the angels from whom I had lost contact. Ah… once again, the blessings and glory of light upon this wilderness…
1001404451.korean: 인연이 끊겼던 천사들과&n여기서 재회하게 될 줄은 몰랐습니다.&n아아… 이 광야에 다시금, 빛의 축복과 영광을…

1001404452.english: ...Savior. Please punish the sinner Ramiel. The unforgivable sin of daring to harbor affection and lust for You— Eh…? Th-Is it alright…? Ah… Th-I see… I’m relieved.
1001404452.korean: ...구원자님. 죄인 라미엘에게 벌을 내려주세요.&n감히 구원자님께 애정과 정욕을 품는,&n씻을 수 없는 죄를- 엣…? 괘, 괜찮은 건가요…?&n아… 그, 그렇군요… 안심, 했어요.

1001404453.english: Customer~ How about my swimsuit? Eh? You think it's pretty? Hehehe... Just tell me what you want. I'll do it all for you!
1001404453.korean: 손님~ 제 수영복은 어떠세요? 엣. 예쁘다구요?&n에헤헷... 원하는 건 다 말씀하세요. 전부 해드릴게요!

1001404454.english: You said it was a good opportunity to understand Captain Marie's feelings... but I just feel embarrassed and don't really know.
1001404454.korean: 마리 대장님의 마음을 이해할&n좋은 기회라고 했는데…&n부끄럽기만하고 잘 모르겠습니다.

1001404455.english: Nya ha ha~ Well, the vampire says~ she'll make Master serve her~ Even though Master can't handle Poi~
1001404455.korean: 냐하핫~ 글쎄 흡혈귀가~&n주인님이 자기를 섬기게 만들겠데요~&n주인님은 포이도 감당 못하는데~

1001404456.english: I am Ramiel, the angel who bears all sins. Atonement through penance is my only mission. ...That is not so. Because through me… others can find rest in the embrace of the light.
1001404456.korean: 저는 모든 죄를 짊어진 천사 라미엘.&n고행을 통한 속죄만이 제 사명입니다.&n...그렇지 않습니다. 저로 인해… 다른 분들이&n빛의 품에서 안식을 찾을 수 있으니까요.

1001404457.english: To think someone else's embrace could be this warm... Mm, please hug me tighter... I don't want to be lonely anymore...
1001404457.korean: 다른 사람의 품이 이렇게나 따뜻했다니…&n으응, 더 꼭 안아주세요… 외로운 건, 이제 싫어요...

1001404458.english: I think I get along really well with Audrey! We share the same desire to dress everyone up, and our hearts for the guests... Hehe, it's nothing.
1001404458.korean: 저, 오드리님하고 잘 맞는 것 같아요!&n모두를 꾸며주고싶은 마음도 같고,&n손님을 향한 마음도… 헤헤, 아무것도 아니에요.

1001404459.english: My skin? I take care of it as a hobby, but... it doesn't really suit a soldier like me, does it?
1001404459.korean: 제 피부요?&n평소에 취미삼아 관리하고 있습니다만…&n저같은 군인에게는 어울리지 않죠?

1001404460.english: Master~♡ Let's play with Poi- Hee... Hmm... I see~ Poi understands~ Poi only has you, Master, but~ you have other kids too, Master~
1001404460.korean: 주인님~♡ 포이랑 같이 놀-&n헤에… 흐응… 그렇구나~ 포이는 이해해요~&n포이는 주인님밖에 없지만~&n주인님한텐 다른 애들도 있으니까~

1001404461.english: “O you born bearing sin, dare not clothe yourself with the creature of light”... All that has been granted to me is this scroll inscribed with the Word of Light… created so that I would not fall into corruption because of the sins I bear.
1001404461.korean: “죄를 지고 태어난 자여, 감히 빛의 피조물을&n몸에 걸치지 말라”... 제게 허락된 것은,&n짊어진 죄악 때문에 스스로 타락하지 않도록&n만들어진… 빛의 말씀이 적힌 이 스크롤 뿐입니다.

1001404462.english: You don't have to feel sorry. Even if that act... wasn't really forgiveness of sins, I was saved like this.
1001404462.korean: 미안해하지 않으셔도 괜찮아요.&n그 행위가... 정말 죄사함이 아니었다고 해도,&n저는 이렇게 구원받았으니까요.

1001404463.english: So that's what Aqua Land is like. Hmm... I'm fine. My first guest is the very gentle, cool, and totally my type here— M-please forget that last remark!
1001404463.korean: 아쿠아 랜드는 그런 곳이었군요. 음… 저는 괜찮아요.&n제 첫손님은, 여기 계신 아~주 젠틀하고 멋지고&n제 취향인- 마, 마지막 말은 잊어주세요!

1001404464.english: So that's what everyone was thinking, recommending participation in the contest so enthusiastically just to skip training. They are truly lovely soldiers. The next training is going to be pure hell...
1001404464.korean: 훈련을 빼려고 그렇게나 적극적으로 콘테스트&n참가를 추천했다니, 다들 그런 생각이었군요.&n정말 사랑스러운 병사들입니다.&n다음 훈련은 진짜로 지옥에서...

1001404465.english: Poi is feeling so stifled~ Master! Let's just take off our clothes, okay? Huh? Huh?
1001404465.korean: 포이는 너무 답답한데~&n주인님! 우리 그냥 옷 벗자? 응? 응?

1001404466.english: ...So there was a reason why everyone devoted themselves and prayed for the Savior… Bright and warm like light… The Agent of Light described in the scriptures, exactly as He is.
1001404466.korean: ...모두가 구원자님을 위해 헌신하고&n기도하는 이유가 있었군요…&n빛처럼 밝고 따스한…&n경전에 나온 빛의 대리인, 그대로입니다.

1001404467.english: ...Savior. Please punish the sinner Ramiel. The unforgivable sin of daring to harbor affection and lust for You— Eh…? Th-Is it alright…? Ah… Th-I see… I’m relieved.
1001404467.korean: ...구원자님. 죄인 라미엘에게 벌을 내려주세요.&n감히 구원자님께 애정과 정욕을 품는,&n씻을 수 없는 죄를- 엣…? 괘, 괜찮은 건가요…?&n아… 그, 그렇군요… 안심, 했어요.

1001404468.english: Wow, you're wearing a swimsuit too? Did you get this from Audrey? ...Huh? The saliva? Uh, oh... *Slurp*. I, seeing your body, I couldn't help but... Haha...
1001404468.korean: 와아, 손님도 수영복 입으셨네요?&n오드리님한테 받으신거예요? ...네? 침이요?&n어, 어라… 츄릅. 소, 손님의 몸을 보니까&n저도 모르게… 하하...

1001404469.english: Honestly, I'm not really sure, but Commander... yes, since you said it's pretty... I'm really happy.
1001404469.korean: 솔직히 저는 잘 모르겠습니다만,&n사령관님께서… 예, 예쁘다고 해 주시니…&n정말 기쁩니다.

1001404470.english: Why are you telling me to calm down? Poi isn't angry- Kyaaah?! Ah... Master. Poi... whenever you show such a manly side... this part of me trembles so much♡
1001404470.korean: 왜 화를 풀라고 하세요? 포이는 화 안났는- 꺅?!&n아… 주인님. 포이는… 주인님이 이렇게&n남자다운 모습을 보여줄 때마다…&n여기가, 너무 떨려♡

1001404471.english: You must not... come near me, Savior. If you are tainted by darkness because of me... I...
1001404471.korean: 저를... 가까이 하셔서는 안 됩니다, 구원자님.&n저 때문에 구원자님께서 어둠에 물드신다면…&n저는...

1001404472.english: To think someone else's embrace could be this warm... Mm, please hug me tighter... I don't want to be lonely anymore...
1001404472.korean: 다른 사람의 품이 이렇게나 따뜻했다니…&n으응, 더 꼭 안아주세요… 외로운 건, 이제 싫어요...
